c71ae442-ae5e-4685-a24c-72dbe95ba720.q: Where is Hotel Casa Nicolò Priuli located?
c71ae442-ae5e-4685-a24c-72dbe95ba720.a: Hotel Casa Nicolò Priuli is in the heart of Venice, right on the canal with walking distance to the city's main sights and restaurants. It's in an excellent central location for exploring the city.

c71ae442-ae5e-4685-a24c-72dbe95ba720.q: How cosy is Hotel Casa Nicolò Priuli?
c71ae442-ae5e-4685-a24c-72dbe95ba720.a: Hotel Casa Nicolò Priuli has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10. Guests describe rooms as clean, comfortable, and full of old-world Venetian charm, though some note they are quite small.

c71ae442-ae5e-4685-a24c-72dbe95ba720.q: Is the staff at Hotel Casa Nicolò Priuli helpful?

c71ae442-ae5e-4685-a24c-72dbe95ba720.q: Is Hotel Casa Nicolò Priuli good for couples?
c71ae442-ae5e-4685-a24c-72dbe95ba720.a: Yes, guests have had lovely stays here for special occasions. One couple on their honeymoon praised the beautiful room and quick, helpful reception service.

5dbe6a60-7f61-4a6a-9fca-9801986a10ce.q: How cosy is Rainbow Wood Farm?

b6b537a0-affc-411e-b91d-921b79c11fb8.a: Daiya Ryokan is in Kyoto, Japan, just a block from Kyoto Station and within walking distance of temples, restaurants, and transport links. Guests consistently praise its convenient location for exploring the city.

6db353bf-d60b-4676-8a30-9595b8424159.a: Rooms are very clean and modern with daily housekeeping, though some guests note they can be on the smaller side with carpeted floors; the hotel maintains high standards of comfort and cleanliness throughout.

6db353bf-d60b-4676-8a30-9595b8424159.q: Does OREA Hotel Angelo Praha have good guest reviews?
6db353bf-d60b-4676-8a30-9595b8424159.a: Yes, it holds a strong 4.6 out of 5 rating from 2,844 reviews, with guests consistently highlighting the fair value, convenient location, and reliable quality of the stay.

5d6a9f0a-b5ee-4237-aafa-de9a72364b31.a: Leon's Place is in Rome, Italy, positioned within walking distance of major historical sites—most are about 30 minutes on foot—and surrounded by excellent restaurants, gelato shops, and cafés like Faro, which is just steps away.

Leon's Place scores 8.4 out of 10 for cosiness, offering a warm and comfortable atmosphere with spacious rooms, quality furnishings like soft robes and towels, and a welcoming lobby bar where guests enjoy relaxing.

5d6a9f0a-b5ee-4237-aafa-de9a72364b31.q: Is the staff at Leon's Place friendly?
5d6a9f0a-b5ee-4237-aafa-de9a72364b31.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the staff as exceptionally friendly and helpful—they assist with everything from booking taxis and finding restaurants to arranging special touches like complimentary wine for birthdays, and several speak multiple languages.

5d6a9f0a-b5ee-4237-aafa-de9a72364b31.q: Does Leon's Place have a spa?
5d6a9f0a-b5ee-4237-aafa-de9a72364b31.a: Yes, Leon's Place features a complimentary wellness spa with a sauna and steam shower, plus massage services; guests have raved about the quality of treatments, with one calling it among the best massages they've ever had.

5d6a9f0a-b5ee-4237-aafa-de9a72364b31.q: What are the rooms like at Leon's Place?
5d6a9f0a-b5ee-4237-aafa-de9a72364b31.a: Rooms are spacious and clean with comfortable beds and large bathrooms equipped with bathtubs, quality towels, and robes; some guests receive upgrades to rooms with patios where you can sit in the sun or enjoy views of the surrounding area.

5d6a9f0a-b5ee-4237-aafa-de9a72364b31.q: Is breakfast good at Leon's Place?
5d6a9f0a-b5ee-4237-aafa-de9a72364b31.a: Yes, guests describe the breakfast spread as outstanding, with a wide variety of hot and cold options that make each morning feel special and help set a positive tone for exploring Rome.

e55eaf2e-0900-4cc6-965c-07b795096104.q: Where is Mystery Hotel Budapest located?
e55eaf2e-0900-4cc6-965c-07b795096104.a: Mystery Hotel Budapest is situated on Podmaniczky u. 45 in Budapest's 6th district. It's conveniently positioned near major sights and transport links, yet feels calm and refined—about a 25-minute walk from the Danube River with historic sites within easy walking distance.

e55eaf2e-0900-4cc6-965c-07b795096104.q: How cosy is Mystery Hotel Budapest?
e55eaf2e-0900-4cc6-965c-07b795096104.a: Mystery Hotel Budapest has a cosy score of 5.5/10. Guests consistently praise its thoughtful design, quiet atmosphere, and intimate spa area filled with natural light—making it feel like a peaceful retreat despite being centrally located.

e55eaf2e-0900-4cc6-965c-07b795096104.q: What's the guest rating for Mystery Hotel Budapest?
e55eaf2e-0900-4cc6-965c-07b795096104.a: Mystery Hotel Budapest has an excellent guest rating of 4.7 out of 5 stars, based on over 1,100 reviews. Guests consistently highlight the attentive staff, beautiful interior design, and the overall quality of their stay.

e55eaf2e-0900-4cc6-965c-07b795096104.q: Does Mystery Hotel Budapest have a spa?
e55eaf2e-0900-4cc6-965c-07b795096104.a: Yes, Mystery Hotel Budapest features the Secret Garden Spa with complimentary access to guests. The wellness area includes a hot tub, steam room, and sauna, and guests praise it as quiet, green, and full of natural light—though note it's quite small.

e55eaf2e-0900-4cc6-965c-07b795096104.q: Is the food good at Mystery Hotel Budapest?
e55eaf2e-0900-4cc6-965c-07b795096104.a: Guests rave about the dining experience, with particular praise for the breakfast's wide selection of fresh options and the restaurant's delicious dishes including salmon, pasta, and steak. The thoughtful touches—like complimentary drinks on arrival and chocolates left after room cleaning—add to the experience.

e55eaf2e-0900-4cc6-965c-07b795096104.q: Is Mystery Hotel Budapest good for solo travellers?
e55eaf2e-0900-4cc6-965c-07b795096104.a: Yes, solo guests have felt very safe and well looked after here. Staff are noted for being attentive and kind, and the calm location away from busier streets provides a welcoming, secure environment for travelling alone.

0c9a2641-bfdf-4de6-b2ef-214ceec70d11.q: Where is Riad Dar Zaman located?
0c9a2641-bfdf-4de6-b2ef-214ceec70d11.a: Riad Dar Zaman is in Marrakech's Medina, in a quieter pocket that's walkable to the main sights including Majorelle Garden and the bustling medina markets, making it an ideal base without the noise.

0c9a2641-bfdf-4de6-b2ef-214ceec70d11.q: How cosy is Riad Dar Zaman?
0c9a2641-bfdf-4de6-b2ef-214ceec70d11.a: Riad Dar Zaman scores 7.7/10 for cosiness—guests consistently praise it as a tranquil oasis with beautiful, clean, spacious rooms and a serene rooftop terrace that provides the perfect retreat after exploring hectic Marrakech.

0c9a2641-bfdf-4de6-b2ef-214ceec70d11.q: Is the staff at Riad Dar Zaman helpful?
0c9a2641-bfdf-4de6-b2ef-214ceec70d11.a: Yes, the team—including Hamza, Hassan, Peter, Karima and Adil—are genuinely warm, friendly and exceptionally helpful, offering local tips, mapping out adventures, and going out of their way to make guests feel at home.

0c9a2641-bfdf-4de6-b2ef-214ceec70d11.q: What food experiences does Riad Dar Zaman offer?
0c9a2641-bfdf-4de6-b2ef-214ceec70d11.a: The riad serves exceptional breakfast included with your stay, and offers both cooking classes and à la carte dinners (from £24 per person for three courses); guests rave about the quality and the intimate, personalised dining experience.

0c9a2641-bfdf-4de6-b2ef-214ceec70d11.q: Does Riad Dar Zaman have a tea or cultural experience?
0c9a2641-bfdf-4de6-b2ef-214ceec70d11.a: Yes, guests particularly loved the Moroccan tea class with Hamza and the neighbourhood cooking tour led by Peter, which includes visits to local bakers and markets before returning to prepare and enjoy a meal at the riad.

0c9a2641-bfdf-4de6-b2ef-214ceec70d11.q: What are the rooms like at Riad Dar Zaman?
0c9a2641-bfdf-4de6-b2ef-214ceec70d11.a: Rooms are clean, tidy and comfortable; some open directly onto the lovely rooftop terrace, though they're on the smaller side, so they're best suited to travellers with light luggage.

0d9891d1-94f5-4254-af70-5f6bf2c3bdcf.q: Where is Zum alten Bahnhof located?
0d9891d1-94f5-4254-af70-5f6bf2c3bdcf.a: Zum alten Bahnhof is situated in Hamburg, Deutschland, specifically in the Curslack area. It's a restaurant and hotel set in a converted railway station building with character and charm.

0d9891d1-94f5-4254-af70-5f6bf2c3bdcf.q: How cosy is Zum alten Bahnhof?
0d9891d1-94f5-4254-af70-5f6bf2c3bdcf.a: The hotel has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10. Guests consistently mention feeling welcomed and at ease, with many praising the warm atmosphere and attentive service that makes them want to return.

0d9891d1-94f5-4254-af70-5f6bf2c3bdcf.q: Is the food good at Zum alten Bahnhof?
0d9891d1-94f5-4254-af70-5f6bf2c3bdcf.a: Yes—guests regularly praise the quality and flavour of the dishes. The menu features traditional Hamburg specialities like Pannfisch, Labskaus and Currywurst alongside classics like Roastbeef and Schnitzel, all prepared with care and attention to detail.

0d9891d1-94f5-4254-af70-5f6bf2c3bdcf.q: Is Zum alten Bahnhof good for groups and families?
0d9891d1-94f5-4254-af70-5f6bf2c3bdcf.a: Absolutely. Multiple guests have dined there with groups of 15–20 people and families with children, all reporting that the service was attentive, the food was prepared exactly as requested, and children were made to feel genuinely welcomed.

0d9891d1-94f5-4254-af70-5f6bf2c3bdcf.q: Is the service friendly at Zum alten Bahnhof?
0d9891d1-94f5-4254-af70-5f6bf2c3bdcf.a: Yes. Guests consistently highlight the warm, attentive and reliable service. Staff greet guests with genuine hospitality, and the team handles both intimate dinners and large celebrations with care and professionalism.

0d9891d1-94f5-4254-af70-5f6bf2c3bdcf.q: Is Zum alten Bahnhof good for special occasions?
0d9891d1-94f5-4254-af70-5f6bf2c3bdcf.a: Definitely. Guests have celebrated birthdays, anniversaries and Valentine's Day there, with the restaurant offering exclusive reservations and high-quality, lovingly prepared buffets that make occasions feel truly special.

47af4448-5f84-48a6-b861-4d61e9a3b90f.q: Where is Hotel Fontana located in Venice?
47af4448-5f84-48a6-b861-4d61e9a3b90f.a: Hotel Fontana sits in the heart of Venice, just a 5-minute walk from St Mark's Basilica and the Doge's Palace, and less than 15 minutes from the Rialto Bridge. Hotel Fontana has a cosy score of 7.0 out of 10. Guests praise it as a quiet sanctuary in the bustling city centre, with rooms that remain peaceful even though you're in the heart of Venice.

47af4448-5f84-48a6-b861-4d61e9a3b90f.q: Is Hotel Fontana good for families?
47af4448-5f84-48a6-b861-4d61e9a3b90f.a: Yes, Hotel Fontana is a family-run hotel with genuinely helpful staff. Guests with children have appreciated the welcoming atmosphere, the included breakfast with fresh pastries, and the air-conditioned rooms that keep you cool during hot summers.

47af4448-5f84-48a6-b861-4d61e9a3b90f.q: What is the breakfast like at Hotel Fontana?
47af4448-5f84-48a6-b861-4d61e9a3b90f.a: Breakfast is included with your stay and guests love it—they've particularly praised the fresh pastries and the yummy way it starts the day. It's a nice touch that sets you up well for exploring Venice.

47af4448-5f84-48a6-b861-4d61e9a3b90f.q: Is the service good at Hotel Fontana?
47af4448-5f84-48a6-b861-4d61e9a3b90f.a: The staff and owners are described as incredibly supportive, friendly, and helpful. Guests have highlighted their willingness to assist with directions, recommendations, and questions, though it's a small team so patience is appreciated.

47af4448-5f84-48a6-b861-4d61e9a3b90f.q: What are the rooms like at Hotel Fontana?
47af4448-5f84-48a6-b861-4d61e9a3b90f.a: Rooms are clean, spacious, and quiet, with air conditioning that keeps them cool. The hotel is historic but well-maintained, and there's an elevator to reach upper floors—guests on the 4th floor have noted the peaceful atmosphere despite the central location.

d05edad7-4bcd-4f6a-a2cb-18c5fbed1c65.a: Ullrhaus is in St. Anton am Arlberg, Austria, right in the centre next to the main ski lifts (Galzigbahn, Rendlbahn, and Gampenbahn) and within easy reach of shops and restaurants.
Ullrhaus has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10, reflecting its modern, well-designed aesthetic rather than a traditional alpine warmth.

d05edad7-4bcd-4f6a-a2cb-18c5fbed1c65.q: Is the food good at Ullrhaus?
d05edad7-4bcd-4f6a-a2cb-18c5fbed1c65.a: Yes—guests consistently praise the restaurant as exceptional, with fresh, high-quality breakfasts and excellent dinners. The restaurant earned a Michelin star, and most guests recommend the half-board option.

d05edad7-4bcd-4f6a-a2cb-18c5fbed1c65.q: What is the spa like at Ullrhaus?
d05edad7-4bcd-4f6a-a2cb-18c5fbed1c65.a: The spa and sauna area is superb, with guests highlighting it as a fantastic relaxation facility that's well-maintained and thoughtfully designed.

d05edad7-4bcd-4f6a-a2cb-18c5fbed1c65.q: How is the service at Ullrhaus?
d05edad7-4bcd-4f6a-a2cb-18c5fbed1c65.a: Staff are described as incredibly friendly, welcoming, and attentive, with guests consistently praising their helpfulness and warmth throughout their stays.
The hotel offers a gym, pool, spa, sauna area, restaurant, and covered parking, all housed in modern, brand-new, well-kept facilities.

b8d165bb-d92a-4751-b63f-538921e108f8.q: What is the cosy score for Seikiro Ryokan Historical Museum Hotel Kyoto by the sea?
b8d165bb-d92a-4751-b63f-538921e108f8.a: Seikiro Ryokan scores 8.0 out of 10 for cosiness, reflecting its authentic, charming atmosphere as a traditional ryokan with spacious rooms, futon bedding, and thoughtful winter comforts like warm flasks.

b8d165bb-d92a-4751-b63f-538921e108f8.q: Where is Seikiro Ryokan Historical Museum Hotel Kyoto by the sea located?
b8d165bb-d92a-4751-b63f-538921e108f8.a: Seikiro Ryokan is located in Kyoto 626-0015, Japan, in the quieter Amanohashidate area—less crowded than central Kyoto, with convenient access to Amanohashidate beach by bus, train, or a 40-minute walk.

b8d165bb-d92a-4751-b63f-538921e108f8.q: What do guests say about the rooms at Seikiro Ryokan Historical Museum Hotel Kyoto by the sea?
b8d165bb-d92a-4751-b63f-538921e108f8.a: Guests praise the spacious, beautifully decorated rooms with traditional Japanese character; many highlight views of Amanohashidate and the beach, though the ryokan is intentionally preserved in its historic style rather than modernised.

b8d165bb-d92a-4751-b63f-538921e108f8.q: Does Seikiro Ryokan Historical Museum Hotel Kyoto by the sea have good service?
b8d165bb-d92a-4751-b63f-538921e108f8.a: Yes—guests consistently commend the staff as helpful, kind, and wonderful, with one reviewer noting their genuine hospitality even when approached by mistake.

b8d165bb-d92a-4751-b63f-538921e108f8.q: Is the bathing experience good at Seikiro Ryokan Historical Museum Hotel Kyoto by the sea?
b8d165bb-d92a-4751-b63f-538921e108f8.a: The onsen is basic and small by modern standards, but guests find it nice and authentic to the ryokan's historic character; it fits the nostalgic, traditional experience the hotel aims to preserve.

b8d165bb-d92a-4751-b63f-538921e108f8.q: What is the guest rating for Seikiro Ryokan Historical Museum Hotel Kyoto by the sea?
b8d165bb-d92a-4751-b63f-538921e108f8.a: Seikiro Ryokan holds a 4.0 out of 5 rating from 209 reviews, with guests appreciating its authentic Japanese atmosphere, spacious rooms, and charming historic character.

50d60879-228b-400d-b49d-e003cd036e2d.q: Where is The Rock Hua Hin Beachfront Spa Resort located?
50d60879-228b-400d-b49d-e003cd036e2d.a: The Rock Hua Hin is located in Chang Wat Prachuap Khiri Khan, Thailand, sitting directly on a private, relaxing beach that's wonderfully quiet and not overly touristy—perfect for a peaceful escape.

50d60879-228b-400d-b49d-e003cd036e2d.q: How cosy is The Rock Hua Hin Beachfront Spa Resort?
50d60879-228b-400d-b49d-e003cd036e2d.a: The Rock Hua Hin scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness, offering a charming, intimate boutique atmosphere with spacious rooms and a welcoming, attentive staff that make guests feel genuinely cared for.

50d60879-228b-400d-b49d-e003cd036e2d.q: Is the spa good at The Rock Hua Hin Beachfront Spa Resort?
50d60879-228b-400d-b49d-e003cd036e2d.a: Yes—guests consistently praise the spa as truly exceptional, with experienced masseuses offering excellent Thai massage, stress relief, and migraine treatments in a pleasant, relaxing atmosphere.

50d60879-228b-400d-b49d-e003cd036e2d.q: What is the service like at The Rock Hua Hin Beachfront Spa Resort?
50d60879-228b-400d-b49d-e003cd036e2d.a: The service is outstanding; staff go above and beyond to make guests feel special and valued, welcoming families with warmth and attentiveness, checking in regularly to ensure every need is met.

50d60879-228b-400d-b49d-e003cd036e2d.a: Yes, families love it—the hotel offers spacious family rooms so you needn't book separate rooms, a big pool that doesn't feel crowded, direct beach access, and staff who genuinely welcome children and help with all your needs.

50d60879-228b-400d-b49d-e003cd036e2d.q: What are the rooms and facilities like at The Rock Hua Hin Beachfront Spa Resort?
50d60879-228b-400d-b49d-e003cd036e2d.a: Rooms are spacious, stunning, and impeccably clean, with excellent facilities; the pool overlooks the beach beautifully, and guests enjoy a good breakfast spread and easy beach access for walks.

91a4a5fc-4e19-43e8-9ace-cc3095491499.a: Hotel Breiðdalsvík is in Breiðdalsvík, a quiet little town on Iceland's east side. It's a peaceful base for exploring the region, with scenic surroundings and convenient access to hiking and wildlife viewing.

Hotel Breiðdalsvík has a cosy score of 7.0/10. Guests describe it as very cosy, with comfortable beds, a welcoming atmosphere, and a lounge with complimentary coffee, tea, and a kettle—perfect for warming up after a long drive or hike.

91a4a5fc-4e19-43e8-9ace-cc3095491499.q: Is the staff at Hotel Breiðdalsvík friendly?
91a4a5fc-4e19-43e8-9ace-cc3095491499.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the staff as amazing, extremely helpful, and genuinely warm. They go out of their way to make guests feel special, offer local recommendations (including puffin-viewing spots), and respond promptly to requests.

91a4a5fc-4e19-43e8-9ace-cc3095491499.q: Is Hotel Breiðdalsvík good for a honeymoon?
91a4a5fc-4e19-43e8-9ace-cc3095491499.a: Absolutely. Multiple honeymoon guests have called their stays phenomenal, highlighting the incredible views, comfortable beds, attentive staff who made them feel special, and the peaceful setting away from touristy crowds.

91a4a5fc-4e19-43e8-9ace-cc3095491499.q: What facilities does Hotel Breiðdalsvík have?
91a4a5fc-4e19-43e8-9ace-cc3095491499.a: The hotel offers a sauna, bar, and restaurant. Guests praise the delicious food and recommend following the chef's suggestions. There's also a lounge with free hot drinks and a microwave for convenience.

91a4a5fc-4e19-43e8-9ace-cc3095491499.q: What do guests say about breakfast at Hotel Breiðdalsvík?
91a4a5fc-4e19-43e8-9ace-cc3095491499.a: Guests describe the breakfast as perfect and a great way to start the morning. The hotel staff are also generous with local advice, helping visitors plan their day's activities.

a2db4574-5f70-42e8-a9e4-d73e55ab1a83.q: Where is Garrya Tongsai Bay Samui located?
a2db4574-5f70-42e8-a9e4-d73e55ab1a83.a: Garrya Tongsai Bay Samui is situated in Koh Samui, Chang Wat Surat Thani, Thailand. The property sits on a stunning beachfront with expansive grounds, and guests praise the remarkable views and the fact that the pool sits right in front of the beach.

a2db4574-5f70-42e8-a9e4-d73e55ab1a83.q: How cosy is Garrya Tongsai Bay Samui?
a2db4574-5f70-42e8-a9e4-d73e55ab1a83.a: Garrya Tongsai Bay Samui has a cosy score of 7.0/10, reflecting its charming character. Guests note it has an exquisite charm partly because it was built nearly 40 years ago and recently renovated, giving it a distinctive personality rather than feeling like a modern resort.

a2db4574-5f70-42e8-a9e4-d73e55ab1a83.q: Is the service good at Garrya Tongsai Bay Samui?
a2db4574-5f70-42e8-a9e4-d73e55ab1a83.a: Yes, service is exceptional. Guests consistently highlight that the entire team—from front office and restaurant staff to buggy drivers and security—goes out of their way to make you feel genuinely welcomed, and staff often learn guests' names within days of arrival.

a2db4574-5f70-42e8-a9e4-d73e55ab1a83.q: What's the breakfast like at Garrya Tongsai Bay Samui?
a2db4574-5f70-42e8-a9e4-d73e55ab1a83.a: Breakfast is outstanding. One guest described it as perhaps the best breakfast spread they've ever had, and multiple reviewers praise both the quality and variety of the morning offerings.

a2db4574-5f70-42e8-a9e4-d73e55ab1a83.q: Does Garrya Tongsai Bay Samui have a spa?
a2db4574-5f70-42e8-a9e4-d73e55ab1a83.a: Yes, Garrya Tongsai Bay Samui has a spa on-site as part of its facilities.

a2db4574-5f70-42e8-a9e4-d73e55ab1a83.q: What do guests think of Garrya Tongsai Bay Samui overall?
a2db4574-5f70-42e8-a9e4-d73e55ab1a83.a: Guests rate it 4.7/5 from 817 reviews. Many describe their stay as exceptional and say they'd return; one couple noted they're already planning their third visit after falling in love with the property during their second stay.

6b9ced99-ae65-4ead-8759-e4d454845046.q: Where is Inn On The Twenty located?
6b9ced99-ae65-4ead-8759-e4d454845046.a: Inn On The Twenty is situated in Ontario's wine country at L0R 1S0, Canada, positioned outside the main bustle so you get a peaceful retreat whilst remaining close to local attractions and wineries.

6b9ced99-ae65-4ead-8759-e4d454845046.q: How cosy is Inn On The Twenty?
6b9ced99-ae65-4ead-8759-e4d454845046.a: Inn On The Twenty scores 8.0 out of 10 for cosiness, with guests consistently praising the warm, well-kept atmosphere and thoughtful touches like turndown service with rose petals and anniversary chocolates.

6b9ced99-ae65-4ead-8759-e4d454845046.q: Does Inn On The Twenty have a restaurant?
6b9ced99-ae65-4ead-8759-e4d454845046.a: Yes, the on-site restaurant serves excellent food with a gourmet breakfast menu available; guests recommend the breakfast package, which features dishes like perfectly poached eggs and salmon.

6b9ced99-ae65-4ead-8759-e4d454845046.q: What is the guest rating for Inn On The Twenty?
6b9ced99-ae65-4ead-8759-e4d454845046.a: Inn On The Twenty has a 4.6 out of 5 star rating from 798 guest reviews, reflecting consistently positive feedback about the rooms, service, and peaceful setting.

fef45635-82b9-45d4-8aa3-234a13d7ce45.q: Where is Castle House Hotel located?
fef45635-82b9-45d4-8aa3-234a13d7ce45.a: Castle House Hotel is in Hereford town centre, HR1 2NW, with a small car park less than a 2-minute walk away, making it convenient for exploring the shops and sights.

fef45635-82b9-45d4-8aa3-234a13d7ce45.a: Breakfast is highly rated, with guests calling it 'everything you want' — the traditional option is particularly popular and well-executed.

fef45635-82b9-45d4-8aa3-234a13d7ce45.q: What do guests say about the rooms at Castle House Hotel?

711e6227-29ab-49fc-9331-fbc8923dfb5a.q: What do guests say about the design and rooms at WIESERGUT Hotel?
711e6227-29ab-49fc-9331-fbc8923dfb5a.a: Guests rave about the beautiful alpine minimalist architecture and interior styling, with spacious, stylish rooms — some featuring fireplaces — that blend retained luxury with mountain aesthetics.

59078ef5-97d5-4da7-9fbd-f1a0c765e2d0.q: Where is Anantara Hoi An Resort located?
59078ef5-97d5-4da7-9fbd-f1a0c765e2d0.a: Anantara Hoi An Resort is in Quảng Nam, Vietnam, within walking distance of Hoi An's old town and positioned right on the river, offering guests easy access to local attractions and a tranquil riverside setting.

59078ef5-97d5-4da7-9fbd-f1a0c765e2d0.q: How cosy is Anantara Hoi An Resort?
59078ef5-97d5-4da7-9fbd-f1a0c765e2d0.a: The resort scores 6.3/10 for cosiness, reflecting a beautiful and well-designed property with spacious rooms and serene riverside views, though some guests note it's more of a contemporary resort experience than an intimate hideaway.

59078ef5-97d5-4da7-9fbd-f1a0c765e2d0.q: Is the service good at Anantara Hoi An Resort?
59078ef5-97d5-4da7-9fbd-f1a0c765e2d0.a: Yes—guests consistently praise the staff as exceptionally friendly, attentive and helpful, with team members going above and beyond from check-in through dining and activities; many reviews highlight specific staff members by name for their warmth and dedication.

59078ef5-97d5-4da7-9fbd-f1a0c765e2d0.q: What is breakfast like at Anantara Hoi An Resort?
59078ef5-97d5-4da7-9fbd-f1a0c765e2d0.a: Breakfast is a genuine highlight, with guests praising generous buffet offerings, excellent Vietnamese dishes, and plenty of vegetarian options that make for a strong start to each day.

59078ef5-97d5-4da7-9fbd-f1a0c765e2d0.q: Does Anantara Hoi An Resort have a spa?
59078ef5-97d5-4da7-9fbd-f1a0c765e2d0.a: Yes, the resort has a spa; guests have enjoyed treatments there, with one visitor particularly recommending the foot massage as a wonderful and rejuvenating experience.

59078ef5-97d5-4da7-9fbd-f1a0c765e2d0.q: What do guests say about the rooms at Anantara Hoi An Resort?
59078ef5-97d5-4da7-9fbd-f1a0c765e2d0.a: Rooms are spacious and clean with a nice large layout, and many feature beautiful riverside views that offer a tranquil morning atmosphere; the resort grounds themselves are also described as beautiful and well-designed.

b9b5cf25-d4fc-4497-ba34-f83abe1fb75d.q: Where is Cocoon Hôtel Belair located?
b9b5cf25-d4fc-4497-ba34-f83abe1fb75d.a: Cocoon Hôtel Belair is in Bourscheid-Moulin, Luxembourg, set in quiet surroundings away from the road with stunning scenic views over the valley and direct access to a stream.

b9b5cf25-d4fc-4497-ba34-f83abe1fb75d.q: How cosy is Cocoon Hôtel Belair?
b9b5cf25-d4fc-4497-ba34-f83abe1fb75d.a: The hotel scores 7.4 out of 10 for cosiness, with guests praising its character-filled rooms, lovely fireplace spot to warm up after hiking, and peaceful riverside setting.

b9b5cf25-d4fc-4497-ba34-f83abe1fb75d.q: What do guests say about the rooms at Cocoon Hôtel Belair?
b9b5cf25-d4fc-4497-ba34-f83abe1fb75d.a: Guests consistently praise the rooms as great and beautiful, with many highlighting the stunning valley views and nice showers; the hotel is also very welcoming to dogs.

b9b5cf25-d4fc-4497-ba34-f83abe1fb75d.q: Does Cocoon Hôtel Belair have a spa and sauna?
b9b5cf25-d4fc-4497-ba34-f83abe1fb75d.a: Yes, the hotel offers spa facilities including a sauna and two steam cabins, located about 400 metres from the main building, with water bottles and towels provided.

b9b5cf25-d4fc-4497-ba34-f83abe1fb75d.q: Is the restaurant and bar good at Cocoon Hôtel Belair?
b9b5cf25-d4fc-4497-ba34-f83abe1fb75d.a: The restaurant is a highlight for many guests, with dinner praised as great and the bar area featuring a lovely fireplace; breakfast is also good, though some felt dinner pricing didn't quite match the quality.

b9b5cf25-d4fc-4497-ba34-f83abe1fb75d.q: Is Cocoon Hôtel Belair good for a relaxing getaway?
b9b5cf25-d4fc-4497-ba34-f83abe1fb75d.a: With a 4.4 out of 5 rating from 819 guests, the hotel is excellent for a peaceful retreat, offering direct access to hiking trails, a riverside setting with swings, and warm, welcoming staff.

816145a1-7c71-429c-9e3a-2320bfd2d300.q: Where is Six Senses Fort Barwara located?
816145a1-7c71-429c-9e3a-2320bfd2d300.a: Six Senses Fort Barwara is in Rajasthan, India (postal code 322702). 816145a1-7c71-429c-9e3a-2320bfd2d300.q: How cosy is Six Senses Fort Barwara?
816145a1-7c71-429c-9e3a-2320bfd2d300.a: Six Senses Fort Barwara has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10, meaning it offers a comfortable, welcoming atmosphere without being intensely intimate—ideal if you prefer spacious, well-appointed surroundings over snug quarters.

816145a1-7c71-429c-9e3a-2320bfd2d300.q: Is the food good at Six Senses Fort Barwara?

816145a1-7c71-429c-9e3a-2320bfd2d300.q: Does Six Senses Fort Barwara have a spa?
816145a1-7c71-429c-9e3a-2320bfd2d300.a: Yes, it does. The spa experience is excellent, with guests particularly praising the quality of treatments and the skill of therapists like Ms Manisha, making it a highlight of stays at the property.

816145a1-7c71-429c-9e3a-2320bfd2d300.q: Is Six Senses Fort Barwara good for couples?
816145a1-7c71-429c-9e3a-2320bfd2d300.a: Absolutely. Couples report having a great time, with luxurious rooms, healthy food, quick room service, and romantic touches like candlelit dinners by the pool. Staff members go out of their way to arrange thoughtful, personalised experiences.

816145a1-7c71-429c-9e3a-2320bfd2d300.q: What do guests say about the service at Six Senses Fort Barwara?
816145a1-7c71-429c-9e3a-2320bfd2d300.a: Guests consistently praise the exceptional hospitality and attention to detail throughout their stay. eb22e738-1465-4904-989c-31308740019a.q: How cosy is Donna Camilla Savelli?

eb22e738-1465-4904-989c-31308740019a.q: Is Donna Camilla Savelli good for couples?
eb22e738-1465-4904-989c-31308740019a.a: Yes—guests have described stays here as absolutely magical for honeymoons, with the peaceful courtyard garden providing the perfect romantic retreat in the heart of Rome.

eb22e738-1465-4904-989c-31308740019a.q: What do guests say about the staff at Donna Camilla Savelli?
eb22e738-1465-4904-989c-31308740019a.a: Staff are consistently praised as gracious, extremely helpful, and genuinely going out of their way to accommodate guests; the concierge team in particular earns high marks for personal service.

eb22e738-1465-4904-989c-31308740019a.q: Does Donna Camilla Savelli have outdoor space?
eb22e738-1465-4904-989c-31308740019a.a: The hotel features a lovely courtyard garden where guests can enjoy breakfast, lunch, or cocktails in a peaceful setting—it's frequently mentioned as a favourite spot to relax.

eb22e738-1465-4904-989c-31308740019a.q: What is the guest rating for Donna Camilla Savelli?
eb22e738-1465-4904-989c-31308740019a.a: Donna Camilla Savelli holds a 4.6 out of 5 rating from 1,160 guest reviews, reflecting consistent praise for its historic charm, spacious rooms, and attentive service.

36a3b010-998c-43cb-b2db-8a5333f4df74.q: Where is Sidonia Castle Hotel located?
36a3b010-998c-43cb-b2db-8a5333f4df74.a: Sidonia Castle Hotel is situated in Röjtöki, Hungary, on the edge of a quiet village behind the church with its own parking. The setting features a well-kept park with tall, mature trees ideal for peaceful walks.

36a3b010-998c-43cb-b2db-8a5333f4df74.q: How cosy is Sidonia Castle Hotel?
36a3b010-998c-43cb-b2db-8a5333f4df74.a: Sidonia Castle Hotel scores 5.5 out of 10 for cosiness. Whilst guests praise its elegant, old-world atmosphere and spacious rooms, some note the building's age shows in places—though it remains warm and well-maintained overall.

36a3b010-998c-43cb-b2db-8a5333f4df74.q: Is Sidonia Castle Hotel good for couples?
36a3b010-998c-43cb-b2db-8a5333f4df74.a: Yes, it's highly regarded for romance. Guests describe it as 'really quiet and romantic' with a beautiful castle park, fine dining, and a relaxing spa—perfect for a romantic getaway or special weekend away.

36a3b010-998c-43cb-b2db-8a5333f4df74.q: What dining and leisure facilities does Sidonia Castle Hotel offer?

36a3b010-998c-43cb-b2db-8a5333f4df74.q: What do guests say about the staff at Sidonia Castle Hotel?
36a3b010-998c-43cb-b2db-8a5333f4df74.a: Staff receive consistent praise for being 'really kind and competent', polite, helpful, and available throughout guests' stays. Their warmth and attentiveness are highlighted across multiple reviews.

36a3b010-998c-43cb-b2db-8a5333f4df74.q: Is Sidonia Castle Hotel suitable for families?
36a3b010-998c-43cb-b2db-8a5333f4df74.a: Yes, families appreciate the range of activities including two pools, spa, sports facilities, and spacious rooms. One family of three found plenty to enjoy during their three-night stay, though dietary requirements may need advance notice.

68c8d575-277f-4ad0-ae87-b5bb9d38018b.q: Where is La Maison d'hôtes located?
68c8d575-277f-4ad0-ae87-b5bb9d38018b.a: La Maison d'hôtes is in Le Poujol-sur-Orb, a village in France ideal for cyclists and hikers, with easy access to the local greenway and beautiful regional walking routes.

68c8d575-277f-4ad0-ae87-b5bb9d38018b.q: How cosy is La Maison d'hôtes?
68c8d575-277f-4ad0-ae87-b5bb9d38018b.a: La Maison d'hôtes scores 7.7/10 for cosiness, offering a peaceful, well-decorated former convent with a charming interior garden and thoughtfully appointed rooms.

68c8d575-277f-4ad0-ae87-b5bb9d38018b.q: What is breakfast like at La Maison d'hôtes?
68c8d575-277f-4ad0-ae87-b5bb9d38018b.a: Breakfast is generous and homemade, featuring fresh bread, brioche, and house-made jams including a distinctive dandelion-flower preserve; guests consistently praise it as excellent and copious.

68c8d575-277f-4ad0-ae87-b5bb9d38018b.q: Is La Maison d'hôtes good for cyclists and outdoor enthusiasts?
68c8d575-277f-4ad0-ae87-b5bb9d38018b.a: Yes—it's perfectly positioned for the Véloccitanie cycling route and hiking, with a secure bike storage room inside the house and hosts Richard and Delphine who offer expert local advice on trails and activities.

68c8d575-277f-4ad0-ae87-b5bb9d38018b.q: What do guests say about the hosts and service at La Maison d'hôtes?
68c8d575-277f-4ad0-ae87-b5bb9d38018b.a: Guests consistently highlight the warm, attentive welcome from Richard and Delphine, who are passionate about the region and genuinely keen to help visitors feel at ease and plan their adventures.

68c8d575-277f-4ad0-ae87-b5bb9d38018b.q: What are the rooms like at La Maison d'hôtes?
68c8d575-277f-4ad0-ae87-b5bb9d38018b.a: Rooms are clean, comfortable, and well-equipped with plenty of power sockets; the suite d'antan features a particularly spacious bathroom and tasteful décor in keeping with the house's character.

aeda71ac-843f-4c5d-ba9e-686a545fd377.q: Where is Maison d'hôtes Au pré Carré located?
aeda71ac-843f-4c5d-ba9e-686a545fd377.a: Maison d'hôtes Au pré Carré is in Plumergat, a quiet rural village in France, ideally positioned on the Compostela pilgrimage routes for those seeking a peaceful countryside retreat.

aeda71ac-843f-4c5d-ba9e-686a545fd377.q: How cosy is Maison d'hôtes Au pré Carré?

aeda71ac-843f-4c5d-ba9e-686a545fd377.q: Is the breakfast good at Maison d'hôtes Au pré Carré?

aeda71ac-843f-4c5d-ba9e-686a545fd377.a: The owners, Françoise and Gérard, are warmly welcoming and attentive without being intrusive; guests return year after year for their genuine hospitality and willingness to help with local information.

aeda71ac-843f-4c5d-ba9e-686a545fd377.q: Does Maison d'hôtes Au pré Carré have a spa?
aeda71ac-843f-4c5d-ba9e-686a545fd377.a: Yes, the property has spa facilities including a hot tub bath, which guests describe as wonderful and a source of relaxation during their stay.

aeda71ac-843f-4c5d-ba9e-686a545fd377.q: What do guests think of Maison d'hôtes Au pré Carré overall?
aeda71ac-843f-4c5d-ba9e-686a545fd377.a: With a 4.8 out of 5 rating from 140 reviews, guests love the spotless rooms, comfortable beds, peaceful countryside setting, and attentive owners—though it's best suited to those seeking quiet relaxation rather than proximity to attractions.

5fbd74ad-98c7-46a5-b9e1-a497572cce1d.q: Where is Hotel La Gemma located?
5fbd74ad-98c7-46a5-b9e1-a497572cce1d.a: Hotel La Gemma is in Florence, Italy, positioned as a peaceful retreat just steps from the Duomo and the city's main shopping areas. Guests describe it as an oasis where the crowds fade away the moment you enter, with easy walking distance to shops, sights and restaurants.

5fbd74ad-98c7-46a5-b9e1-a497572cce1d.q: How cosy is Hotel La Gemma?
5fbd74ad-98c7-46a5-b9e1-a497572cce1d.a: Hotel La Gemma has a cosy score of 7.0 out of 10, reflecting its warm, intimate atmosphere. Guests consistently praise the thoughtfully curated details, attentive service, and the sense of genuine hospitality that makes the space feel refined and welcoming.

5fbd74ad-98c7-46a5-b9e1-a497572cce1d.q: Is Hotel La Gemma good for honeymooners?
5fbd74ad-98c7-46a5-b9e1-a497572cce1d.a: Yes—multiple guests have celebrated honeymoons here and described the experience as magical and unforgettable. 5fbd74ad-98c7-46a5-b9e1-a497572cce1d.q: What is the breakfast like at Hotel La Gemma?
5fbd74ad-98c7-46a5-b9e1-a497572cce1d.a: Breakfast is freshly made and delicious, with guests praising the quality of their morning coffees and the care taken in preparation. The hotel also offers thoughtful touches like welcome chocolate and small treats during turn-down service.

5fbd74ad-98c7-46a5-b9e1-a497572cce1d.q: What amenities does Hotel La Gemma have?
5fbd74ad-98c7-46a5-b9e1-a497572cce1d.a: Hotel La Gemma features a spa, restaurant, and cocktail bar on-site. The dining options are excellent, and guests appreciate having these facilities available without needing to venture far from the hotel.

5fbd74ad-98c7-46a5-b9e1-a497572cce1d.q: What do guests say about the rooms at Hotel La Gemma?
5fbd74ad-98c7-46a5-b9e1-a497572cce1d.a: Guests consistently describe the rooms and suites as spacious, clean, bright, and stunning. The property is well-appointed throughout, and the overall cleanliness and comfort of the accommodation receive high praise across reviews.

aab05139-299b-4da5-acbf-efdd95eb1511.a: Yes, Temps d'Or Hotel has a sauna on-site for guests to enjoy during their stay.

4b861d56-debd-49c6-b0dc-b56c17b01354.a: ERIKA Boutiquehotel Kitzbühel has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10, offering a warm, contemporary setting with thoughtfully designed spaces including a nice bar and seating areas.

4b861d56-debd-49c6-b0dc-b56c17b01354.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the breakfast and dinner at ERIKA Boutiquehotel Kitzbühel as excellent, with one visitor describing the food as outstanding and another noting it was brilliant enough to spend considerable time in the hotel restaurant.

4b861d56-debd-49c6-b0dc-b56c17b01354.q: What is the service like at ERIKA Boutiquehotel Kitzbühel?
4b861d56-debd-49c6-b0dc-b56c17b01354.a: The staff at ERIKA Boutiquehotel Kitzbühel are genuinely warm and attentive; guests highlight outstanding service, friendly employees throughout the hotel, and management that goes out of their way to look after visitors.

4b861d56-debd-49c6-b0dc-b56c17b01354.q: Does ERIKA Boutiquehotel Kitzbühel have a spa and pool?
4b861d56-debd-49c6-b0dc-b56c17b01354.a: Yes, ERIKA Boutiquehotel Kitzbühel features a spa, two fantastic pools, and a sauna, making it an excellent choice for relaxation and recreation.

4b861d56-debd-49c6-b0dc-b56c17b01354.q: What do guests think of ERIKA Boutiquehotel Kitzbühel overall?
4b861d56-debd-49c6-b0dc-b56c17b01354.a: ERIKA Boutiquehotel Kitzbühel is rated 4.7 out of 5 from 291 reviews, with guests praising its beautifully renovated, modern rooms, spacious accommodation, excellent amenities, and the wonderful atmosphere created by its staff and management.

ee0e7730-2623-48e1-bd35-5e1d99376160.q: Is Weinromantikhotel Richtershof good for couples?
ee0e7730-2623-48e1-bd35-5e1d99376160.a: Yes, it's an excellent choice for couples seeking romance. Guests consistently highlight the romantic décor, peaceful atmosphere, garden terrace, and extensive wine list, making it ideal for a romantic getaway in the Mosel valley.

ee0e7730-2623-48e1-bd35-5e1d99376160.a: The restaurant is a strong point, with guests praising excellent dishes, outstanding breakfast service, and a lovely garden terrace with an ample wine selection. However, some diners have found service inconsistent and pricing high for certain offerings.

ee0e7730-2623-48e1-bd35-5e1d99376160.q: Does Weinromantikhotel Richtershof have a spa?
ee0e7730-2623-48e1-bd35-5e1d99376160.a: Yes, the hotel has a spa on site, though some guests noted they didn't use it during warm weather visits; it may be worth enquiring about specific facilities when booking.

ee0e7730-2623-48e1-bd35-5e1d99376160.q: What do guests say about Weinromantikhotel Richtershof overall?
ee0e7730-2623-48e1-bd35-5e1d99376160.a: With a 4.6 out of 5 rating from 745 reviews, guests describe it as a gem in a historic building offering class without fuss, with very friendly staff and excellent breakfast—though a few have mentioned concerns about room temperature control in summer months.

483a4889-613d-41ac-9630-06385c4c1848.q: Where is Vedana Lagoon Resort & Spa Hue located?
483a4889-613d-41ac-9630-06385c4c1848.a: Vedana Lagoon Resort & Spa Hue is situated in Thành phố Huế, Vietnam, with a stunning lagoon-front setting that guests consistently praise for its serene and picturesque surroundings.

483a4889-613d-41ac-9630-06385c4c1848.q: How cosy is Vedana Lagoon Resort & Spa Hue?
483a4889-613d-41ac-9630-06385c4c1848.a: Vedana Lagoon Resort & Spa Hue scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness, offering a relaxed, peaceful atmosphere where guests describe the vibe as 'totally relax' with thoughtful privacy and a never-crowded feel even when fully booked.

483a4889-613d-41ac-9630-06385c4c1848.q: Is the service good at Vedana Lagoon Resort & Spa Hue?
483a4889-613d-41ac-9630-06385c4c1848.a: Yes—guests consistently highlight exceptional staff warmth and attentiveness. 483a4889-613d-41ac-9630-06385c4c1848.q: What's the breakfast like at Vedana Lagoon Resort & Spa Hue?
483a4889-613d-41ac-9630-06385c4c1848.a: The breakfast buffet is described as magnificent with many beautiful options, offering both Vietnamese and Western choices that guests rave about as a highlight of their stay.

483a4889-613d-41ac-9630-06385c4c1848.a: Yes, the resort offers over-the-water villas with huge layouts and stunning lagoon views—guests say the sunset views alone are worth booking one, and many recommend requesting the water pool villa experience.

4a5e40bb-f9d1-4d69-969b-1160cacd9d1d.q: Where is Hôtel Saint Hadelin located?

4a5e40bb-f9d1-4d69-969b-1160cacd9d1d.q: How cosy is Hôtel Saint Hadelin?

4a5e40bb-f9d1-4d69-969b-1160cacd9d1d.q: Is the breakfast good at Hôtel Saint Hadelin?

4a5e40bb-f9d1-4d69-969b-1160cacd9d1d.q: What's the service like at Hôtel Saint Hadelin?

4a5e40bb-f9d1-4d69-969b-1160cacd9d1d.a: Yes, the hotel has its own restaurant on-site. Guests praise the food as exceptional — describing it as 'to die for' — with highlights including a recommended lamb menu and excellent quality dishes.

4a5e40bb-f9d1-4d69-969b-1160cacd9d1d.q: What makes Hôtel Saint Hadelin special?
4a5e40bb-f9d1-4d69-969b-1160cacd9d1d.a: It's a family-owned, completely renovated historic building in one of Belgium's most beautiful villages. Guests appreciate the clean, comfortable rooms, friendly service, romantic views, and proximity to good local restaurants and hiking trails.

0a1b78cd-3bfe-4dd7-ba93-f61845761fa5.a: Yes—guests consistently praise the staff as exceptional and genuinely caring. They've been noted for going above and beyond, from assisting with unexpected situations to personalising service and remembering guests fondly years later.

0a1b78cd-3bfe-4dd7-ba93-f61845761fa5.q: Does The Oberoi Amarvilas, Agra have a spa?

0a1b78cd-3bfe-4dd7-ba93-f61845761fa5.q: Is The Oberoi Amarvilas, Agra good for couples?
0a1b78cd-3bfe-4dd7-ba93-f61845761fa5.a: Absolutely. Guests have celebrated anniversaries and special occasions here, praising the luxurious rooms, breathtaking Taj Mahal views from windows and terraces, and the staff's attentive, hospitable approach to making stays memorable.

0a1b78cd-3bfe-4dd7-ba93-f61845761fa5.q: What's the guest rating for The Oberoi Amarvilas, Agra?

0ca9a686-2271-4e42-acfa-a1ea17785c50.a: Relais Venezia is in the heart of Venice, just a 3–4 minute walk from St Mark's Square and all the major attractions. It sits on a charming side street, offering a quiet base whilst being seconds from the bustling city centre.

5ccaa792-db12-402e-9e07-c1564af94aee.q: What do guests say about the service at Crocus Gere Wine Hotel?
5ccaa792-db12-402e-9e07-c1564af94aee.a: With a 4.7/5 rating from 202 reviews, guests consistently commend the warm hospitality and attentive, friendly staff. They're known for going the extra mile—even preparing off-menu items for returning guests.

124caee1-b44c-49c3-a889-eeb472a9c2b5.q: Are the rooms clean and well-maintained at Autoline Motel and Apartments?

e327e823-15e7-4b67-a8ba-1cd4cde3ba62.q: How cosy is Vessel Hotel Campana Kyoto Gojo?

e327e823-15e7-4b67-a8ba-1cd4cde3ba62.q: Are the rooms clean at Vessel Hotel Campana Kyoto Gojo?

4db78597-0e9d-4452-9330-cf6cda50def8.q: Where is Stone Manor Boutique Inn located?

99e1903c-502a-4a23-a099-cea03b31ebe2.q: Is the breakfast good at Hotel Collodi?

99e1903c-502a-4a23-a099-cea03b31ebe2.a: Yes; its prime location next to major sights, shops and restaurants means you can walk to almost everything Florence has to offer, making it ideal for sightseeing and discovering the city on foot.

7772792f-00a6-4524-9bd8-6388c1fde0e2.a: Santhiya Koh Phangan Resort & Spa is situated on the east side of Koh Phangan island in Suratthani Province, Thailand, in a secluded area away from the main bustle of the island—perfect if you're after a peaceful retreat, though it's a fair drive from central attractions.

7772792f-00a6-4524-9bd8-6388c1fde0e2.q: How cosy is Santhiya Koh Phangan Resort & Spa?
7772792f-00a6-4524-9bd8-6388c1fde0e2.a: Santhiya Koh Phangan Resort & Spa scores 5.7 out of 10 for cosiness, suggesting it's a comfortable mid-range property rather than an intimate, snug hideaway—though guests do praise its thoughtfully designed villas and peaceful setting.

7772792f-00a6-4524-9bd8-6388c1fde0e2.q: What is the breakfast like at Santhiya Koh Phangan Resort & Spa?
7772792f-00a6-4524-9bd8-6388c1fde0e2.a: Guests consistently rave about the breakfast buffet, with multiple reviews calling it 'amazing' and 'genuinely good', and the resort also offers snacks available throughout the day.

7772792f-00a6-4524-9bd8-6388c1fde0e2.q: Is Santhiya Koh Phangan Resort & Spa good for couples?
7772792f-00a6-4524-9bd8-6388c1fde0e2.a: Yes—honeymooners and couples have had lovely stays here, particularly appreciating the secluded location, sea-view pool villas with private pools, and the range of facilities including the spa, pools, and peaceful atmosphere.

7772792f-00a6-4524-9bd8-6388c1fde0e2.q: What activities and facilities does Santhiya Koh Phangan Resort & Spa offer?
7772792f-00a6-4524-9bd8-6388c1fde0e2.a: The resort features a spa, gym, Muay Thai classes, yoga classes, multiple pools, and thoughtfully designed villas with sea views and private pools in some rooms.

7772792f-00a6-4524-9bd8-6388c1fde0e2.q: How is the service at Santhiya Koh Phangan Resort & Spa?
7772792f-00a6-4524-9bd8-6388c1fde0e2.a: Staff are consistently praised as 'very kind', 'friendly and welcoming', and 'amazing', with guests noting that room service and other services exceed expectations—though a few have mentioned the large team could be better trained in handling specific requests.

1437a32f-3449-4551-9610-9302dbca2cb4.q: Where is Number 11 Exclusive Guesthouse located?
1437a32f-3449-4551-9610-9302dbca2cb4.a: Number 11 is in Brugge, Belgium, situated on a quiet street just a short walk from the city centre and all the main sights. Guests consistently praise its perfect balance of peaceful surroundings and easy access to attractions like the Canal Tour and Belfry Tower.

1437a32f-3449-4551-9610-9302dbca2cb4.q: How cosy is Number 11 Exclusive Guesthouse?
1437a32f-3449-4551-9610-9302dbca2cb4.a: Number 11 scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness, offering a wonderfully warm and charming atmosphere. Guests describe it as full of character with thoughtful details, quality toiletries, ambient scents, and a genuinely homely feel that makes you feel at home immediately.

1437a32f-3449-4551-9610-9302dbca2cb4.q: What is breakfast like at Number 11 Exclusive Guesthouse?
1437a32f-3449-4551-9610-9302dbca2cb4.a: Breakfast at Number 11 is delicious and highly praised by guests, featuring hearty options that many describe as fantastic. The guesthouse does serve meat and egg-based dishes, so do let Astrid know in advance if you have dietary preferences.

1437a32f-3449-4551-9610-9302dbca2cb4.q: Is Number 11 Exclusive Guesthouse good for couples?
1437a32f-3449-4551-9610-9302dbca2cb4.a: Yes, Number 11 is excellent for couples seeking a romantic getaway. Guests have celebrated anniversaries and romantic trips here, enjoying spacious, comfortable rooms with quality beds, and the intimate, charming atmosphere throughout the guesthouse.

1437a32f-3449-4551-9610-9302dbca2cb4.q: What is the service like at Number 11 Exclusive Guesthouse?
1437a32f-3449-4551-9610-9302dbca2cb4.a: Service is outstanding, with Astrid, the owner, consistently praised as wonderfully welcoming, helpful, and kind. Guests say she goes above and beyond, offering local recommendations and creating such a warm experience that many return every few months.

1437a32f-3449-4551-9610-9302dbca2cb4.q: What are the rooms like at Number 11 Exclusive Guesthouse?
1437a32f-3449-4551-9610-9302dbca2cb4.a: Rooms are gorgeously styled, clean, and comfortable with quality furnishings and thoughtful touches throughout. Guests highlight spacious layouts, very comfortable beds, beautiful bathrooms with bathtubs, and charming details like windows opening onto the serene garden.

214df046-93ed-4fec-8751-f925e3aae5a4.a: Hiiragiya is situated in Nakahakusanchō in Kyoto, Japan, offering an authentic ryokan experience in the heart of the city.
Hiiragiya scores 8.0 out of 10 for cosiness, with guests consistently praising its peaceful, intimate atmosphere and beautiful traditional design across its historic and newer wings.

214df046-93ed-4fec-8751-f925e3aae5a4.q: Is Hiiragiya good for a special occasion or anniversary?
214df046-93ed-4fec-8751-f925e3aae5a4.a: Yes—guests have celebrated anniversaries and milestones here, with many describing it as deeply memorable and exceptional, thanks to thoughtful staff attention and the culturally authentic experience.

214df046-93ed-4fec-8751-f925e3aae5a4.q: What is the service like at Hiiragiya?
214df046-93ed-4fec-8751-f925e3aae5a4.a: The staff are genuinely attentive and caring, with guests highlighting their warmth, quiet professionalism, and willingness to fulfil requests; many staff members are remembered by name for their exceptional service.

214df046-93ed-4fec-8751-f925e3aae5a4.q: What meals are included at Hiiragiya?
214df046-93ed-4fec-8751-f925e3aae5a4.a: Hiiragiya offers exquisite kaiseki dinners and traditional Japanese breakfasts, thoughtfully prepared with seasonal Kyoto ingredients and beautifully presented.
Yes, rooms feature hot spring bathtubs, allowing guests to enjoy a relaxing soak as part of their authentic ryokan experience.

6ae0cbfc-311e-4c91-bb6b-847e4366b8fc.q: Where is Hôtel Notre Dame located?
6ae0cbfc-311e-4c91-bb6b-847e4366b8fc.a: Hôtel Notre Dame is in the heart of Brugge, Belgium, just a 10-minute walk from the Grote Markt and close to the abbey. Guests praise its central position, with everything from shops to tourist attractions within walking distance.

6ae0cbfc-311e-4c91-bb6b-847e4366b8fc.q: How cosy is Hôtel Notre Dame?
6ae0cbfc-311e-4c91-bb6b-847e4366b8fc.a: Hôtel Notre Dame has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10. It's a small, family-run hotel with charming, quirky character, though rooms are compact and the building is genuinely old, which adds charm but also means steep stairs and period features.

6ae0cbfc-311e-4c91-bb6b-847e4366b8fc.q: Is the breakfast good at Hôtel Notre Dame?
6ae0cbfc-311e-4c91-bb6b-847e4366b8fc.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the breakfast as a highlight—described as great with a wide variety of options and a delightful experience. It's one of the most frequently complimented aspects of a stay.

6ae0cbfc-311e-4c91-bb6b-847e4366b8fc.q: What's the staff like at Hôtel Notre Dame?
6ae0cbfc-311e-4c91-bb6b-847e4366b8fc.a: Guests describe the staff as very pleasant and polite. The hotel is family-run, and the owners are hands-on; they even run a neighbouring chocolate shop.

6ae0cbfc-311e-4c91-bb6b-847e4366b8fc.q: Is Hôtel Notre Dame good value for money?
6ae0cbfc-311e-4c91-bb6b-847e4366b8fc.a: At 4.0 out of 5 from 232 reviews, guests rate it as fair value for a budget choice. Rooms are very small and there's no air conditioning, but the location, friendly service, and breakfast help justify the price for short stays.

6ae0cbfc-311e-4c91-bb6b-847e4366b8fc.q: Does Hôtel Notre Dame have a fireplace?
6ae0cbfc-311e-4c91-bb6b-847e4366b8fc.a: Yes, the hotel features a fireplace, adding to its cosy, characterful atmosphere.

7e1669bb-d3e6-4459-bd7d-776e242644dd.q: Where is B&B Calcio Storico located?
7e1669bb-d3e6-4459-bd7d-776e242644dd.a: B&B Calcio Storico is in Florence, Italy, in a quiet neighbourhood about 10–15 minutes' walk from the city centre. It's conveniently positioned near good-value bars and restaurants, and within reach of Florence's main attractions.

7e1669bb-d3e6-4459-bd7d-776e242644dd.q: How cosy is B&B Calcio Storico?
7e1669bb-d3e6-4459-bd7d-776e242644dd.a: B&B Calcio Storico has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10. Guests describe it as a simple, authentic Italian-style home with clean, basic rooms—comfortable for a B&B, with everything you need without unnecessary frills.

7e1669bb-d3e6-4459-bd7d-776e242644dd.q: What is the host Marco like at B&B Calcio Storico?
7e1669bb-d3e6-4459-bd7d-776e242644dd.a: Marco is consistently praised as a warm, friendly, and exceptionally helpful host. He greets guests with a city map, explains how to reach attractions and restaurants, responds quickly to messages, and offers practical tips for exploring Florence—guests describe him as amazing and kind.

7e1669bb-d3e6-4459-bd7d-776e242644dd.q: Is breakfast provided at B&B Calcio Storico?
7e1669bb-d3e6-4459-bd7d-776e242644dd.a: Breakfast is served at a nearby, authentic local café rather than on-site. Guests have found the food delicious and the experience genuinely local to Florence.

7e1669bb-d3e6-4459-bd7d-776e242644dd.q: What amenities does B&B Calcio Storico offer?
7e1669bb-d3e6-4459-bd7d-776e242644dd.a: Rooms are clean and spacious with en-suite bathrooms. The B&B has a shared kitchen available for guests' use, and Marco arranges affordable covered parking—a rare and good-value option compared to typical Florence parking rates.

7e1669bb-d3e6-4459-bd7d-776e242644dd.q: Is B&B Calcio Storico good value for money?
7e1669bb-d3e6-4459-bd7d-776e242644dd.a: Yes—guests consistently highlight excellent value, praising the price-to-quality ratio. Combined with Marco's generous local knowledge and recommendations, visitors feel they've found one of the best-value accommodations in Florence.

30e1fc75-7492-4c3c-8ff6-dced76d7a3b3.a: Landgasthof Rössli is in Adligenswil, Switzerland, just 15 minutes by bus (No. 73) from Lucerne train station, making it convenient for exploring the region while staying in a quieter setting.
Landgasthof Rössli scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness, with guests consistently praising its rustic charm, historic character dating back to 1772, and warm, welcoming atmosphere.

30e1fc75-7492-4c3c-8ff6-dced76d7a3b3.q: Is the food good at Landgasthof Rössli?
30e1fc75-7492-4c3c-8ff6-dced76d7a3b3.a: Yes—guests rave about the restaurant's quality and taste, with particular praise for the rosti and other Swiss dishes. One visitor called it 'probably one of the best restaurants I ever visited in Switzerland,' and the staff are noted as efficient, friendly, and attentive.

30e1fc75-7492-4c3c-8ff6-dced76d7a3b3.q: What is the service like at Landgasthof Rössli?
30e1fc75-7492-4c3c-8ff6-dced76d7a3b3.a: The owners and staff are exceptionally warm and welcoming, going out of their way to help guests—from providing converters to assisting with train station transfers. Guests consistently highlight the friendly, professional, and attentive service.

30e1fc75-7492-4c3c-8ff6-dced76d7a3b3.q: Is breakfast good at Landgasthof Rössli?
30e1fc75-7492-4c3c-8ff6-dced76d7a3b3.a: Breakfast is a genuine highlight, with multiple guests calling it 'fantastic' and praising the quality and variety, including a distinctive honey-flavoured jam that guests remember fondly.

30e1fc75-7492-4c3c-8ff6-dced76d7a3b3.q: What should I know before booking Landgasthof Rössli?
30e1fc75-7492-4c3c-8ff6-dced76d7a3b3.a: It's a historic building with real character but no lift, so be aware if you have mobility concerns. Rooms are spotless and comfortable with good views, though some have limited privacy between the bathroom and main room.

8c9d0a34-662f-44b9-a305-be8c2332cc2f.a: Seminarhotel Romerohaus is in Luzern, Switzerland, about a 20-minute walk from the town centre and very close to the bus station. You can reach downtown by following the lake for roughly 30 minutes on foot.
Seminarhotel Romerohaus has a cosy score of 6.0 out of 10, reflecting a comfortable but fairly straightforward, functional atmosphere suited to seminar groups and budget-conscious travellers.

8c9d0a34-662f-44b9-a305-be8c2332cc2f.q: Is the staff friendly at Seminarhotel Romerohaus?
8c9d0a34-662f-44b9-a305-be8c2332cc2f.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the staff as friendly, welcoming and helpful. Many noted smooth check-in experiences and genuine hospitality throughout their stay.

8c9d0a34-662f-44b9-a305-be8c2332cc2f.q: What is breakfast like at Seminarhotel Romerohaus?
8c9d0a34-662f-44b9-a305-be8c2332cc2f.a: Breakfast is available (charged additionally) and guests describe it as fresh, varied and decent, though opinions on value differ. The hotel also offers complimentary sparkling water and coffee.

8c9d0a34-662f-44b9-a305-be8c2332cc2f.q: Does Seminarhotel Romerohaus have a spa?
8c9d0a34-662f-44b9-a305-be8c2332cc2f.a: Yes, Seminarhotel Romerohaus has both a spa and onsen facilities available for guests.

8c9d0a34-662f-44b9-a305-be8c2332cc2f.q: Are the rooms spacious at Seminarhotel Romerohaus?
8c9d0a34-662f-44b9-a305-be8c2332cc2f.a: Guest reviews confirm the rooms are spacious and comfortable with decent beds, though some note that basic in-room amenities like kettles or microwaves are lacking, and noise from hallways and stairwells can be an issue.

de14a08a-2092-4f65-92e8-d583ac3bfb05.q: Where is Tre Gigli located in Florence?
de14a08a-2092-4f65-92e8-d583ac3bfb05.a: Tre Gigli is just a 5-minute walk from Florence's main train station, with excellent access to local public transport. It's close enough to major tourist sites (about 15 minutes on foot) yet tucked away in a peaceful spot away from the busiest crowds.

Tre Gigli has a cosy score of 7.7/10. Guests consistently describe their rooms as very cosy, comfortable, and well-furnished, with one noting it felt like staying in an Italian grandmother's home—complete with little snacks scattered throughout.

de14a08a-2092-4f65-92e8-d583ac3bfb05.q: What is the host at Tre Gigli like?
de14a08a-2092-4f65-92e8-d583ac3bfb05.a: Fernanda, the host, is warmly praised by guests as welcoming, helpful, and genuinely interested in your experience. She provides detailed local recommendations, checks in on guests throughout their stay, and is quick to respond on WhatsApp with tips about the real Florence beyond the tourist trail.
Yes, Tre Gigli provides self-serve continental breakfast items that are accessible any time of day, so you can eat at your own pace during your stay.

de14a08a-2092-4f65-92e8-d583ac3bfb05.q: Is Tre Gigli good for exploring Florence?
de14a08a-2092-4f65-92e8-d583ac3bfb05.a: Absolutely. Guests love its location for accessing both the train station and local attractions within walking distance. Fernanda's insider knowledge of Florence—including hidden gems and local stories—makes it an ideal base for discovering the authentic city beyond typical tourist spots.

7018313b-3db9-463a-9185-0034ddb2c7a6.q: Where is Hotel Resol Trinity Kyoto located?
7018313b-3db9-463a-9185-0034ddb2c7a6.a: Hotel Resol Trinity Kyoto is in Kamihakusanchō, central Kyoto, within walking distance of Kyoto Market, temples, the river, and shops. Guests consistently praise how convenient the location is for exploring the city on foot.

7018313b-3db9-463a-9185-0034ddb2c7a6.q: How cosy is Hotel Resol Trinity Kyoto?
7018313b-3db9-463a-9185-0034ddb2c7a6.a: Hotel Resol Trinity Kyoto scores 8.0/10 for cosiness. Guests describe it as feeling cosy and stylish with a calm, modern atmosphere and soft, relaxed design that makes stays comfortable.

7018313b-3db9-463a-9185-0034ddb2c7a6.q: Does Hotel Resol Trinity Kyoto have an onsen?
7018313b-3db9-463a-9185-0034ddb2c7a6.a: Yes, Hotel Resol Trinity Kyoto includes a small onsen (separate facilities for men and women) in the room rate. Guests love it for relaxing and warming up after long days of exploring the city.

7018313b-3db9-463a-9185-0034ddb2c7a6.q: What is the service like at Hotel Resol Trinity Kyoto?
7018313b-3db9-463a-9185-0034ddb2c7a6.a: Staff are consistently described as kind, friendly and welcoming. The hotel also features a cafe with diverse food options and occasionally hosts daily Geisha performances in the afternoon.

7018313b-3db9-463a-9185-0034ddb2c7a6.q: Are the rooms spacious at Hotel Resol Trinity Kyoto?
7018313b-3db9-463a-9185-0034ddb2c7a6.a: Guests note that rooms are furnished beautifully with spacious beds and traditional Japanese interior—a pleasant contrast to typical Japanese hotels. The modern decor and clean rooms contribute to a comfortable stay.

7018313b-3db9-463a-9185-0034ddb2c7a6.q: What is the guest rating for Hotel Resol Trinity Kyoto?
7018313b-3db9-463a-9185-0034ddb2c7a6.a: Hotel Resol Trinity Kyoto has a 4.3/5 guest rating based on 1,158 reviews, reflecting generally positive feedback about its location, atmosphere and amenities.

acf69d79-8451-4f63-80f7-a4926a1e770e.q: Where is Hotel Banks Mansion located?
acf69d79-8451-4f63-80f7-a4926a1e770e.a: Hotel Banks Mansion is in Amsterdam, Netherlands, in a central location within easy walking distance of the city's main attractions.

acf69d79-8451-4f63-80f7-a4926a1e770e.q: What makes Hotel Banks Mansion cosy?
acf69d79-8451-4f63-80f7-a4926a1e770e.a: Hotel Banks Mansion scores 7.0/10 for cosiness, with guests praising its intimate atmosphere, converted mansion charm, comfortable beds, quiet rooms, and welcoming lobby that feels like a living room.

acf69d79-8451-4f63-80f7-a4926a1e770e.q: Is breakfast good at Hotel Banks Mansion?
acf69d79-8451-4f63-80f7-a4926a1e770e.a: Yes—breakfast is included and genuinely excellent. Guests rave about the cooked-to-order options like pancakes, omelettes, and scrambled eggs prepared in front of you, plus fresh pastries.

acf69d79-8451-4f63-80f7-a4926a1e770e.q: What's included in the room at Hotel Banks Mansion?
acf69d79-8451-4f63-80f7-a4926a1e770e.a: Each room comes with a free, stocked minibar, and you have access to the 24/7 self-serve bar with free drinks, mixers, and snacks throughout the day—an all-inclusive concept guests find genuinely unique.

acf69d79-8451-4f63-80f7-a4926a1e770e.q: Is the staff friendly at Hotel Banks Mansion?
acf69d79-8451-4f63-80f7-a4926a1e770e.a: Staff are consistently praised as attentive, thoughtful, and genuinely warm without being fussy—from remembering dietary needs at breakfast to crafting custom cheese plates and making guests feel genuinely welcome.

acf69d79-8451-4f63-80f7-a4926a1e770e.q: Is Hotel Banks Mansion good for a relaxing stay?
acf69d79-8451-4f63-80f7-a4926a1e770e.a: Yes. Guests highlight the peaceful rooms, soft beds, the cosy lobby bar where people actually want to linger, and the unhurried, welcoming atmosphere that makes it feel more like staying with friends than in a traditional hotel.

54ad667e-ddb5-4d3e-b5b0-ac218824f03f.q: Where is Suites at Fisherman's Wharf located?
54ad667e-ddb5-4d3e-b5b0-ac218824f03f.a: Suites at Fisherman's Wharf is in San Francisco, right at Fisherman's Wharf with easy walking access to Ghirardelli, Pier 39, and the entire waterfront. You'll find cable car and bus stops directly outside, making it simple to explore the city.

54ad667e-ddb5-4d3e-b5b0-ac218824f03f.q: How cosy is Suites at Fisherman's Wharf?
54ad667e-ddb5-4d3e-b5b0-ac218824f03f.a: The hotel scores 5.7 out of 10 for cosiness, striking a balance between feeling intimate and spacious—guests consistently praise the roomy suites that don't feel cramped, with well-equipped kitchens that make you feel at home rather than confined.

54ad667e-ddb5-4d3e-b5b0-ac218824f03f.q: Is Suites at Fisherman's Wharf good for families or longer stays?
54ad667e-ddb5-4d3e-b5b0-ac218824f03f.a: Yes, it's excellent for both. The spacious one-bedroom suites come with full kitchens and laundry facilities, so families and guests staying multiple nights can prepare meals in-room and handle their own washing—guests say this saves considerably on dining costs.

54ad667e-ddb5-4d3e-b5b0-ac218824f03f.q: What do guests say about the rooms at Suites at Fisherman's Wharf?
54ad667e-ddb5-4d3e-b5b0-ac218824f03f.a: Guests consistently highlight that rooms are very spacious, clean, and well-appointed with quality kitchenware and upscale toiletries. Beds are comfortable with plenty of space, and the overall condition is modern and updated.

54ad667e-ddb5-4d3e-b5b0-ac218824f03f.q: Does Suites at Fisherman's Wharf have good views?
54ad667e-ddb5-4d3e-b5b0-ac218824f03f.a: Yes—the rooftop offers beautiful views of the Golden Gate Bridge, Alcatraz, and the bay on clear days, and guests love it as a spot to relax and take in the scenery.

54ad667e-ddb5-4d3e-b5b0-ac218824f03f.q: How is the service at Suites at Fisherman's Wharf?
54ad667e-ddb5-4d3e-b5b0-ac218824f03f.a: Staff receive consistent praise for being super friendly, helpful, and welcoming from the moment you arrive. The hotel also hosts guest mixers, adding to the warm, hospitable atmosphere.

562d1184-7840-4f7a-a2f6-851b1630d9c8.a: Nikolas Hotel is in Karterados, a traditional village on Santorini, about a 20-minute walk from Fira. It's conveniently close to bus stops, restaurants, a mini-market, and a bakery, making it peaceful yet well-connected for exploring the island.

Nikolas Hotel scores 7.2 out of 10 for cosiness, with guests praising the spacious, tastefully decorated rooms, comfortable beds, and a nice pool area—ideal if you're after a relaxing retreat away from busier areas.

562d1184-7840-4f7a-a2f6-851b1630d9c8.q: What do guests say about the staff at Nikolas Hotel?
562d1184-7840-4f7a-a2f6-851b1630d9c8.a: Staff at Nikolas Hotel are consistently praised as kind, helpful, and going above and beyond—guests highlight their excellent tips, attentiveness, and willingness to arrange special requests like private hot-tub access at the spa.

562d1184-7840-4f7a-a2f6-851b1630d9c8.q: Is breakfast good at Nikolas Hotel?
562d1184-7840-4f7a-a2f6-851b1630d9c8.a: Breakfast is described as nice and filling, though some guests felt it could offer more variety. It's a solid start to the day, though portions are generous enough that some guests felt a bit guilty asking for more.

562d1184-7840-4f7a-a2f6-851b1630d9c8.q: Does Nikolas Hotel have a pool?
562d1184-7840-4f7a-a2f6-851b1630d9c8.a: Yes, Nikolas Hotel has a pool area that guests find nice and cosy, with many rooms offering pool views. Note that pool hours are 10am–3pm and 5pm–sunset, so early swimmers may find the schedule limiting.

562d1184-7840-4f7a-a2f6-851b1630d9c8.q: What's the guest rating for Nikolas Hotel?
562d1184-7840-4f7a-a2f6-851b1630d9c8.a: Nikolas Hotel has a 4.3 out of 5 rating based on 290 guest reviews, reflecting consistently positive feedback about cleanliness, comfort, staff warmth, and its convenient location on Santorini.

317f6b4e-7ea2-48e7-89d0-74d5961771fd.q: Where is McCrae's B&B located in Edinburgh?
317f6b4e-7ea2-48e7-89d0-74d5961771fd.a: McCrae's B&B sits on a quiet cobbled street just outside the main hustle of Edinburgh's city centre, within easy walking distance (20–30 minutes) of the centre, bars, restaurants and attractions. Guests consistently praise its peaceful setting whilst remaining close to everything.

McCrae's B&B scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness. Guests describe the rooms as spotless, tastefully decorated, and genuinely cosy, with comfortable beds and lovely bedding that make for a perfect retreat after exploring the city.

317f6b4e-7ea2-48e7-89d0-74d5961771fd.q: What is the breakfast like at McCrae's B&B?
317f6b4e-7ea2-48e7-89d0-74d5961771fd.a: Breakfast is a genuine highlight at McCrae's B&B, with guests raving about the quality and variety of options. The English muffin with eggs and bacon comes especially recommended, and John offers good breakfast choices to suit different tastes.

317f6b4e-7ea2-48e7-89d0-74d5961771fd.q: Is McCrae's B&B good for couples?
317f6b4e-7ea2-48e7-89d0-74d5961771fd.a: Yes—multiple guests have stayed for mini moons and anniversaries, describing it as the perfect romantic retreat. The spacious rooms, comfortable beds, welcoming atmosphere and peaceful location make it ideal for couples looking for a special break.

317f6b4e-7ea2-48e7-89d0-74d5961771fd.q: What is the hospitality like at McCrae's B&B?
317f6b4e-7ea2-48e7-89d0-74d5961771fd.a: The host, John, is consistently praised as warm, welcoming and genuinely hospitable. Guests feel at home from arrival, with John going above and beyond to make stays memorable and ensuring guests have everything they need, including access to a communal lounge area.

317f6b4e-7ea2-48e7-89d0-74d5961771fd.q: What amenities does McCrae's B&B offer?
317f6b4e-7ea2-48e7-89d0-74d5961771fd.a: Rooms are well appointed and spacious, with plenty of tea and coffee, towels, toiletries, hot drinks, TV, and access to a communal lounge area. Everything is kept spotless and thoughtfully stocked for a comfortable stay.
