bdb8bd23-ada5-416a-9d18-5fb061bd19d2.q: Is B&B de la Fontaine good for couples?

bdb8bd23-ada5-416a-9d18-5fb061bd19d2.q: What do guests say about the host at B&B de la Fontaine?

bdb8bd23-ada5-416a-9d18-5fb061bd19d2.q: What should I know about the rooms at B&B de la Fontaine?
bdb8bd23-ada5-416a-9d18-5fb061bd19d2.a: Rooms are small but clean, full of character, and equipped with a bathtub and air conditioning. Guests note that bathrooms are compact and can be tricky to navigate, and some rooms feature nice extras like a covered balcony.

d05b0c12-48e9-4c64-a969-1922bab89953.a: Yes, Kailasha – The Himalayan Village offers a spa facility as part of its amenities for guests seeking relaxation and wellness.

d05b0c12-48e9-4c64-a969-1922bab89953.q: What is the guest rating for Kailasha – The Himalayan Village?

1891ed69-d674-477b-aa8e-9f9b57c11f7c.q: Is the food good at Establishment Hotel?

1891ed69-d674-477b-aa8e-9f9b57c11f7c.q: What do guests rate Establishment Hotel overall?
1891ed69-d674-477b-aa8e-9f9b57c11f7c.a: Establishment Hotel has a 4.2 out of 5 rating from 1,789 guest reviews, with particular praise for its heritage charm, spacious rooms and attentive service.

dcdd9694-e238-4598-b6a7-1f3b1447d896.q: What is the service like at Asadaya Ryokan Inn?

e7b980be-d3a8-4209-be0e-fcad48c80bb4.a: Hotel Waldegg is in Horw, a quiet village just outside Lucerne, Switzerland. It's about a 10-minute train or short bus ride to Lucerne town centre, making it convenient for exploring the city whilst enjoying a peaceful setting.

e7b980be-d3a8-4209-be0e-fcad48c80bb4.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the breakfast. It features a decent spread of breads, spreads, eggs, meats and cereals, with several reviewers noting it's of good quality and above what you'd expect for the category.

e7b980be-d3a8-4209-be0e-fcad48c80bb4.a: Hotel Waldegg offers free on-site parking in the inner courtyard, which guests appreciate—especially useful if you're exploring the region by car.

e7b980be-d3a8-4209-be0e-fcad48c80bb4.a: Hotel Waldegg works well for business trips, particularly if you have a car. Rooms are clean and spacious by European standards, with good air conditioning, reliable check-in, and free parking on site.

e7b980be-d3a8-4209-be0e-fcad48c80bb4.q: What's the service like at Hotel Waldegg?
e7b980be-d3a8-4209-be0e-fcad48c80bb4.a: Service quality is mixed according to reviews. Some guests report very polite and helpful staff, whilst others have experienced poor check-in assistance and booking cancellations, so experiences vary considerably.

7bb5c1ac-4264-419b-9761-52a88f3f7c1a.q: What is the guest rating for Toshiharu Ryokan?
7bb5c1ac-4264-419b-9761-52a88f3f7c1a.a: Toshiharu Ryokan holds a 4.9 out of 5 star rating based on 160 guest reviews. Visitors consistently praise it as one of their favourite stays, with many calling it a joyous and memorable experience they plan to return to.

7bb5c1ac-4264-419b-9761-52a88f3f7c1a.q: Is Toshiharu Ryokan good for couples?
7bb5c1ac-4264-419b-9761-52a88f3f7c1a.a: Yes, couples find Toshiharu Ryokan exceptional. Guests describe it as offering one of their most joyous and memorable experiences together, with the warm hospitality, historic atmosphere, and private onsens creating a deeply romantic and relaxing retreat.

7bb5c1ac-4264-419b-9761-52a88f3f7c1a.q: What is the hospitality like at Toshiharu Ryokan?
7bb5c1ac-4264-419b-9761-52a88f3f7c1a.a: The staff at Toshiharu Ryokan are renowned for their gracious, warm and sincere hospitality. Guests highlight their helpfulness without being overbearing—from making dinner recommendations to assisting with reservations—creating a genuinely welcoming experience.

7bb5c1ac-4264-419b-9761-52a88f3f7c1a.q: Does Toshiharu Ryokan have a garden?

a05899d9-64a5-4d13-aee1-09918c97016c.q: Is the service good at The Majestic Hotel Santorini?
a05899d9-64a5-4d13-aee1-09918c97016c.a: Yes — guests consistently praise the staff for being exceptionally attentive and warm. Manager Mrs. Tzanou and server Amin are particularly highlighted for their genuine care, helpfulness, and ability to make guests feel truly valued during their stay.

a05899d9-64a5-4d13-aee1-09918c97016c.a: The restaurant serves excellent food with attentive service; guests rave about the quality of dinners and the staff's willingness to make recommendations and create memorable dining experiences.

a05899d9-64a5-4d13-aee1-09918c97016c.a: Yes — families appreciate the spacious rooms (suitable for four), two pools with plenty of sun beds, daily housekeeping, comfortable beds, and helpful staff like lifeguard Nikios who go the extra mile.

74a8d306-7d9c-4458-9cb9-981aba99720a.q: Is Residenza Gambrinus good for couples?

65c9f962-6342-400b-af9e-8f0033cb573c.q: How cosy is Junjungan Ubud Hotel & Spa?

f3ddbbe1-e091-4f81-a4a1-9c57031754bd.a: Guests rave about the staff's exceptional warmth and helpfulness, with particular praise for their willingness to accommodate early check-ins, answer questions, suggest local attractions, and go the extra mile to make visitors feel genuinely welcome.

f3ddbbe1-e091-4f81-a4a1-9c57031754bd.q: Are the rooms clean and comfortable at The Liberty Boutique Hotel?
f3ddbbe1-e091-4f81-a4a1-9c57031754bd.a: Yes, guests consistently note that rooms are very clean, spacious, and comfortable with firm beds, good shower pressure, daily servicing, and all the conveniences you'd need like a refrigerator and kettle.

49867119-52d9-409e-b52d-19ded7e63ae1.q: Where is Hotel Kraft located in Florence?
49867119-52d9-409e-b52d-19ded7e63ae1.a: Hotel Kraft sits in a quiet neighbourhood a pleasant walk from Florence's heart, offering an ideal balance between easy access to the city's attractions and peaceful distance from crowds and noise.
Hotel Kraft has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10, reflecting a comfortable, well-maintained boutique property with warm hospitality rather than luxury indulgence.

49867119-52d9-409e-b52d-19ded7e63ae1.q: Is the breakfast good at Hotel Kraft?
49867119-52d9-409e-b52d-19ded7e63ae1.a: Yes—guests consistently praise the breakfast for its spectacular variety and quality, and it's best enjoyed on the rooftop patio with views over the city.

49867119-52d9-409e-b52d-19ded7e63ae1.q: Is Hotel Kraft good for couples?
49867119-52d9-409e-b52d-19ded7e63ae1.a: Absolutely. Guests on romantic breaks and honeymoons have loved it here; the staff are known for going above and beyond, and the rooftop restaurant and pool create a lovely atmosphere for two.

49867119-52d9-409e-b52d-19ded7e63ae1.q: What's the service like at Hotel Kraft?
49867119-52d9-409e-b52d-19ded7e63ae1.a: Staff are exceptionally polite, helpful, and genuinely attentive—guests regularly mention how the team made them feel welcomed and took time to assist with questions, even for families with children.

49867119-52d9-409e-b52d-19ded7e63ae1.q: Are the rooms at Hotel Kraft comfortable?
49867119-52d9-409e-b52d-19ded7e63ae1.a: Yes, rooms are spacious, well-appointed, and impeccably clean, with thoughtful touches like high ceilings, balconies, and luxurious Italian linens that guests have praised for delivering excellent sleep.

f0585efa-86f0-44ae-8ab8-8c883d431e96.q: Where is Alloggi Barbaria located in Venice?
f0585efa-86f0-44ae-8ab8-8c883d431e96.a: Alloggi Barbaria sits in a quiet residential neighbourhood just steps from San Marco, roughly a 30-minute walk or 10-minute water bus ride from the train station. Guests praise its calm, authentic Venetian setting away from the noisier tourist areas, yet close enough to reach the main sights easily.

Alloggi Barbaria scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness—a genuinely comfortable, intimate boutique property that feels more like staying with gracious friends than a formal hotel, with clean, spacious rooms and thoughtful touches like a book exchange corner.

f0585efa-86f0-44ae-8ab8-8c883d431e96.q: What is the service like at Alloggi Barbaria?
f0585efa-86f0-44ae-8ab8-8c883d431e96.a: Guests consistently praise the owners and staff for their warmth and helpfulness. They go out of their way to assist—offering directions to San Marco, dining recommendations, and even coordinating special occasions—creating an exceptionally welcoming atmosphere.

f0585efa-86f0-44ae-8ab8-8c883d431e96.q: Is breakfast good at Alloggi Barbaria?
f0585efa-86f0-44ae-8ab8-8c883d431e96.a: Breakfast is simple but well-regarded, with guests particularly noting the excellent coffee and the calm, pleasant way it sets up your day before exploring the city. It's included with your stay, along with a fridge stocked with optional drinks.

f0585efa-86f0-44ae-8ab8-8c883d431e96.q: Are the rooms comfortable at Alloggi Barbaria?
f0585efa-86f0-44ae-8ab8-8c883d431e96.a: Yes—guests consistently highlight clean, spacious, comfortable rooms with hot showers, working air-conditioning, and useful amenities like a hair dryer and mini-fridge. The beds are very comfortable and the property maintains high cleanliness standards throughout.

f0585efa-86f0-44ae-8ab8-8c883d431e96.q: Is Alloggi Barbaria good value for money?
f0585efa-86f0-44ae-8ab8-8c883d431e96.a: Guests describe it as an accessible, good-value choice that includes breakfast and basic amenities, offering authentic Venetian hospitality without unnecessary frills—ideal if you're coming to Venice to explore rather than stay in luxury.

f6aecd4e-aee1-4b26-9869-4962420fa2a4.a: Linden is situated in the charming Jordaan neighbourhood of Amsterdam, close to Amsterdam Centraal train station and within easy walking distance of the city centre. The area is notably calm and quiet, with lovely canals and independent cafés nearby, yet still accessible to Amsterdam's main attractions.

f6aecd4e-aee1-4b26-9869-4962420fa2a4.q: What is the cosy score for Linden Hotel?
f6aecd4e-aee1-4b26-9869-4962420fa2a4.a: Linden has a cosy score of 7.0 out of 10, reflecting a warm and intimate atmosphere that guests consistently praise for its welcoming character.

f6aecd4e-aee1-4b26-9869-4962420fa2a4.q: Is the service good at Linden Hotel?
f6aecd4e-aee1-4b26-9869-4962420fa2a4.a: Yes, guests repeatedly highlight the staff's exceptional kindness and attention to detail. They're known for going the extra mile—from offering complimentary coffee to surprising honeymooners with champagne and providing thoughtful parting gift bags.

f6aecd4e-aee1-4b26-9869-4962420fa2a4.q: Are the rooms at Linden Hotel comfortable?
f6aecd4e-aee1-4b26-9869-4962420fa2a4.a: Rooms are small but well-proportioned and very clean, with guests noting they're not cramped despite the compact size. Bathrooms are equally clean and well-maintained.

f6aecd4e-aee1-4b26-9869-4962420fa2a4.q: Is there breakfast available at Linden Hotel?
f6aecd4e-aee1-4b26-9869-4962420fa2a4.a: Linden has a lovely café next door that serves excellent breakfasts, and the hotel also offers a free coffee machine in a communal space for guests to enjoy.

8cfc0191-69d5-4d01-a209-45c99d5f6afe.q: Where is B&B Casa in Laguna located?
8cfc0191-69d5-4d01-a209-45c99d5f6afe.a: B&B Casa in Laguna is in Venice, Italia, positioned far enough from the centre to be peaceful at night yet only a 15-minute walk to St Mark's Square and 5 minutes to the nearest Vaporetto lines for reaching Murano and Burano.

8cfc0191-69d5-4d01-a209-45c99d5f6afe.q: How cosy is B&B Casa in Laguna?
8cfc0191-69d5-4d01-a209-45c99d5f6afe.a: B&B Casa in Laguna has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10, offering a small, quiet retreat with clean rooms and a welcoming atmosphere.

8cfc0191-69d5-4d01-a209-45c99d5f6afe.q: Is the breakfast good at B&B Casa in Laguna?
8cfc0191-69d5-4d01-a209-45c99d5f6afe.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the breakfast at B&B Casa in Laguna, describing it as really nice and a highlight of their stay.

8cfc0191-69d5-4d01-a209-45c99d5f6afe.q: What is the host like at B&B Casa in Laguna?
8cfc0191-69d5-4d01-a209-45c99d5f6afe.a: Marco, the owner, is genuinely kind and helpful—guests repeatedly mention his assistance with check-in times, Vaporetto information, and airport connections, making stays stress-free.

8cfc0191-69d5-4d01-a209-45c99d5f6afe.q: What are the rooms like at B&B Casa in Laguna?
8cfc0191-69d5-4d01-a209-45c99d5f6afe.a: Rooms are spacious and clean with comfortable beds; some feature beautiful water views and access to a pleasant patio or balcony, though furnishings are simple rather than luxurious.

8cfc0191-69d5-4d01-a209-45c99d5f6afe.q: Is B&B Casa in Laguna good for families?
8cfc0191-69d5-4d01-a209-45c99d5f6afe.a: Yes, families have enjoyed stays here, appreciating the spacious rooms, helpful host, nice breakfast, and peaceful location that's still within easy walking distance of Venice's main attractions.

de9bd2a9-4827-4514-8b95-95d924a33891.q: Where is Faralda NDSM Crane Hotel Amsterdam located?
de9bd2a9-4827-4514-8b95-95d924a33891.a: Faralda NDSM Crane Hotel is situated in Amsterdam's vibrant street-art district, Netherlands. The hotel occupies a converted industrial crane 50 metres above ground, offering panoramic views across the entire city.

de9bd2a9-4827-4514-8b95-95d924a33891.q: How cosy is Faralda NDSM Crane Hotel Amsterdam?
de9bd2a9-4827-4514-8b95-95d924a33891.a: The hotel scores 5.7 out of 10 for cosiness. Whilst the converted crane design feels surreal and unique rather than traditionally warm, guests consistently praise the alternative, harmonious interior and the extraordinary experience of sleeping high above the city.

de9bd2a9-4827-4514-8b95-95d924a33891.q: Is Faralda NDSM Crane Hotel good for special occasions?
de9bd2a9-4827-4514-8b95-95d924a33891.a: Yes, absolutely. Guests have celebrated birthdays and hosted events here with outstanding results, with owner Edwin personally arranging every detail and offering valuable suggestions to make occasions even better.

de9bd2a9-4827-4514-8b95-95d924a33891.q: What is the service like at Faralda NDSM Crane Hotel?
de9bd2a9-4827-4514-8b95-95d924a33891.a: Service is exceptional. Guests describe warm, friendly vibes from Edwin and his crew, who cater for anything and everything needed with nothing being too much trouble.

de9bd2a9-4827-4514-8b95-95d924a33891.q: Does Faralda NDSM Crane Hotel have good views?
de9bd2a9-4827-4514-8b95-95d924a33891.a: The views are a major highlight. Staying 50 metres up in the converted crane provides never-ending panoramic vistas over Amsterdam, with guests describing the experience as surreal and breathtaking.

de9bd2a9-4827-4514-8b95-95d924a33891.q: What amenities does Faralda NDSM Crane Hotel offer?
de9bd2a9-4827-4514-8b95-95d924a33891.a: The hotel features beautifully designed suites with a rooftop jacuzzi. Guests praise the alternative but harmonious furnishings and the unique experience of the industrial crane elevator access.

1f2243b5-7d3a-43fc-afca-3b7b729692b3.a: Pension Vestergade 44 is in Ærøskøbing, a charming town on Aero Island in Denmark. It sits on one of the cutest streets in town, very close to the port and local landmarks.

With a cosy score of 7.7/10, Pension Vestergade 44 feels like a fairytale retreat. Guests praise its beautifully decorated rooms, timeless furnishings, and a stunning garden with 200-year-old trees where you can relax with tea or coffee.

1f2243b5-7d3a-43fc-afca-3b7b729692b3.q: Is the breakfast good at Pension Vestergade 44?
1f2243b5-7d3a-43fc-afca-3b7b729692b3.a: Yes — guests consistently rave about it. The breakfast is homemade with local, organic ingredients and so delicious that visitors say they went to sleep looking forward to it the next morning.

1f2243b5-7d3a-43fc-afca-3b7b729692b3.q: What is the service like at Pension Vestergade 44?
1f2243b5-7d3a-43fc-afca-3b7b729692b3.a: The hosts Susanna and Mette are extraordinarily warm and attentive. Guests describe impeccable service, with staff going out of their way to make stays memorable — even arranging restaurant reservations with the best seating.

1f2243b5-7d3a-43fc-afca-3b7b729692b3.q: Is Pension Vestergade 44 good for couples?
1f2243b5-7d3a-43fc-afca-3b7b729692b3.a: Absolutely. Couples, including those getting married on the island, consistently choose it and praise the romantic, fairytale atmosphere, thoughtful hospitality, and beautiful surroundings.

1f2243b5-7d3a-43fc-afca-3b7b729692b3.q: What do guests rate Pension Vestergade 44?
1f2243b5-7d3a-43fc-afca-3b7b729692b3.a: Guests rate it 4.8/5 from 70 reviews, calling it the perfect place to stay on Aero with impeccable cleanliness, positive energy, and exceptional hospitality.

38f47bce-2414-4631-9599-f38cd892a76a.a: Atlanta Augustus is situated in Lido, Venice, Italy—a quiet neighbourhood just 10 minutes from the main vaporetto stop (which connects to St Mark's Square) and close to the beach and local restaurants.
Atlanta Augustus scores 5.7 out of 10 for cosiness, reflecting a comfortable but modest level of warmth and intimate atmosphere.

38f47bce-2414-4631-9599-f38cd892a76a.q: Is the staff friendly at Atlanta Augustus?
38f47bce-2414-4631-9599-f38cd892a76a.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the staff as wonderful, friendly and helpful—they're known for going the extra mile to assist with planning your day and providing attentive service throughout your stay.

38f47bce-2414-4631-9599-f38cd892a76a.q: What is breakfast like at Atlanta Augustus?
38f47bce-2414-4631-9599-f38cd892a76a.a: Breakfast is genuinely excellent and helps guests plan their day; it's hearty and delicious, and the hotel is described as great value for money given the quality of the meal.

38f47bce-2414-4631-9599-f38cd892a76a.q: Are the rooms at Atlanta Augustus spacious?
38f47bce-2414-4631-9599-f38cd892a76a.a: Rooms are very spacious and quiet, with many featuring generous terraces or balconies with sunbeds; air conditioning runs even when you're out, so you return to a cool room after the beach.
Yes, the hotel offers on-site parking, which guests appreciate for the peace of mind it provides when exploring Venice and the surrounding islands.

5f0eda79-4186-41db-ba7e-2553494bf5ab.q: Where is Hotel Villa Stuky located?
5f0eda79-4186-41db-ba7e-2553494bf5ab.a: Hotel Villa Stuky is in Mogliano, just outside Venice, Italy. It's conveniently positioned with the train station only an 8-minute walk away, making it easy to reach Venice city centre, the airport, and local transport links.

5f0eda79-4186-41db-ba7e-2553494bf5ab.q: How cosy is Hotel Villa Stuky?
5f0eda79-4186-41db-ba7e-2553494bf5ab.a: Hotel Villa Stuky scores 6.3/10 for cosiness. Guests consistently praise its calm, peaceful atmosphere and charming heritage setting, though some note rooms can feel a little stuffy or compact.

5f0eda79-4186-41db-ba7e-2553494bf5ab.q: What is the service like at Hotel Villa Stuky?
5f0eda79-4186-41db-ba7e-2553494bf5ab.a: The staff are genuinely warm and helpful—guests repeatedly highlight their friendliness and attentiveness. The team will even hold your bags if you arrive early, and they're always ready to assist with whatever you need.

5f0eda79-4186-41db-ba7e-2553494bf5ab.q: Is Hotel Villa Stuky good for a relaxing stay?
5f0eda79-4186-41db-ba7e-2553494bf5ab.a: Yes, it's excellent for those seeking peace and quiet. The villa has a unique, traditional charm with antique decor, an outdoor seating area for unwinding, and guests consistently describe the atmosphere as tranquil and restorative.

5f0eda79-4186-41db-ba7e-2553494bf5ab.q: What's the breakfast like at Hotel Villa Stuky?
5f0eda79-4186-41db-ba7e-2553494bf5ab.a: The continental breakfast is straightforward but limited—the choice is narrow and the menu repeats daily. However, there's a supermarket right next door and plenty of restaurants and cafés nearby if you'd like more variety.

5f0eda79-4186-41db-ba7e-2553494bf5ab.q: Is Hotel Villa Stuky good value for money?
5f0eda79-4186-41db-ba7e-2553494bf5ab.a: Yes, guests rate it as excellent value. The rooms are clean and comfortable with quality bedding and bathrooms, the location is convenient, and the friendly service makes it a solid choice for visiting Venice without breaking the bank.

088e88ed-940d-4134-ab1c-fd1b1b4f3e99.q: Where is Residenza Castiglioni located in Florence?
088e88ed-940d-4134-ab1c-fd1b1b4f3e99.a: Residenza Castiglioni sits in the heart of Florence, within walking distance of all major sights, the train station, and plenty of restaurants. Guests consistently praise its central location for exploring the city on foot without needing taxis.

Residenza Castiglioni scores 6.3/10 for cosiness. It's a quiet, clean, and spacious family-run property in a historic Florentine building, with comfortable beds and thoughtful touches like extra blankets and good water pressure.

088e88ed-940d-4134-ab1c-fd1b1b4f3e99.q: Is the service good at Residenza Castiglioni?
088e88ed-940d-4134-ab1c-fd1b1b4f3e99.a: Yes. Guests rave about the warm, helpful staff—particularly Christina and the owner—who go above and beyond, from explaining everything on arrival to arranging taxis and even building a ramp for accessibility needs.

088e88ed-940d-4134-ab1c-fd1b1b4f3e99.q: What is breakfast like at Residenza Castiglioni?
088e88ed-940d-4134-ab1c-fd1b1b4f3e99.a: Breakfast is fresh and plentiful, featuring eggs, toast, salad, hot chocolate, and good coffee. Guests consistently highlight it as a great start to their day.

088e88ed-940d-4134-ab1c-fd1b1b4f3e99.q: Are the rooms spacious at Residenza Castiglioni?
088e88ed-940d-4134-ab1c-fd1b1b4f3e99.a: Yes. Guests describe the rooms as big, clean, and exactly as pictured online, with large private bathrooms and everything needed for a comfortable stay.

d9096d6c-4b3b-4f76-9ca3-7279b2a9fc5b.q: Where is The Palace Balneo & Spa Hotel located?
d9096d6c-4b3b-4f76-9ca3-7279b2a9fc5b.a: The Palace Balneo & Spa Hotel is in Varna, Bulgaria, right at the beach and less than 10 minutes by taxi from Varna centre, making it convenient for exploring the city whilst enjoying a seaside setting.

d9096d6c-4b3b-4f76-9ca3-7279b2a9fc5b.q: How cosy is The Palace Balneo & Spa Hotel?
d9096d6c-4b3b-4f76-9ca3-7279b2a9fc5b.a: The Palace Balneo & Spa Hotel has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10, suggesting it's a comfortable but straightforward property with some older building characteristics that guests notice.

d9096d6c-4b3b-4f76-9ca3-7279b2a9fc5b.q: Is the spa good at The Palace Balneo & Spa Hotel?
d9096d6c-4b3b-4f76-9ca3-7279b2a9fc5b.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the spa at The Palace Balneo & Spa Hotel, particularly noting it's excellent when visited during quieter periods and describing it as a true highlight of their stay.

d9096d6c-4b3b-4f76-9ca3-7279b2a9fc5b.q: What's the food like at The Palace Balneo & Spa Hotel?
d9096d6c-4b3b-4f76-9ca3-7279b2a9fc5b.a: The food receives strong praise from most guests, with reviewers highlighting the buffet breakfast and dinner as excellent, featuring good variety and quality dishes that impressed them throughout their stay.

d9096d6c-4b3b-4f76-9ca3-7279b2a9fc5b.q: Is the service good at The Palace Balneo & Spa Hotel?
d9096d6c-4b3b-4f76-9ca3-7279b2a9fc5b.a: The Palace Balneo & Spa Hotel is known for friendly and attentive staff who provide swift, professional service, though a few guests noted occasional language barriers and inconsistencies in friendliness.

d9096d6c-4b3b-4f76-9ca3-7279b2a9fc5b.q: Is The Palace Balneo & Spa Hotel good for a beach holiday?
d9096d6c-4b3b-4f76-9ca3-7279b2a9fc5b.a: Yes, guests love the beach access at The Palace Balneo & Spa Hotel, describing it as clean and beautiful, and the combination of beach, spa, and pools makes it ideal for a relaxing seaside break.

ec57c699-427f-4774-8ecc-51d07cdd0123.q: Where is The Three Corners Hotel Art located?
ec57c699-427f-4774-8ecc-51d07cdd0123.a: The Three Corners Hotel Art is situated on Királyi Pál u. 12 in Budapest's District V, a quiet yet central location. Guests consistently praise its walkability to main attractions and easy access from the airport via the direct 100E bus, which stops just a 5-minute walk away.

ec57c699-427f-4774-8ecc-51d07cdd0123.q: What is the cosy score for The Three Corners Hotel Art?
ec57c699-427f-4774-8ecc-51d07cdd0123.a: The Three Corners Hotel Art has a cosy score of 6.3/10. Whilst rooms are compact, guests describe them as warm, comfortable, and well-equipped, making it a practical base for exploring Budapest.

ec57c699-427f-4774-8ecc-51d07cdd0123.q: Is the breakfast good at The Three Corners Hotel Art?
ec57c699-427f-4774-8ecc-51d07cdd0123.a: Yes, breakfast is a genuine highlight. Guests consistently praise the outstanding variety, quality, and friendly, efficient service from the breakfast staff—many note the restaurant is full each morning and would return largely for this reason.

ec57c699-427f-4774-8ecc-51d07cdd0123.q: Is the staff friendly at The Three Corners Hotel Art?
ec57c699-427f-4774-8ecc-51d07cdd0123.a: Absolutely. Guests repeatedly commend the reception and breakfast staff as professional, welcoming, helpful, and service-oriented, often going out of their way to offer advice on exploring Budapest.

ec57c699-427f-4774-8ecc-51d07cdd0123.q: Does The Three Corners Hotel Art have a sauna?
ec57c699-427f-4774-8ecc-51d07cdd0123.a: Yes, The Three Corners Hotel Art has a sauna on-site, offering a nice amenity to unwind after exploring the city.

ec57c699-427f-4774-8ecc-51d07cdd0123.q: What do guests say about the rooms at The Three Corners Hotel Art?
ec57c699-427f-4774-8ecc-51d07cdd0123.a: Rooms are small but well-equipped and very clean, with good heating and sufficient natural light. Guests note they're a practical base for a city stay, though some find the pillows uncomfortable and ventilation occasionally inadequate in warmer weather.

b2af9b40-b58f-4c7f-be0c-501cf0bf3ad4.q: Where is Dimora Dionisio B&B located in Florence?
b2af9b40-b58f-4c7f-be0c-501cf0bf3ad4.a: Dimora Dionisio is centrally positioned just 5 minutes' walk from Santa Maria Novella station and 10 minutes from Florence's city centre, near the Ponte Vecchio and Uffizi Gallery. It's on a pedestrian shopping street, making it ideal for exploring on foot.

b2af9b40-b58f-4c7f-be0c-501cf0bf3ad4.q: How cosy is Dimora Dionisio B&B?
b2af9b40-b58f-4c7f-be0c-501cf0bf3ad4.a: Dimora Dionisio scores 6.3/10 for cosiness. Guests praise the cleanliness and thoughtful room details, though several note the bedrooms are quite small and can feel a bit dark.

b2af9b40-b58f-4c7f-be0c-501cf0bf3ad4.q: What is the host like at Dimora Dionisio B&B?
b2af9b40-b58f-4c7f-be0c-501cf0bf3ad4.a: Francesco, the owner, is consistently praised as helpful, available, and genuinely interested in guests' comfort—offering local recommendations, extra pillows, and luggage storage before check-in. Guests describe him as transparent, reliable, and wonderfully warm.

b2af9b40-b58f-4c7f-be0c-501cf0bf3ad4.q: Is breakfast included at Dimora Dionisio B&B?
b2af9b40-b58f-4c7f-be0c-501cf0bf3ad4.a: Yes, breakfast is included and served at a café directly opposite the B&B, featuring Italian coffee and croissants.

b2af9b40-b58f-4c7f-be0c-501cf0bf3ad4.q: What should I know about the rooms at Dimora Dionisio B&B?
b2af9b40-b58f-4c7f-be0c-501cf0bf3ad4.a: Rooms are compact and come equipped with essentials like a kettle and fridge, and are kept very clean with nice decorative touches. However, storage space is limited and natural light can be modest, so they suit short stays rather than longer visits.

310c29ad-235f-4246-a35b-fdb9a92c1038.q: Where is Hotel Fita located in Amsterdam?
310c29ad-235f-4246-a35b-fdb9a92c1038.a: Hotel Fita sits on a quiet street in the Museumplein area, just steps from the Rijksmuseum and Van Gogh Museum, with Vondelpark and Central Station easily reachable by tram and metro. It's about 20 minutes from Schiphol Airport by direct public bus.

Hotel Fita scores 6.3 out of 10 for cosiness. Guests consistently praise the warm, well-furnished rooms with comfortable beds, thoughtful touches like Nespresso machines and tea kettles, and the peaceful atmosphere despite being in a busy neighbourhood.

310c29ad-235f-4246-a35b-fdb9a92c1038.q: Is the staff friendly at Hotel Fita?
310c29ad-235f-4246-a35b-fdb9a92c1038.a: Yes, guests highlight that the staff are genuinely welcoming, helpful, and fluent in English, going out of their way to make stays special. However, one guest reported inflexible cancellation policies, so it's worth clarifying terms before booking.

310c29ad-235f-4246-a35b-fdb9a92c1038.q: Is Hotel Fita good for exploring Amsterdam's museums?
310c29ad-235f-4246-a35b-fdb9a92c1038.a: Absolutely—the hotel's location is ideal for museum lovers, with the Van Gogh Museum and Rijksmuseum virtually on your doorstep, and excellent tram and metro connections to other parts of the city.

310c29ad-235f-4246-a35b-fdb9a92c1038.q: What's breakfast like at Hotel Fita?
310c29ad-235f-4246-a35b-fdb9a92c1038.a: Guests mention breakfast positively as part of their overall experience, though details are limited in reviews. The hotel appears to offer a solid morning offering to complement its comfortable rooms.

310c29ad-235f-4246-a35b-fdb9a92c1038.q: Are the rooms quiet at Hotel Fita?
310c29ad-235f-4246-a35b-fdb9a92c1038.a: Yes, despite being in a busy area, guests consistently report that rooms are very quiet and peaceful, making it an excellent choice for rest after exploring the city.

2188c1ee-33fe-4f22-8482-cd0a1969e075.q: Where is Donnybrook Lodge B&B located?
2188c1ee-33fe-4f22-8482-cd0a1969e075.a: Donnybrook Lodge is situated in the Donnybrook area of Dublin, a quiet residential neighbourhood. The city centre is reachable within 15 minutes by bus or about 30 minutes on foot, and the airport coach station is just a 5-minute walk away.

2188c1ee-33fe-4f22-8482-cd0a1969e075.q: How cosy is Donnybrook Lodge B&B?

2188c1ee-33fe-4f22-8482-cd0a1969e075.q: Is Donnybrook Lodge B&B clean and comfortable?

a9a3d04d-1adb-4b3a-a9c1-9265bcae00e2.q: Where is The Walper Hotel located?

9f0c7552-4bbb-474b-952a-43ffb974c33d.q: What is the cosy score for Austria Classic Hotel Wien?

9f0c7552-4bbb-474b-952a-43ffb974c33d.q: Are the rooms clean and comfortable at Austria Classic Hotel Wien?

9f0c7552-4bbb-474b-952a-43ffb974c33d.q: Is the staff friendly at Austria Classic Hotel Wien?

9f0c7552-4bbb-474b-952a-43ffb974c33d.q: Is Austria Classic Hotel Wien good value for money?

71a1b9bb-4def-47ab-8b79-b670f8e83ec7.a: Cashel Lodge is in Dublin, Ireland, situated in a quiet suburb that's conveniently close to the city centre.

9633e2cc-a012-4f63-bde4-efca0036a29e.q: Where is Hotel Giglio located in Florence?

Hotel Giglio has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10. It's a charming, family-owned hotel with genuine Italian character—clean, comfortable rooms with good air-conditioning and fast WiFi, though the décor is classic and unpretentious rather than lavish.

9633e2cc-a012-4f63-bde4-efca0036a29e.q: Is the breakfast good at Hotel Giglio?

9633e2cc-a012-4f63-bde4-efca0036a29e.q: What is the service like at Hotel Giglio?

9633e2cc-a012-4f63-bde4-efca0036a29e.q: Are the rooms spacious at Hotel Giglio?

8fd2266a-5e45-431d-915f-1522cd1506d8.q: Where is The Dergvale Hotel located?
8fd2266a-5e45-431d-915f-1522cd1506d8.a: The Dergvale Hotel is in Dublin, Ireland, a short walk or bus ride from the city centre. It sits in a quiet area, about 20 minutes' walk from the crowds and nightlife, making it ideal if you want peace without being far from the action.

8fd2266a-5e45-431d-915f-1522cd1506d8.q: How cosy is The Dergvale Hotel?

8fd2266a-5e45-431d-915f-1522cd1506d8.q: Is breakfast good at The Dergvale Hotel?

The Dergvale Hotel is exceptionally clean. Multiple guests have called it impeccably maintained and one even described it as the cleanest hotel they've ever stayed in, with rooms kept spotless throughout.

8fd2266a-5e45-431d-915f-1522cd1506d8.q: Is The Dergvale Hotel good value for money?

e2085cc3-937a-47cf-a2b7-1f16c53b3bd1.q: Where is Unique Lisbon Rooms located?

e2085cc3-937a-47cf-a2b7-1f16c53b3bd1.q: Is Unique Lisbon Rooms good value for money?

30082bd3-f5e9-49bd-a6c1-82cbcb7b54c8.a: Nockhof is a farm stay in Innsbruck, Austria, perched at 1,200 metres with views down the Inn valley. It's about 15 minutes from Innsbruck's city centre, making it peaceful and quiet whilst remaining accessible to the slopes.

Nockhof scores 7.7 out of 10 for cosiness. Guests consistently describe it as a wonderfully warm, homely retreat—a place where you feel like you have a home away from home, with genuine hospitality from the hosts and their family.

Yes, absolutely. Guests have honeymooned here and praised the clean, well-appointed apartments, delicious breakfast, and breathtaking valley views from the balcony. It's an ideal spot for those seeking a romantic, peaceful escape.

30082bd3-f5e9-49bd-a6c1-82cbcb7b54c8.q: What are the highlights of staying at Nockhof?
30082bd3-f5e9-49bd-a6c1-82cbcb7b54c8.a: Guests rave about the stunning views, the on-site animals, the immaculate cleanliness, and the genuinely friendly hosts who create a welcoming atmosphere. The farm setting offers a quiet retreat from city life whilst remaining close to skiing and Innsbruck itself.

30082bd3-f5e9-49bd-a6c1-82cbcb7b54c8.q: Is the breakfast good at Nockhof?
30082bd3-f5e9-49bd-a6c1-82cbcb7b54c8.a: Yes—guests have specifically praised the breakfast as delicious and a real highlight of their stay, particularly those celebrating special occasions.

009fd2ff-1d74-426a-84b6-3d5fe8d466c8.a: Casa Gori is situated in Siena, Italy, in the Val d'Orcia region of Tuscany—a stunning area perfect for exploring by e-bike or car.
Casa Gori scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness, offering a warm and welcoming atmosphere with genuine hospitality from the owners and staff.

009fd2ff-1d74-426a-84b6-3d5fe8d466c8.q: What food and drink does Casa Gori serve?
009fd2ff-1d74-426a-84b6-3d5fe8d466c8.a: Casa Gori is an organic farm with its own wines and beers, plus a tasting menu featuring all-you-can-eat local dishes. Guests rave about the cheese, pickled vegetables, and strawberry beer—everything is made from local, organic products.

009fd2ff-1d74-426a-84b6-3d5fe8d466c8.q: Is Casa Gori good for a Tuscan experience?
009fd2ff-1d74-426a-84b6-3d5fe8d466c8.a: Absolutely. Guests describe it as a hidden gem offering an authentic Tuscan experience with unique regional wines and beers, stunning views, and staff who are genuinely kind and knowledgeable about local food and culture.

009fd2ff-1d74-426a-84b6-3d5fe8d466c8.q: Does Casa Gori have a shop?

009fd2ff-1d74-426a-84b6-3d5fe8d466c8.q: Is the service good at Casa Gori?
009fd2ff-1d74-426a-84b6-3d5fe8d466c8.a: Yes—guests consistently praise the owners and staff for being exceptionally warm, welcoming, and genuinely happy to share knowledge about the local food and drinks.

369a3231-1ab7-43a5-ab73-121966c469f6.q: Where is La Maison Boutique Hotel located?
369a3231-1ab7-43a5-ab73-121966c469f6.a: La Maison Boutique Hotel is in Sydney, Australia, close to the town centre and ideally positioned for access to the Blue Mountains and local tourist attractions.

369a3231-1ab7-43a5-ab73-121966c469f6.q: How cosy is La Maison Boutique Hotel?
369a3231-1ab7-43a5-ab73-121966c469f6.a: La Maison Boutique Hotel has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10. Guests appreciate its intimate character and welcoming atmosphere, though some note the rooms feel a bit dated.

369a3231-1ab7-43a5-ab73-121966c469f6.a: The hotel features a 24/7 pool table, sauna, and complimentary continental breakfast. Guests have praised these additions as nice touches that enhance their stay.

369a3231-1ab7-43a5-ab73-121966c469f6.q: Is the service good at La Maison Boutique Hotel?
369a3231-1ab7-43a5-ab73-121966c469f6.a: Many guests highlight the friendly and welcoming staff, with particular praise for the owner Ron's old-fashioned hospitality and attentiveness. However, a few guests reported difficulty reaching the hotel by phone or message during the day.

369a3231-1ab7-43a5-ab73-121966c469f6.q: Is La Maison Boutique Hotel good for couples?
369a3231-1ab7-43a5-ab73-121966c469f6.a: Yes—guests have described lovely stays as couples, appreciating the cosy atmosphere, friendly staff, and superb location near mountain hikes and the town centre, making it a pleasant choice for a getaway.

369a3231-1ab7-43a5-ab73-121966c469f6.q: What is breakfast like at La Maison Boutique Hotel?
369a3231-1ab7-43a5-ab73-121966c469f6.a: The hotel offers a complimentary continental breakfast that guests find filling and good value. One note: breakfast service may start later in the day, so early risers should check ahead.

282cf76d-7b3e-444f-bb79-b6cd58b63581.q: Where is Brewster's Mountain Lodge located?

282cf76d-7b3e-444f-bb79-b6cd58b63581.a: Yes, guests consistently highlight the front desk and wider staff as very helpful, friendly, and hardworking. They're known for their warmth and attentiveness to guests' needs.

a52414c7-7986-4310-ae17-d2308d79f027.q: Where is Lord Nelson located in Stockholm?
a52414c7-7986-4310-ae17-d2308d79f027.a: Lord Nelson sits in central Stockholm, within walking distance of major attractions like the Nobel Prize Museum, Royal Palace, and Gamla Stan. It's less than five minutes' walk from Gamla Stan T-bana station, making it ideal for exploring the city on foot.

Lord Nelson has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10. Guests appreciate its charming naval-themed atmosphere and beautiful décor, though the compact rooms and thin walls mean it's best suited to those who value location and character over space and privacy.

a52414c7-7986-4310-ae17-d2308d79f027.q: What's the breakfast like at Lord Nelson?
a52414c7-7986-4310-ae17-d2308d79f027.a: Breakfast is included and features a basic yet well-regarded buffet with plenty of vegan and vegetarian options. Guests find it sufficient to start the day, though portions are modest rather than lavish.

a52414c7-7986-4310-ae17-d2308d79f027.q: Are the rooms at Lord Nelson comfortable?
a52414c7-7986-4310-ae17-d2308d79f027.a: Rooms are deliberately small but thoughtfully laid out, with guests noting they work well for solo travellers. Bathrooms are a highlight, featuring heated floors and reliable hot water; however, thin walls mean you may hear neighbouring guests, and cleanliness can be inconsistent.

a52414c7-7986-4310-ae17-d2308d79f027.q: Is the service good at Lord Nelson?
a52414c7-7986-4310-ae17-d2308d79f027.a: Staff are described as welcoming and attentive, with guests praising the service quality. However, there is no daily room service available, so you'll need to manage independently during your stay.

a52414c7-7986-4310-ae17-d2308d79f027.q: Is Lord Nelson good for experiencing Stockholm's character?
a52414c7-7986-4310-ae17-d2308d79f027.a: Yes—guests consistently highlight the hotel's fantastic central location and immersive naval theme, which creates an atmospheric, museum-like experience. It's particularly appealing if you're a sea lover or want to stay in the heart of historic Stockholm's most walkable area.

a6178d3e-d96d-47dd-bb1f-da78ded4540b.q: Where is White & Co. Exclusive Island Villas located?
a6178d3e-d96d-47dd-bb1f-da78ded4540b.a: White & Co. Exclusive Island Villas is situated in Santorini, Greece, perched on a hill with views across the whole island. a6178d3e-d96d-47dd-bb1f-da78ded4540b.q: How cosy is White & Co. Exclusive Island Villas?

a6178d3e-d96d-47dd-bb1f-da78ded4540b.q: Is the service and staff good at White & Co. Exclusive Island Villas?
a6178d3e-d96d-47dd-bb1f-da78ded4540b.a: Absolutely. Adrian and the team are repeatedly singled out for being amazing, professional, friendly, and genuinely invested in guests' comfort — from speedy responses during booking to going above and beyond throughout the stay.

a6178d3e-d96d-47dd-bb1f-da78ded4540b.q: Does White & Co. Exclusive Island Villas have a pool?
a6178d3e-d96d-47dd-bb1f-da78ded4540b.a: Yes, there is a pool on-site. Guests note it's kept spotlessly clean and is just the right size, though one visitor mentioned the water temperature could be quite cold.

a6178d3e-d96d-47dd-bb1f-da78ded4540b.q: Is White & Co. Exclusive Island Villas good for a romantic getaway?
a6178d3e-d96d-47dd-bb1f-da78ded4540b.a: Yes — guests highlight the stunning sunset views, the villa's beautiful design and interior, and the peaceful hilltop location as ideal for romance. Several mention it felt far better than staying in a busy hotel.

34b9ea4c-8e78-467b-aed6-c8324cb547fd.a: Pension Wok is situated in Český Krumlov, a UNESCO world heritage town in the Czech Republic. The pension occupies a riverside villa at the edge of the historic town centre, offering guests proximity to the old town's attractions.

Pension Wok has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10. Guests consistently praise the warm, tidy rooms and the peaceful riverside setting, though some have noted concerns about transparency in pricing and terms.

34b9ea4c-8e78-467b-aed6-c8324cb547fd.q: What is the location like at Pension Wok?

adb26ab4-3362-4460-a66c-95d60c951ab1.q: What are Andy and Tracey like as hosts at Herdwick Guest House?

dc6996b5-32c9-4c46-8272-ec26f086b27f.a: Le Sirenuse is in Positano on the Amalfi Coast, Italy. The hotel sits in the heart of this picturesque coastal town and offers some of the most stunning views of the colourful hillside homes and sparkling sea that Positano is famous for.

Le Sirenuse has a cosy score of 7.0 out of 10. Guests consistently praise the warm, attentive staff and the feeling of being made to feel at home, from the moment of arrival through every interaction with the team.

dc6996b5-32c9-4c46-8272-ec26f086b27f.q: Is Le Sirenuse good for couples and anniversaries?
dc6996b5-32c9-4c46-8272-ec26f086b27f.a: Yes, Le Sirenuse is excellent for couples celebrating special occasions. dc6996b5-32c9-4c46-8272-ec26f086b27f.q: What is the service like at Le Sirenuse?

dc6996b5-32c9-4c46-8272-ec26f086b27f.q: What are the rooms and views like at Le Sirenuse?

dc6996b5-32c9-4c46-8272-ec26f086b27f.q: Does Le Sirenuse have a beach club?
dc6996b5-32c9-4c46-8272-ec26f086b27f.a: Yes, Le Sirenuse has a beach club that guests have described as exceptional, with one visitor calling it 'the best day of my life' and promising to return every year.

60462402-6cdf-4492-a467-547d32b68335.a: Kanamean Nishitomiya is a ryokan in Kyoto, Japan (postal code 604-8064). Guests consistently praise its location as great, with excellent access to the city's attractions.

60462402-6cdf-4492-a467-547d32b68335.q: What is the service like at Kanamean Nishitomiya?

60462402-6cdf-4492-a467-547d32b68335.q: What is the food like at Kanamean Nishitomiya?

60462402-6cdf-4492-a467-547d32b68335.q: Is Kanamean Nishitomiya good for a special occasion?

60462402-6cdf-4492-a467-547d32b68335.q: What do guests rate Kanamean Nishitomiya?
60462402-6cdf-4492-a467-547d32b68335.a: Kanamean Nishitomiya has a 4.7/5 rating from 86 guest reviews. Visitors consistently call it one of the best hotel stays they've ever had, praising its authenticity, cleanliness, comfort, and exceptional hospitality.

793a9fa8-bf1f-47fb-9db2-abf4b63e4597.q: How cosy is Pensione Casa Guadagno?

793a9fa8-bf1f-47fb-9db2-abf4b63e4597.q: Is the breakfast good at Pensione Casa Guadagno?

793a9fa8-bf1f-47fb-9db2-abf4b63e4597.q: Is Pensione Casa Guadagno good for couples?

793a9fa8-bf1f-47fb-9db2-abf4b63e4597.q: What is the service like at Pensione Casa Guadagno?

2657ae8b-d9da-4d5d-9c29-5bfc9e72e537.a: Saint-Delis is situated in Honfleur, France, in a tranquil area that's conveniently close to local sites, restaurants, and shops. It's easy to explore the charming town and surrounding region from the hotel.

Absolutely. Guests on their honeymoon found it an incredible experience, with beautiful rooms, wonderful service, and thoughtful touches that made their stay feel truly special.

9dd9e607-b662-457f-b286-91b8d1bf7ef2.q: Where is La Chèvre d'Or located?

9dd9e607-b662-457f-b286-91b8d1bf7ef2.q: What is the cosy score for La Chèvre d'Or?

9dd9e607-b662-457f-b286-91b8d1bf7ef2.q: What are the views like at La Chèvre d'Or?

9dd9e607-b662-457f-b286-91b8d1bf7ef2.q: Is the service good at La Chèvre d'Or?

9dd9e607-b662-457f-b286-91b8d1bf7ef2.q: What makes La Chèvre d'Or special?

08d97ca5-f14d-44cb-84ac-dcc9a9158f01.q: Are the rooms at Hotel Blüchertal comfortable?

08d97ca5-f14d-44cb-84ac-dcc9a9158f01.q: What is the check-in process at Hotel Blüchertal?

Weekend breakfast and coffee are available, though availability depends on the season—it's more limited during winter months. The vending machine on site can be unreliable, so planning meals ahead is wise given the distance to town restaurants.

67f3cbff-5c53-4b99-9d0f-500584de11fa.q: Where is Les Cabanes dans les bois located?

67f3cbff-5c53-4b99-9d0f-500584de11fa.q: How cosy is Les Cabanes dans les bois?

4ad9d10b-13e0-410d-ba6c-61c5229cccd5.a: Service at The Jefferson is consistently exceptional according to guests. Staff members are described as solicitous, attentive, and anticipatory—knowing what guests need before they ask—creating an unforgettable experience from doormen to reception.

4ad9d10b-13e0-410d-ba6c-61c5229cccd5.q: Does The Jefferson have a spa?
4ad9d10b-13e0-410d-ba6c-61c5229cccd5.a: Yes, The Jefferson features a spa on-site, adding to the range of wellness and relaxation amenities available to guests during their stay.

4ad9d10b-13e0-410d-ba6c-61c5229cccd5.q: What do guests say about The Jefferson's cleanliness and design?
4ad9d10b-13e0-410d-ba6c-61c5229cccd5.a: Guests are impressed by The Jefferson's immaculate standards and thoughtful design details. The hotel is described as one of the cleanest they've encountered, with beautiful historic spaces including a charming library, elegant breakfast room, and stylish bar that guests can freely explore.

3dda2a86-3b8f-4016-ab4d-9fe32ac61ef7.q: Where is The Urban Hotel located?
3dda2a86-3b8f-4016-ab4d-9fe32ac61ef7.a: The Urban Hotel is in San Francisco, with a fabulous location in the heart of the city near Chinatown's dragon gate, art studios, and French cafés. You can walk almost anywhere or easily catch a bus from the hotel.

3dda2a86-3b8f-4016-ab4d-9fe32ac61ef7.q: What is the cosy score for The Urban Hotel?
3dda2a86-3b8f-4016-ab4d-9fe32ac61ef7.a: The Urban Hotel has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10, reflecting its budget-friendly, no-frills approach with shared facilities and compact rooms rather than luxury comfort.

Yes, guests consistently praise The Urban Hotel for being clean throughout, including the shared bathrooms and shower spaces. The rooms are simple but well-maintained, and the hotel maintains high standards for cleanliness.

3dda2a86-3b8f-4016-ab4d-9fe32ac61ef7.q: What is the service like at The Urban Hotel?
3dda2a86-3b8f-4016-ab4d-9fe32ac61ef7.a: Staff at The Urban Hotel are noted as efficient, helpful, and friendly, with front desk team members going the extra mile to assist guests. They're attentive to maintaining standards and ensuring a respectful environment.

3dda2a86-3b8f-4016-ab4d-9fe32ac61ef7.q: Is The Urban Hotel good value for money?
3dda2a86-3b8f-4016-ab4d-9fe32ac61ef7.a: The Urban Hotel offers excellent value at an affordable price compared with other nearby San Francisco hotels. Guests appreciate the clean, simple rooms and amenities like free morning coffee, laundry facilities, and a lobby microwave for the cost.

3dda2a86-3b8f-4016-ab4d-9fe32ac61ef7.q: What should I know about noise at The Urban Hotel?
3dda2a86-3b8f-4016-ab4d-9fe32ac61ef7.a: The Urban Hotel is situated on a busy street, so some guests experience street traffic noise and occasional noise from other guests. The hotel provides fans to help with ventilation, though light sleepers may find the location challenging.

1dba8ea1-2ab4-44a5-808d-7265c8eea589.q: Where is Mario's International Spa & Hotel located?
1dba8ea1-2ab4-44a5-808d-7265c8eea589.a: Mario's International Spa & Hotel is located in Aurora, USA, offering a retreat setting with spa and dining facilities.

1dba8ea1-2ab4-44a5-808d-7265c8eea589.q: How cosy is Mario's International Spa & Hotel?
1dba8ea1-2ab4-44a5-808d-7265c8eea589.a: Mario's International Spa & Hotel has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10, suggesting a modest level of comfort and warmth in its design and atmosphere.

1dba8ea1-2ab4-44a5-808d-7265c8eea589.q: What is the spa experience like at Mario's International Spa & Hotel?
1dba8ea1-2ab4-44a5-808d-7265c8eea589.a: Guests consistently praise the spa at Mario's International Spa & Hotel, with visitors highlighting excellent massages, facials, body scrubs, and facilities including a grotto, sauna, steam room and jacuzzi. The spa staff are described as professional and accommodating, even arranging ground-floor treatments for guests with mobility limitations.

1dba8ea1-2ab4-44a5-808d-7265c8eea589.q: Is Mario's International Spa & Hotel good for couples?
1dba8ea1-2ab4-44a5-808d-7265c8eea589.a: Yes, Mario's International Spa & Hotel offers couples' spa experiences, with guests noting that couples massages are a particular highlight and the overall atmosphere creates a special, romantic getaway feel.

1dba8ea1-2ab4-44a5-808d-7265c8eea589.q: What is the dining like at Mario's International Spa & Hotel?
1dba8ea1-2ab4-44a5-808d-7265c8eea589.a: The Cabin restaurant at Mario's International Spa & Hotel receives positive feedback for its food quality and selection, though the menu is described as fairly basic; guests particularly recommend the short rib and praise the attentive service.

1dba8ea1-2ab4-44a5-808d-7265c8eea589.q: What is the guest rating for Mario's International Spa & Hotel?
1dba8ea1-2ab4-44a5-808d-7265c8eea589.a: Mario's International Spa & Hotel has a guest rating of 3.7 out of 5 stars based on 444 reviews, reflecting mixed experiences with some guests praising the spa and service whilst others note concerns about room amenities and accessibility.

427f8ada-a839-499d-97a0-c26a1f7c229d.q: Where is Pestana Palácio do Freixo located?
427f8ada-a839-499d-97a0-c26a1f7c229d.a: Pestana Palácio do Freixo is situated in Porto, Portugal, by the river in a peaceful setting that's far enough from the city's bustle yet within walking distance of the centre.

427f8ada-a839-499d-97a0-c26a1f7c229d.q: How cosy is Pestana Palácio do Freixo?
427f8ada-a839-499d-97a0-c26a1f7c229d.a: The hotel scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness, with guests praising its quiet, comfortable rooms and the serene atmosphere that encourages restful sleep.

427f8ada-a839-499d-97a0-c26a1f7c229d.q: What do guests say about the staff at Pestana Palácio do Freixo?
427f8ada-a839-499d-97a0-c26a1f7c229d.a: Staff receive consistent praise for warmth and professionalism, with receptionists like Inês noted for their friendly welcome and genuine care in making guests feel valued.

427f8ada-a839-499d-97a0-c26a1f7c229d.q: Is Pestana Palácio do Freixo good for a romantic getaway?
427f8ada-a839-499d-97a0-c26a1f7c229d.a: Yes — guests describe it as a majestic historic palace with charming, stylish rooms and a peaceful riverside setting that creates an enchanting atmosphere for couples.

427f8ada-a839-499d-97a0-c26a1f7c229d.q: Does Pestana Palácio do Freixo have a spa?
427f8ada-a839-499d-97a0-c26a1f7c229d.a: Yes, the hotel has a spa on site, which guests have found to be good quality.

427f8ada-a839-499d-97a0-c26a1f7c229d.q: What is the guest rating for Pestana Palácio do Freixo?
427f8ada-a839-499d-97a0-c26a1f7c229d.a: Pestana Palácio do Freixo has a strong 4.7 out of 5 rating from over 3,200 guest reviews, reflecting consistent satisfaction with its historic charm and hospitality.

ea070d06-21fa-45fe-bfbb-5a8c4619184c.q: Where is Om Ham Retreat & Resort located?
ea070d06-21fa-45fe-bfbb-5a8c4619184c.a: Om Ham Retreat & Resort is situated in Ubud, Bali, nestled in lush jungle surroundings next to rice paddies, creating a serene and peaceful setting for your stay.

ea070d06-21fa-45fe-bfbb-5a8c4619184c.q: How cosy is Om Ham Retreat & Resort?
ea070d06-21fa-45fe-bfbb-5a8c4619184c.a: Om Ham Retreat & Resort has a cosy score of 7.0 out of 10, offering a warm and relaxing atmosphere that guests consistently praise for its peaceful, beautiful environment.

ea070d06-21fa-45fe-bfbb-5a8c4619184c.q: Is the spa good at Om Ham Retreat & Resort?
ea070d06-21fa-45fe-bfbb-5a8c4619184c.a: Yes, guests rave about the spa at Om Ham Retreat & Resort, with many returning visitors citing the wonderful spa and skilled treatments like massage and boreh scrubs as highlights of their stay.

ea070d06-21fa-45fe-bfbb-5a8c4619184c.q: What is the restaurant like at Om Ham Retreat & Resort?
ea070d06-21fa-45fe-bfbb-5a8c4619184c.a: The onsite restaurant serves affordable, fresh food sourced from the organic garden, with guests praising both the quality and value of the meals in a beautiful setting overlooking the rice fields.

ea070d06-21fa-45fe-bfbb-5a8c4619184c.q: Is Om Ham Retreat & Resort good for relaxation and wellness?
ea070d06-21fa-45fe-bfbb-5a8c4619184c.a: Absolutely—guests describe it as a peaceful place to relax and recharge, with many highlighting the Mandala flower experience and yoga retreats as transformative wellness activities during their visit.

ea070d06-21fa-45fe-bfbb-5a8c4619184c.q: What do guests say about the staff at Om Ham Retreat & Resort?
ea070d06-21fa-45fe-bfbb-5a8c4619184c.a: Guests consistently praise the staff as exceptionally kind, attentive, and well-trained, with many noting they go above and beyond to accommodate special requests and create memorable experiences.

004633ce-c106-41b0-b646-9409135d19c3.q: Where is Petit Palace Suites located?
004633ce-c106-41b0-b646-9409135d19c3.a: Petit Palace Suites is situated in Fira, Santorini, perched on the side of a cliff with stunning caldera views. It's centrally positioned on the island with shuttle service to Fira, making it an ideal base to explore Santorini beyond the crowded Oia area.

004633ce-c106-41b0-b646-9409135d19c3.q: How cosy is Petit Palace Suites?
004633ce-c106-41b0-b646-9409135d19c3.a: Petit Palace Suites has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10, offering a warm and welcoming atmosphere with comfortable beds, spacious bathrooms, and thoughtfully maintained spaces that guests consistently praise.

004633ce-c106-41b0-b646-9409135d19c3.q: Is the service good at Petit Palace Suites?
004633ce-c106-41b0-b646-9409135d19c3.a: Yes, guests rave about the exceptional service at Petit Palace Suites. The entire team, particularly staff members like Kostas and Orea, are described as exceptionally friendly, attentive, and genuinely caring—making guests feel welcomed and special from arrival onwards.

004633ce-c106-41b0-b646-9409135d19c3.q: What are the views like at Petit Palace Suites?
004633ce-c106-41b0-b646-9409135d19c3.a: The views are breathtaking, with guests consistently highlighting the impeccable caldera views visible from the hotel's clifftop location. The pool and dining areas offer spectacular vistas that many guests describe as a defining feature of their stay.

004633ce-c106-41b0-b646-9409135d19c3.q: Does Petit Palace Suites have a restaurant?
004633ce-c106-41b0-b646-9409135d19c3.a: Yes, Petit Palace Suites has an on-site restaurant where guests enjoy excellent food and drinks. Breakfast is particularly praised, with guests mentioning warm mornings with the knowledgeable staff who offer great recommendations.

004633ce-c106-41b0-b646-9409135d19c3.q: Is Petit Palace Suites good for a return visit?
004633ce-c106-41b0-b646-9409135d19c3.a: Absolutely—many guests return to Petit Palace Suites and report their second stay was even better than the first. With a guest rating of 4.8 out of 5 from 472 reviews, it's clearly a hotel that leaves a lasting, positive impression.

b8c6adad-9946-4055-95fc-f3bfb57cf549.a: Vilia Florence is situated just outside Florence's city centre, with excellent public transport links. The tram stop is right in front of the apartment, putting you about 10 minutes by tram from the historic centre.
Vilia Florence scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness, offering a comfortable and welcoming space for extended stays or holidays in Florence.

b8c6adad-9946-4055-95fc-f3bfb57cf549.q: What do guests say about the owners of Vilia Florence?
b8c6adad-9946-4055-95fc-f3bfb57cf549.a: Guests consistently praise the owners, Bernardo and his wife, for being attentive, warm, and genuinely responsive to every need. One guest stayed for a month during a house renovation and found them unfailingly helpful.

b8c6adad-9946-4055-95fc-f3bfb57cf549.q: Does Vilia Florence have outdoor space?
b8c6adad-9946-4055-95fc-f3bfb57cf549.a: Yes—the apartment features a lovely terrace, which guests describe as a real gem that adds to the overall appeal of the property.

b8c6adad-9946-4055-95fc-f3bfb57cf549.q: Is Vilia Florence good for longer stays?
b8c6adad-9946-4055-95fc-f3bfb57cf549.a: Absolutely. Guests have stayed for extended periods and found it excellent for that purpose, with responsive owners and a comfortable, well-equipped space that feels like home.

8701ea07-7ecc-4eae-911c-f795ed98ff8b.q: Where is Hotel Dukes' Palace located?
8701ea07-7ecc-4eae-911c-f795ed98ff8b.a: Hotel Dukes' Palace is in the heart of Brugge, Belgium, within easy walking distance of the historic district and surrounded by restaurants. Guests consistently praise its central position as excellent for exploring the city.

8701ea07-7ecc-4eae-911c-f795ed98ff8b.q: How cosy is Hotel Dukes' Palace?
8701ea07-7ecc-4eae-911c-f795ed98ff8b.a: Hotel Dukes' Palace has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10, indicating a comfortable but fairly formal atmosphere. That said, many guests describe the hotel as peaceful and restful, with one noting it's 'very quiet at night'.

8701ea07-7ecc-4eae-911c-f795ed98ff8b.q: Is the breakfast good at Hotel Dukes' Palace?
8701ea07-7ecc-4eae-911c-f795ed98ff8b.a: Yes—guests rave about the breakfast at Hotel Dukes' Palace, with one calling it 'one of the best I've ever had' and another highlighting the Belgian chocolate. It's clearly a standout feature of the stay.

8701ea07-7ecc-4eae-911c-f795ed98ff8b.q: Does Hotel Dukes' Palace have a spa?
8701ea07-7ecc-4eae-911c-f795ed98ff8b.a: Yes, Hotel Dukes' Palace has a spa on site. Guests who booked spa packages reported that it enriched their experience, and one couple even noted it was particularly special for their honeymoon stay.

8701ea07-7ecc-4eae-911c-f795ed98ff8b.q: Is Hotel Dukes' Palace good for couples?
8701ea07-7ecc-4eae-911c-f795ed98ff8b.a: Hotel Dukes' Palace is well-suited for couples, especially those celebrating special occasions. One honeymoon couple received extra gifts and praised the peaceful garden and beautiful building, whilst another couple enjoyed the spacious rooms and excellent breakfast together.

8701ea07-7ecc-4eae-911c-f795ed98ff8b.q: What is the staff like at Hotel Dukes' Palace?
8701ea07-7ecc-4eae-911c-f795ed98ff8b.a: Staff at Hotel Dukes' Palace are consistently described as friendly, welcoming, and helpful. Guests noted they were accommodating with questions and needs, making for a warm and attentive service experience.

18a38dfd-8000-4b6e-a2b4-b39190024146.a: Mikihan Ryokan is in central Japan, a short walk from a major shopping hub, making it very convenient for exploring the local area.
Mikihan Ryokan has a cosy score of 6.3/10, reflecting its traditional Japanese ryokan character with authentic rooms and facilities, though some guests note the building shows its age.

18a38dfd-8000-4b6e-a2b4-b39190024146.q: What is the service like at Mikihan Ryokan?
18a38dfd-8000-4b6e-a2b4-b39190024146.a: Guests consistently praise the staff as polite, pleasant, extremely respectful and efficient, with many highlighting the fantastic authentic ryokan experience they received.

18a38dfd-8000-4b6e-a2b4-b39190024146.q: Is the food good at Mikihan Ryokan?
18a38dfd-8000-4b6e-a2b4-b39190024146.a: Yes—guests rave about the food, particularly the seasonal dinner served in your room and the generous, delicious breakfast, though some suggest exploring local restaurants for dinner alternatives.

18a38dfd-8000-4b6e-a2b4-b39190024146.q: Does Mikihan Ryokan have a bath or onsen?
18a38dfd-8000-4b6e-a2b4-b39190024146.a: Mikihan Ryokan has a basement onsen (hot spring bath) with a large communal bath where guests can relax and enjoy a traditional bathing experience, though note it operates with hot water only.

18a38dfd-8000-4b6e-a2b4-b39190024146.q: What do guests say about the rooms at Mikihan Ryokan?
18a38dfd-8000-4b6e-a2b4-b39190024146.a: Rooms are spacious, very clean, and traditionally Japanese in style with beds set up by staff, though some guests mention the building is showing age and a few facilities need updating.

a4435049-88a2-420e-be7c-3fae4f810d7f.a: Hotel Palatinus is situated on Király u. 5 in Pécs, Hungary, in the heart of the city centre within walking distance of major attractions and sights.

a4435049-88a2-420e-be7c-3fae4f810d7f.q: What is the cosy score for Hotel Palatinus?
a4435049-88a2-420e-be7c-3fae4f810d7f.a: Hotel Palatinus has a cosy score of 5.0 out of 10, indicating a moderate level of comfort and warmth in its atmosphere.

a4435049-88a2-420e-be7c-3fae4f810d7f.q: Is Hotel Palatinus good for Art Deco enthusiasts?
a4435049-88a2-420e-be7c-3fae4f810d7f.a: Yes, guests have praised Hotel Palatinus for its distinctive Art Deco character and beautifully renovated public areas, making it appealing if you appreciate period architecture and design.

a4435049-88a2-420e-be7c-3fae4f810d7f.q: What is the breakfast like at Hotel Palatinus?
a4435049-88a2-420e-be7c-3fae4f810d7f.a: The breakfast buffet at Hotel Palatinus offers variety to suit different tastes, though some guests noted it could be better organised; staff are generally hospitable and helpful during service.

a4435049-88a2-420e-be7c-3fae4f810d7f.q: Does Hotel Palatinus have a sauna?
a4435049-88a2-420e-be7c-3fae4f810d7f.a: Yes, Hotel Palatinus has a sauna on-site, along with an on-site restaurant for dining convenience.

a4435049-88a2-420e-be7c-3fae4f810d7f.q: What do guests say about the rooms at Hotel Palatinus?
a4435049-88a2-420e-be7c-3fae4f810d7f.a: Guest opinions on rooms vary considerably—some find them simple and compact, whilst others appreciate features like balconies or terraces; cleanliness is generally good, though some note the building's age shows in fixtures like bathrooms.

25adf107-da49-4b5b-aa9b-fa1e7f870786.q: Where is Ca' San Rocco located in Venice?
25adf107-da49-4b5b-aa9b-fa1e7f870786.a: Ca' San Rocco sits in a quiet area of Venice, just a 10-minute walk from Venezia Santa Lucia railway station, Piazzale Roma, and vaporetto stops, making it perfectly positioned for exploring the main attractions on foot.

25adf107-da49-4b5b-aa9b-fa1e7f870786.q: How cosy is Ca' San Rocco?
25adf107-da49-4b5b-aa9b-fa1e7f870786.a: Ca' San Rocco has a cosy score of 6.3/10, offering a calm, peaceful atmosphere with a beautiful garden and quiet surroundings, though it's a compact property rather than sprawling.

25adf107-da49-4b5b-aa9b-fa1e7f870786.q: Is the service good at Ca' San Rocco?
25adf107-da49-4b5b-aa9b-fa1e7f870786.a: Yes—guests consistently praise the staff's exceptional hospitality, describing them as warm, helpful, and caring, with detailed knowledge of the city and its attractions.

25adf107-da49-4b5b-aa9b-fa1e7f870786.q: What is breakfast like at Ca' San Rocco?
25adf107-da49-4b5b-aa9b-fa1e7f870786.a: Breakfast is a real highlight, served on a lovely patio overlooking the garden with a good variety including fresh fruit, cheese, deli meats, baked goods, bacon and egg cups, cereals, and cappuccinos made to order.

25adf107-da49-4b5b-aa9b-fa1e7f870786.q: Are the rooms at Ca' San Rocco clean and comfortable?
25adf107-da49-4b5b-aa9b-fa1e7f870786.a: Guests consistently report spacious, spotless rooms with fresh renovated bathrooms, simple but thoughtful touches like kettles, tea, coffee, a small fridge, and complimentary water bottles.

25adf107-da49-4b5b-aa9b-fa1e7f870786.q: What do guests rate Ca' San Rocco overall?
25adf107-da49-4b5b-aa9b-fa1e7f870786.a: Ca' San Rocco has a 4.7/5 rating from 138 guests, who describe it as a gem that rivals many five-star hotels, praising its cleanliness, comfort, and peaceful location.

03e13640-c137-4c56-a6fe-65b7a3b92262.q: Where is Janus Boutique Hotel & Spa located?
03e13640-c137-4c56-a6fe-65b7a3b92262.a: Janus Boutique Hotel & Spa is situated on Fő utca in central Siófok, Hungary, roughly 500 metres from Lake Balaton's beach and within easy walking distance of the town centre.

03e13640-c137-4c56-a6fe-65b7a3b92262.q: How cosy is Janus Boutique Hotel & Spa?
03e13640-c137-4c56-a6fe-65b7a3b92262.a: The hotel scores 5.0 out of 10 for cosiness, reflecting a mix of beautifully decorated spaces and some variability in room quality and comfort across different guest experiences.

03e13640-c137-4c56-a6fe-65b7a3b92262.q: Is the spa good at Janus Boutique Hotel & Spa?
03e13640-c137-4c56-a6fe-65b7a3b92262.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the spa as big, beautifully decorated and fully functional, with jacuzzi pools, swimming pools, saunas and fitness facilities included in stays—though some note the pool can be cold in winter.

03e13640-c137-4c56-a6fe-65b7a3b92262.q: What is the breakfast like at Janus Boutique Hotel & Spa?
03e13640-c137-4c56-a6fe-65b7a3b92262.a: Breakfast is a genuine highlight, with guests calling it excellent and delicious, served during generous hours with all-day access to hot and cold non-alcoholic beverages.

03e13640-c137-4c56-a6fe-65b7a3b92262.q: Is Janus Boutique Hotel & Spa good for couples?
03e13640-c137-4c56-a6fe-65b7a3b92262.a: Yes, the hotel is well-suited for couples, with themed romantic rooms featuring high ceilings and beautiful décor, plus spa facilities and an inner garden that guests describe as charming.

03e13640-c137-4c56-a6fe-65b7a3b92262.q: What do guests say about the staff at Janus Boutique Hotel & Spa?
03e13640-c137-4c56-a6fe-65b7a3b92262.a: Staff are consistently praised as kind, enthusiastic and helpful, with reception and breakfast teams speaking English and German and going out of their way to assist guests.

2a446c14-f9e7-4577-a266-1857f07d7d79.q: Where is NH Collection Venezia Grand Hotel Palazzo dei Dogi located?
2a446c14-f9e7-4577-a266-1857f07d7d79.a: The hotel sits in a quiet, residential neighbourhood in Venice, Italy, about a 10–20 minute walk from San Marco, the Rialto, and the Arsenale. It's close to the Orto Vaporetto stop and far enough from the busier city centre to feel peaceful, yet still immersed in Venetian life.

2a446c14-f9e7-4577-a266-1857f07d7d79.q: How cosy is NH Collection Venezia Grand Hotel Palazzo dei Dogi?
2a446c14-f9e7-4577-a266-1857f07d7d79.a: The hotel scores 6.3/10 for cosiness. Guests consistently praise the quiet, peaceful atmosphere and comfortable rooms with large beds, though the score reflects a more elegant, spacious feel than intimate warmth.

2a446c14-f9e7-4577-a266-1857f07d7d79.q: Is the breakfast good at NH Collection Venezia Grand Hotel Palazzo dei Dogi?
2a446c14-f9e7-4577-a266-1857f07d7d79.a: Yes—guests rave about the expansive breakfast buffet, highlighting the variety, quality, and freshness of the food. The breakfast team, including staff members like Tahani and Maria, are praised for their care and organisation.

2a446c14-f9e7-4577-a266-1857f07d7d79.q: Does NH Collection Venezia Grand Hotel Palazzo dei Dogi have a spa?
2a446c14-f9e7-4577-a266-1857f07d7d79.a: Yes, the hotel has a spa on site, though guest reviews focus more on the gardens, bar service, and overall tranquility of the property.

2a446c14-f9e7-4577-a266-1857f07d7d79.q: Is NH Collection Venezia Grand Hotel Palazzo dei Dogi good for a romantic getaway?
2a446c14-f9e7-4577-a266-1857f07d7d79.a: Absolutely. Guests have celebrated special occasions here and praise the stunning gardens with a boat landing overlooking Murano and the Alps, the quiet location, and the warm, attentive service from staff like Elena and Raquel at the bar.

2a446c14-f9e7-4577-a266-1857f07d7d79.q: What is the guest rating for NH Collection Venezia Grand Hotel Palazzo dei Dogi?
2a446c14-f9e7-4577-a266-1857f07d7d79.a: The hotel has a 4.5/5 guest rating based on 789 reviews, with visitors consistently highlighting the peaceful location, excellent breakfast, beautiful gardens, and exceptionally kind staff.

43accbc7-8400-43be-a2c6-f306a98c2a1c.q: Where is Trinity Lodge located in Dublin?
43accbc7-8400-43be-a2c6-f306a98c2a1c.a: Trinity Lodge sits on a quiet side street in the heart of Dublin, very close to Trinity College and all central amenities and sights, making it an excellent base for exploring the city.

Trinity Lodge has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10. Guests consistently praise the spacious, comfortable rooms and peaceful atmosphere, though the period Georgian townhouse layout means there are stairs to navigate.

43accbc7-8400-43be-a2c6-f306a98c2a1c.q: Is the breakfast good at Trinity Lodge?
43accbc7-8400-43be-a2c6-f306a98c2a1c.a: Yes—guests rave about the breakfast, describing it as amazing with excellent choice and hearty portions. The staff are attentive and willing to accommodate special requests, though you'll need to confirm your breakfast time the day before due to the intimate dining space.

43accbc7-8400-43be-a2c6-f306a98c2a1c.q: Are the rooms at Trinity Lodge spacious and clean?

e03cb18b-08bc-4dcb-8e0f-21f3592720eb.q: Is Alpin Garden Luxury Maison & Spa good for couples?

53c431c9-5257-4af7-8974-72dffe3accc1.a: Agriturismo Cerreto is nestled in the Tuscan countryside near Siena, Italia, within easy reach of the charming town of Pienza and surrounding villages—perfect for exploring the region's stunning landscapes and local attractions.

53c431c9-5257-4af7-8974-72dffe3accc1.q: What is breakfast like at Agriturismo Cerreto?
53c431c9-5257-4af7-8974-72dffe3accc1.a: Breakfast at Agriturismo Cerreto is a genuine highlight—Monica delivers a basket of fresh, homemade goods to your room each morning, featuring produce and items from the property's own farm, olive oil and wine production.

53c431c9-5257-4af7-8974-72dffe3accc1.q: Is the owner of Agriturismo Cerreto helpful?

30b5757f-2aeb-4a59-a906-0408cb2b59d5.q: Where is Kaiser23 located in Vienna?
30b5757f-2aeb-4a59-a906-0408cb2b59d5.a: Kaiser23 is brilliantly positioned near one of Vienna's main train stations and the central shopping street, with easy walking distance to the MuseumsQuartier—ideal if you want to explore the city without lengthy commutes.
Kaiser23 has a cosy score of 5.0 out of 10, making it a practical, no-frills choice suited to budget travellers and those passing through rather than seeking a retreat atmosphere.

30b5757f-2aeb-4a59-a906-0408cb2b59d5.q: Is the breakfast good at Kaiser23?
30b5757f-2aeb-4a59-a906-0408cb2b59d5.a: Yes, guests consistently praise Kaiser23's breakfast as good and solid, and combined with the fast internet and helpful 24-hour staff, it's a reliable start to your day.

Kaiser23 works well for couples who prefer privacy and don't want to socialise with other guests; the staff are friendly and helpful, and you can arrange luggage storage to explore the city during the day.

30b5757f-2aeb-4a59-a906-0408cb2b59d5.q: What's the service like at Kaiser23?

30b5757f-2aeb-4a59-a906-0408cb2b59d5.q: Are the rooms and bathrooms clean at Kaiser23?
30b5757f-2aeb-4a59-a906-0408cb2b59d5.a: Yes, guests report clean, tidy rooms and excellent showers; note that some rooms have shared bathrooms and you'll find comfy robes provided, though soundproofing between rooms can be minimal.

51307397-b728-429b-99b3-5631577dd14d.a: Locanda Stravedo is in San Pietro in Volta on Pellestrina Island, in the Venetian lagoon. It sits right on the water with views over the lagoon, and guests praise its peaceful setting that feels worlds away from bustling Venice.

Locanda Stravedo scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness. Guests describe it as a welcoming, straightforward place with comfortable rooms, friendly staff, and a relaxed atmosphere perfect for a quiet retreat.

51307397-b728-429b-99b3-5631577dd14d.q: What is the food like at Locanda Stravedo?
51307397-b728-429b-99b3-5631577dd14d.a: The food is honest, super fresh seafood with a distinctive touch that sets it apart from other restaurants on the island. Guests highlight the mixed seafood starters, fresh oysters, and fairly priced wine and Prosecco, all served with lagoon views.

51307397-b728-429b-99b3-5631577dd14d.q: Is Locanda Stravedo good for a romantic getaway?
51307397-b728-429b-99b3-5631577dd14d.a: Yes—guests describe enchanting dinners by the water with first-class sunset views, and many call it their perfect weekend escape. The waterside setting and family-owned warmth make it ideal for couples seeking a peaceful lagoon retreat.

51307397-b728-429b-99b3-5631577dd14d.q: What activities are available at Locanda Stravedo?
51307397-b728-429b-99b3-5631577dd14d.a: The hotel offers bike rentals, perfect for exploring Pellestrina Island, and there's a quiet beach nearby. The bar and restaurant overlook the lagoon, making it easy to relax with a drink and watch the water.

57fca9fb-ffcd-4e03-badf-b19374be6224.a: Kolbeck is in Vienna, Austria, within walking distance of the central train station. The location is excellent for transport, with easy access to the metro, tram, and surrounding cafés, restaurants and bars.
Kolbeck has a cosy score of 5.0 out of 10, indicating a moderate level of comfort and warmth. It's a clean, functional boutique hotel rather than an especially intimate retreat.

57fca9fb-ffcd-4e03-badf-b19374be6224.q: Is the service good at Kolbeck?
57fca9fb-ffcd-4e03-badf-b19374be6224.a: Yes. Guests consistently praise the staff as very nice and helpful. Breakfast is à la carte, served from a menu with quick service. Guests appreciate this approach for reducing food waste, and you can order what you want rather than a buffet. The downstairs breakfast space is described as perfect for eating and drinking.

57fca9fb-ffcd-4e03-badf-b19374be6224.q: Are the rooms clean and well-equipped at Kolbeck?
57fca9fb-ffcd-4e03-badf-b19374be6224.a: Yes. Guests consistently report rooms are very clean and comfortable, with useful amenities including Wi-Fi, TV, air conditioning, heating, an espresso or coffee machine, and good natural light. Card-key entry and an elevator make access easy.

34581b83-0b56-484d-b941-73aa614b7841.q: Where is Hørhavegårdens ferielejligheder og B&B located?

34581b83-0b56-484d-b941-73aa614b7841.q: Is the breakfast good at Hørhavegårdens ferielejligheder og B&B?
34581b83-0b56-484d-b941-73aa614b7841.a: Yes—guests rave about the breakfast, describing it as delicious and very filling. The hosts prepare it themselves and it's included with B&B stays, adding genuine warmth to the experience.

34581b83-0b56-484d-b941-73aa614b7841.q: What is the service like at Hørhavegårdens ferielejligheder og B&B?
34581b83-0b56-484d-b941-73aa614b7841.a: Guests consistently highlight the exceptionally friendly and responsive hosts, Martin and his family. They're described as kind, helpful, and among the most welcoming hosts visitors have encountered.

34581b83-0b56-484d-b941-73aa614b7841.q: Is Hørhavegårdens ferielejligheder og B&B good for families?
34581b83-0b56-484d-b941-73aa614b7841.a: Absolutely. Guests with young children praise it as perfect for families, with a beautiful garden, forest access just 30 seconds away, and a peaceful, safe setting ideal for children.

34581b83-0b56-484d-b941-73aa614b7841.q: What outdoor activities are available near Hørhavegårdens ferielejligheder og B&B?
34581b83-0b56-484d-b941-73aa614b7841.a: The property is surrounded by forest with countless mountain biking and running trails, plus a beach walk just minutes away with views towards Aarhus harbour—excellent for active guests.

0f5b243f-8048-4871-9cfc-20e60153b884.a: Agriturismo Poggiacolle sits in the Tuscan hills just 3km from San Gimignano, Italy, surrounded by vineyards, olive groves, and countryside that guests describe as postcard-perfect, making it an ideal base for exploring the region's hill towns.

0f5b243f-8048-4871-9cfc-20e60153b884.q: What is breakfast like at Agriturismo Poggiacolle?
0f5b243f-8048-4871-9cfc-20e60153b884.a: Breakfast is a genuine highlight: guests rave about the generous buffet with freshly baked cakes, excellent cappuccino, and plenty of options, served daily by friendly staff who happily accommodate special dietary requests.

0f5b243f-8048-4871-9cfc-20e60153b884.q: Is Agriturismo Poggiacolle good for families?

0f5b243f-8048-4871-9cfc-20e60153b884.q: What activities and experiences does Agriturismo Poggiacolle offer?
0f5b243f-8048-4871-9cfc-20e60153b884.a: The property features an infinity pool, a restaurant open for breakfast daily and dinner twice weekly (booking required), and cooking classes led by staff like Debora, which guests describe as unforgettable highlights of their stay.

0f5b243f-8048-4871-9cfc-20e60153b884.a: Guests consistently call it the most beautiful place they stayed in Italy, with breathtaking views of San Gimignano and the patchwork Tuscan hills of olives and grapes—the scenery alone makes it exceptional.

87833713-beeb-4218-a20d-b37df4a67eb9.q: Where is Ad Hoc Carmen located?
87833713-beeb-4218-a20d-b37df4a67eb9.a: Ad Hoc Carmen is in València, España, in a quiet street just two blocks from Plaza de la Virgen and the old town's main sights. 87833713-beeb-4218-a20d-b37df4a67eb9.q: How cosy is Ad Hoc Carmen?

87833713-beeb-4218-a20d-b37df4a67eb9.a: No, Ad Hoc Carmen has no on-site restaurant or breakfast service. However, there are numerous cafés and restaurants within easy walking distance, and the hotel offers a discount at a nearby establishment.

3278488b-7937-45ec-b122-85e444031862.a: Arnolds is in Interlaken, Switzerland, conveniently positioned between the two train stations and just a short walk from the lake and scenic riverside paths. It's an excellent base for exploring the area, with easy access to Grindelwald village and local trails.

3278488b-7937-45ec-b122-85e444031862.q: Is the breakfast good at Arnolds Bed&Breakfast?
3278488b-7937-45ec-b122-85e444031862.a: Yes — guests repeatedly highlight the delicious breakfast as a real highlight of their stay. It's generous for the price and sets you up well for a day of exploring the Swiss mountains and valleys.

3278488b-7937-45ec-b122-85e444031862.q: What is the host like at Arnolds Bed&Breakfast?
3278488b-7937-45ec-b122-85e444031862.a: The host Armin is genuinely welcoming and knowledgeable. Guests praise his warmth, willingness to chat about local activities, helpful tips for rainy days, and attentiveness to their needs — he even accommodated late check-ins and provided clear communication for remote arrivals.

3278488b-7937-45ec-b122-85e444031862.q: Is Arnolds Bed&Breakfast good for couples?
3278488b-7937-45ec-b122-85e444031862.a: Yes. Couples have had wonderful stays here, appreciating the comfortable rooms, excellent location, delicious breakfast, and Armin's thoughtful hospitality and local advice, making it an ideal romantic base in the Interlaken region.

3278488b-7937-45ec-b122-85e444031862.q: What amenities does Arnolds Bed&Breakfast offer?
3278488b-7937-45ec-b122-85e444031862.a: Rooms feature comfortable beds, private shower and toilet, TV, WiFi, kettle, fridge, central heating, and magnificent Alpine views.
