7d105d30-d8a0-4318-a6ee-120b9d69e7d0.a: Villa Flore is in Sant'Agnello, Italy, on the Sorrento Peninsula. It's a peaceful hillside setting with stunning water and landscape views, though guests note it's somewhat remote, so having transport or arranging local recommendations from your host is helpful.

Villa Flore scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness. Guests consistently praise the beautiful décor, spotless interiors, and thoughtfully arranged outdoor spaces—the balcony and pool areas are particularly welcoming for relaxing and taking in the views.

7d105d30-d8a0-4318-a6ee-120b9d69e7d0.q: Is Villa Flore good for large groups or families?
7d105d30-d8a0-4318-a6ee-120b9d69e7d0.a: Yes, Villa Flore works brilliantly for groups. It has four spacious bedrooms and has comfortably hosted parties of 7–8 people, including families with young children. Guests highlight the pool, patio, and plenty of activities to keep everyone entertained.

7d105d30-d8a0-4318-a6ee-120b9d69e7d0.q: What is the host like at Villa Flore?
7d105d30-d8a0-4318-a6ee-120b9d69e7d0.a: Your host Tina is exceptional. Guests consistently describe her as warm, attentive, and generous with local knowledge—she meets you at check-in, gives a thorough tour, and provides insider tips on restaurants and excursions off the beaten path.

7d105d30-d8a0-4318-a6ee-120b9d69e7d0.q: Does Villa Flore have a kitchen for self-catering?
7d105d30-d8a0-4318-a6ee-120b9d69e7d0.a: Yes, the villa has a well-equipped kitchen where guests have cooked several meals during their stay. Tina can also arrange dinners from local restaurants like La Rosa if you'd prefer not to cook.

7d105d30-d8a0-4318-a6ee-120b9d69e7d0.q: What outdoor facilities does Villa Flore have?
7d105d30-d8a0-4318-a6ee-120b9d69e7d0.a: The villa features a lovely patio with beautiful views, a comfortable balcony area, and a pool. Guests rave about spending their days relaxing by the water and enjoying the stunning scenery from the outdoor spaces.

dc007df6-9adb-4fe2-9bf9-5b89018475df.q: Where is West Point Inn located?
dc007df6-9adb-4fe2-9bf9-5b89018475df.a: West Point Inn sits atop a mountain in San Francisco, accessible only by hiking—roughly 45 minutes to an hour up fire trails from the Bootjack parking lot or Pantoll area. It's a genuinely remote, hidden gem nestled in nature.

dc007df6-9adb-4fe2-9bf9-5b89018475df.q: How cosy is West Point Inn?
dc007df6-9adb-4fe2-9bf9-5b89018475df.a: West Point Inn scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness. Guests praise its rustic, welcoming atmosphere, with clean rooms and charming mountain views that create a relaxing, idyllic retreat.

dc007df6-9adb-4fe2-9bf9-5b89018475df.q: Is West Point Inn good for couples?
dc007df6-9adb-4fe2-9bf9-5b89018475df.a: Yes—the inn has a romantic, intimate feel perfect for couples. One guest soaked in the bathtub whilst someone played piano, describing the evening as 'idyllic'; another praised the calm, charming setting ideal for relaxation.

dc007df6-9adb-4fe2-9bf9-5b89018475df.q: What's the service like at West Point Inn?
dc007df6-9adb-4fe2-9bf9-5b89018475df.a: The Innkeepers—including Kathy, Janice, Bob, Karl, Pat and David—are exceptionally warm and knowledgeable. Guests consistently highlight their helpfulness, going above and beyond to solve problems and share trail information; one visitor ranked service a '12 out of 10'.

dc007df6-9adb-4fe2-9bf9-5b89018475df.q: Does West Point Inn have a kitchen?
dc007df6-9adb-4fe2-9bf9-5b89018475df.a: Yes, the inn has a vast, fantastically equipped kitchen. Guests bring their own food and wine to cook and dine together, creating a communal, self-catering experience that many find relaxing and special.

dc007df6-9adb-4fe2-9bf9-5b89018475df.q: Is breakfast good at West Point Inn?
dc007df6-9adb-4fe2-9bf9-5b89018475df.a: The pancake breakfast is highly praised by guests. It's a highlight of the stay, though note you'll need to bring your own provisions and prepare meals yourself during your visit.

53a7436c-6158-4c58-b263-97640fb31f7d.q: Where is Croft House Cottages located?
53a7436c-6158-4c58-b263-97640fb31f7d.a: Croft House Cottages is in Applethwaite, a quiet village in the Lake District just a short walk or drive from Keswick. The cottages sit at the foot of Skiddaw with views over the Newland valley and surrounding fells, making it an ideal base for exploring the northern and western Lakes.

53a7436c-6158-4c58-b263-97640fb31f7d.q: How cosy is Croft House Cottages?
53a7436c-6158-4c58-b263-97640fb31f7d.a: Croft House Cottages has a cosy score of 7.0/10. Guests consistently describe the properties as cosy and welcoming, with thoughtful personal touches from hosts Jan and David that make visitors feel genuinely looked after.

53a7436c-6158-4c58-b263-97640fb31f7d.q: What is the arrival experience like at Croft House Cottages?
53a7436c-6158-4c58-b263-97640fb31f7d.a: Guests are greeted with genuine warmth and attention to detail. It's the kind of welcome that regularly exceeds expectations.

53a7436c-6158-4c58-b263-97640fb31f7d.q: Is Croft House Cottages good for a peaceful getaway?
53a7436c-6158-4c58-b263-97640fb31f7d.a: Yes. Many guests praise the perfect balance of tranquillity and convenience, with easy access to countless walks and outdoor activities.

53a7436c-6158-4c58-b263-97640fb31f7d.q: What makes the hosts at Croft House Cottages special?
53a7436c-6158-4c58-b263-97640fb31f7d.a: Jan and David are consistently praised as wonderful, welcoming and thoughtful hosts who provide excellent personal service. Guests return repeatedly, with many describing their stays as 'superb' and saying they can't wait to come back.

53a7436c-6158-4c58-b263-97640fb31f7d.q: Is Croft House Cottages well-equipped for a comfortable stay?
53a7436c-6158-4c58-b263-97640fb31f7d.a: Yes. The cottages are well-equipped with spacious lounges, bedrooms and bathrooms, private gardens, parking, and everything needed for a relaxing holiday. dea4548b-d442-4a42-8c8b-f5fa82df6368.q: Where is the Beauport Hotel Gloucester located?

1c76cddc-aa87-4688-a832-5dafd79afec6.a: Pletna is on Lake Bled in Bled, Slovenia. The traditional rowing boats ferry visitors from the lake shore to Bled Island and back, offering views of the picturesque alpine landscape.

1c76cddc-aa87-4688-a832-5dafd79afec6.q: Are the Pletna boats well maintained?

3a9af1d4-352c-47b6-9dd4-5c77d8e04b40.a: The property features a swimming pool, spacious and comfortable bedrooms with king-size beds, a well-equipped kitchen for cooking, a great shower, and beautiful gardens set within an olive grove with countryside views.

c1947322-e7bc-450d-9d94-d56a083d7e54.q: What is the service like at Trullimania B&B?
c1947322-e7bc-450d-9d94-d56a083d7e54.a: The owners—Christiana, Flavio, and their team—are genuinely warm and helpful. Guests consistently praise them for going above and beyond, offering excellent local restaurant and sightseeing tips, and even helping with practical matters like parking and car troubles.

c1947322-e7bc-450d-9d94-d56a083d7e54.q: Is Trullimania B&B clean and well-maintained?
c1947322-e7bc-450d-9d94-d56a083d7e54.a: Yes, guests repeatedly highlight that it's squeaky clean with excellent attention to detail throughout. Rooms feature comfortable mattresses, large bathrooms with showers, and many include a mini kitchen, all kept to a high standard.

c1947322-e7bc-450d-9d94-d56a083d7e54.q: What kind of accommodation does Trullimania B&B offer?
c1947322-e7bc-450d-9d94-d56a083d7e54.a: Trullimania B&B offers rooms and apartments within authentic trulli buildings (traditional cone-roofed structures). Units typically include en-suite bathrooms, some with kitchenettes, and access to outdoor spaces—though note that meals are not served on-site.

f785b122-1175-4417-9212-c67c14ae2857.a: Hotel Balm is in Meggen, just outside Lucerne in Switzerland. It's conveniently positioned near public transport with a bus stop close by that offers easy access into Lucerne itself.

Hotel Balm scores 6.3 out of 10 for cosiness. Guests consistently praise the clean, spacious rooms with beautiful views and describe them as updated and airy, creating a warm and welcoming atmosphere.

f785b122-1175-4417-9212-c67c14ae2857.q: What is the breakfast like at Hotel Balm?
f785b122-1175-4417-9212-c67c14ae2857.a: Breakfast at Hotel Balm is exceptional—guests have called it one of the best they've had in recent memory, with plenty of options to suit everyone. It's clearly a highlight of staying here.

f785b122-1175-4417-9212-c67c14ae2857.q: Is the staff friendly at Hotel Balm?
f785b122-1175-4417-9212-c67c14ae2857.a: The staff at Hotel Balm are genuinely warm and helpful. Guests describe them as brilliant, kind and like a family, going out of their way to assist—from reception to restaurant staff, everyone contributes to making your stay special.

f785b122-1175-4417-9212-c67c14ae2857.q: What facilities does Hotel Balm offer?
f785b122-1175-4417-9212-c67c14ae2857.a: Hotel Balm features spacious, modern rooms with lovely bathrooms, a pool with mountain views, a restaurant, complimentary tea and coffee in the reception area, and convenient parking. Some rooms offer balconies with stunning views.

f785b122-1175-4417-9212-c67c14ae2857.q: Is Hotel Balm good for a relaxing getaway?
f785b122-1175-4417-9212-c67c14ae2857.a: Yes—guests consistently describe their stays as perfect and say they want to return. The combination of spacious, clean rooms, excellent breakfast, attentive staff, mountain views and on-site pool makes it ideal for a restorative break near Lucerne.

006031b9-e42d-4073-9b51-b4f10b9f603e.q: Where is FINCH Boutique Hotel located?

006031b9-e42d-4073-9b51-b4f10b9f603e.q: How cosy is FINCH Boutique Hotel?
006031b9-e42d-4073-9b51-b4f10b9f603e.a: FINCH Boutique Hotel has a cosy score of 7.0/10. Guests consistently praise its warm, social atmosphere—the lobby is described as large and inviting with plenty of seating, and the bar area is bright and relaxing.

006031b9-e42d-4073-9b51-b4f10b9f603e.q: What is the service like at FINCH Boutique Hotel?
006031b9-e42d-4073-9b51-b4f10b9f603e.a: The staff at FINCH Boutique Hotel are exceptionally warm and professional. Guests repeatedly highlight their friendliness, attentiveness and helpfulness throughout the entire stay, from arrival to departure.

006031b9-e42d-4073-9b51-b4f10b9f603e.q: What are the rooms like at FINCH Boutique Hotel?
006031b9-e42d-4073-9b51-b4f10b9f603e.a: Rooms at FINCH Boutique Hotel are spacious, bright and thoughtfully decorated with clever layouts. They feature comfortable beds, great pillows, air conditioning, and well-appointed bathrooms—guests consistently praise the cleanliness and comfort.

006031b9-e42d-4073-9b51-b4f10b9f603e.q: Does FINCH Boutique Hotel serve breakfast?
006031b9-e42d-4073-9b51-b4f10b9f603e.a: Yes, FINCH Boutique Hotel serves an excellent breakfast featuring fresh, flavourful options with impressive variety and presentation. It's not a buffet style but guests find the display and quality exceptional.

006031b9-e42d-4073-9b51-b4f10b9f603e.q: Is FINCH Boutique Hotel good for a relaxing stay?
006031b9-e42d-4073-9b51-b4f10b9f603e.a: Absolutely. With its rated 4.8/5 from 370 reviews, FINCH Boutique Hotel offers a genuinely welcoming atmosphere. The gezellig (cosy) bar and lounge areas, combined with attentive staff and comfortable rooms, make it ideal for a restorative break.

0b4b918a-cd09-4d61-9bfe-80b183f6b6c4.a: Ryokan Yamamuro is in Owari-cho, Kanazawa, Ishikawa, Japan. It's about a 10-minute bus ride from the station, but the city is very walkable and the main attractions are nearby.
Ryokan Yamamuro has a cosy score of 7.7/10. Guests consistently praise its peaceful, authentic atmosphere and the quiet neighbourhood, which creates excellent conditions for quality sleep.

0b4b918a-cd09-4d61-9bfe-80b183f6b6c4.q: What is the hospitality like at Ryokan Yamamuro?
0b4b918a-cd09-4d61-9bfe-80b183f6b6c4.a: Bungo-san and his mother are exceptionally attentive hosts who go out of their way to welcome guests and offer thoughtful travel recommendations. Guests regularly describe feeling truly at home and note that Bungo reaches out before arrival to coordinate any needs.

0b4b918a-cd09-4d61-9bfe-80b183f6b6c4.q: What are the rooms like at Ryokan Yamamuro?
0b4b918a-cd09-4d61-9bfe-80b183f6b6c4.a: Rooms are traditionally styled with tatami flooring, futon beds, and pleasant seating areas. They're spotless and comfortable, with some offering garden views—a genuine ryokan experience rather than modern hotel accommodation.

0b4b918a-cd09-4d61-9bfe-80b183f6b6c4.q: Does Ryokan Yamamuro have a bath?
0b4b918a-cd09-4d61-9bfe-80b183f6b6c4.a: Yes, Ryokan Yamamuro has a private onsen (hot bath) that guests can use. Visitors highlight it as a wonderful way to relax after days of exploring the city.

0b4b918a-cd09-4d61-9bfe-80b183f6b6c4.q: Is Ryokan Yamamuro good for an authentic ryokan experience?
0b4b918a-cd09-4d61-9bfe-80b183f6b6c4.a: Absolutely. Guests consistently describe it as an excellent introduction to traditional ryokan stays, with the family's warmth and care combined with authentic Japanese-style rooms and shared facilities creating a memorable, genuine experience.

6c4c43df-218e-4863-8ee4-a42c65becc37.a: Hôtel Heliopic is in Chamonix, France, just a 13-minute walk from the train station and very close to the Aiguille du Midi lift station. It's also within easy walking distance of the town centre and the bus station (about 300 metres away).

Hôtel Heliopic scores 5.7 out of 10 for cosiness. Guests describe the décor as nicely and cosily decorated, with spacious, clean rooms that feel modern and comfortable, though the experience varies depending on the season and room location.

6c4c43df-218e-4863-8ee4-a42c65becc37.q: Is Hôtel Heliopic good for couples?
6c4c43df-218e-4863-8ee4-a42c65becc37.a: Yes — guests have praised it as an excellent choice for anniversaries and romantic stays. One couple reported an exceptional experience with a complimentary room upgrade, spacious accommodation, and amazing views that made their stay feel special.

6c4c43df-218e-4863-8ee4-a42c65becc37.q: What amenities does Hôtel Heliopic have?
6c4c43df-218e-4863-8ee4-a42c65becc37.a: The hotel features a spa that guests consistently praised as better than expected and well-organised, heated ski and boot lockers, and an excellent breakfast with good variety. There's also free water and sparkling water available throughout the hotel.

6c4c43df-218e-4863-8ee4-a42c65becc37.q: Is Hôtel Heliopic good for hiking and winter sports?
6c4c43df-218e-4863-8ee4-a42c65becc37.a: Absolutely — it's ideally positioned for both. The location near the Aiguille du Midi lift and hiking trails makes it perfect for summer activities, whilst guests particularly recommend it for winter stays. The heated ski lockers and proximity to ski access are major advantages for winter visitors.

6c4c43df-218e-4863-8ee4-a42c65becc37.q: What do guests say about the rooms at Hôtel Heliopic?
6c4c43df-218e-4863-8ee4-a42c65becc37.a: Rooms are generally spacious, clean, and well-kept, with quality bathroom amenities. However, room quality varies by location — some have excellent views and quiet settings, whilst others face the nearby highway or have sloped ceilings. Ground-floor rooms may lack privacy, so it's worth requesting your preferred room type at booking.

9552ed47-6a9f-4aa3-b4e6-0071c75ec6ec.q: Where is Design Hotel Neruda Prague located?
9552ed47-6a9f-4aa3-b4e6-0071c75ec6ec.a: Design Hotel Neruda Prague sits in Praha 1-Malá Strana, right below Prague Castle, making it an excellent base for exploring the castle and the charming old town.

9552ed47-6a9f-4aa3-b4e6-0071c75ec6ec.q: How cosy is Design Hotel Neruda Prague?
9552ed47-6a9f-4aa3-b4e6-0071c75ec6ec.a: The hotel scores 6.3 out of 10 for cosiness, offering a comfortable and welcoming atmosphere with tastefully decorated rooms and thoughtful personal touches throughout.

9552ed47-6a9f-4aa3-b4e6-0071c75ec6ec.q: Is the service good at Design Hotel Neruda Prague?
9552ed47-6a9f-4aa3-b4e6-0071c75ec6ec.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the staff as genuinely warm, friendly, and attentive—from front desk to housekeeping—with many noting they felt welcomed from the moment they arrived.

9552ed47-6a9f-4aa3-b4e6-0071c75ec6ec.q: What is breakfast like at Design Hotel Neruda Prague?
9552ed47-6a9f-4aa3-b4e6-0071c75ec6ec.a: The breakfast buffet is a highlight, with guests describing it as superb and delicious, featuring a good variety and even charming details like stones with meanings placed in water bottles each morning.

9552ed47-6a9f-4aa3-b4e6-0071c75ec6ec.q: Does Design Hotel Neruda Prague have a spa?
9552ed47-6a9f-4aa3-b4e6-0071c75ec6ec.a: Yes, the hotel has a spa facility available for guests looking to relax during their stay.

9552ed47-6a9f-4aa3-b4e6-0071c75ec6ec.q: Are the rooms at Design Hotel Neruda Prague large and clean?
9552ed47-6a9f-4aa3-b4e6-0071c75ec6ec.a: Guests report that rooms are spacious, spotlessly clean, and comfortably furnished, with amenities like bathtubs and good storage, even in single rooms.

bcd0b406-52f0-409b-8513-73f87920573d.q: Where is Le Mas d'Entremont located?
bcd0b406-52f0-409b-8513-73f87920573d.a: Le Mas d'Entremont is a few minutes north of Aix-en-Provence in the French countryside, about 10 minutes by car from the town centre. It's set in beautiful grounds that feel pleasantly removed from the city.

bcd0b406-52f0-409b-8513-73f87920573d.q: How cosy is Le Mas d'Entremont?
bcd0b406-52f0-409b-8513-73f87920573d.a: Le Mas d'Entremont has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10. Guests describe it as a charming, rustic property with cottage-style rooms that feel typically Provençal, though some note the building has a slightly run-down feel in places.

bcd0b406-52f0-409b-8513-73f87920573d.q: Is the restaurant at Le Mas d'Entremont good?
bcd0b406-52f0-409b-8513-73f87920573d.a: The restaurant has earned strong praise from guests, with some calling it outstanding and serving what they describe as exceptional French cuisine. However, booking policies can be inconsistent—some diners have reported being seated at the poolside snack menu rather than the main restaurant despite advance reservations.

bcd0b406-52f0-409b-8513-73f87920573d.q: What facilities and grounds does Le Mas d'Entremont have?
bcd0b406-52f0-409b-8513-73f87920573d.a: The hotel boasts beautiful grounds with a large pool, tennis courts, pétanque, and a fountain surrounded by flowers. Guests consistently praise the setting as spectacular and ideal for relaxation or special events like weddings.

Yes—the hotel is dog-friendly (with a supplement), has well-insulated rooms suitable for babies, and the restaurant can accommodate dietary requirements including vegan options. It's also a popular venue for group celebrations and family gatherings.

8027d8d6-ae13-4333-a7d6-8ab1b4bebdcf.q: Where is Belma Boutique Bed and Breakfast located?

8027d8d6-ae13-4333-a7d6-8ab1b4bebdcf.q: How cosy is Belma Boutique Bed and Breakfast?
8027d8d6-ae13-4333-a7d6-8ab1b4bebdcf.a: Belma scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness. It's a small, intimate bed and breakfast with a homely atmosphere where guests feel genuinely welcomed and well cared for by the friendly team.

8027d8d6-ae13-4333-a7d6-8ab1b4bebdcf.q: What is the service like at Belma Boutique Bed and Breakfast?
8027d8d6-ae13-4333-a7d6-8ab1b4bebdcf.a: The staff at Belma are exceptional and genuinely kind. Guests consistently highlight the warmth of team members like Pattie, Flavia, Jessica and Ingrid, who go out of their way to accommodate special requests—including vegan and gluten-free breakfast options—and make guests feel at home.

8027d8d6-ae13-4333-a7d6-8ab1b4bebdcf.q: What are the rooms and beds like at Belma Boutique Bed and Breakfast?
8027d8d6-ae13-4333-a7d6-8ab1b4bebdcf.a: Rooms feature comfortable beds—including rare king-size options at this price point—and many guests praise the spacious layouts. 8027d8d6-ae13-4333-a7d6-8ab1b4bebdcf.q: Is breakfast good at Belma Boutique Bed and Breakfast?
8027d8d6-ae13-4333-a7d6-8ab1b4bebdcf.a: Yes, breakfast is simple but delicious, made fresh each morning with quality coffee prepared on an espresso machine—a rarity in Peru. The team happily accommodates dietary preferences and special requests.

8027d8d6-ae13-4333-a7d6-8ab1b4bebdcf.q: What's the overall guest rating for Belma Boutique Bed and Breakfast?
8027d8d6-ae13-4333-a7d6-8ab1b4bebdcf.a: Belma has a strong 4.7 out of 5 stars from 166 guest reviews, with visitors consistently describing it as excellent value and a genuine home away from home.

d8ae55bf-a437-49e3-913f-d25436c77fc8.q: Where is Aspaki Exclusive Hotel by Art Maisons located?
d8ae55bf-a437-49e3-913f-d25436c77fc8.a: Aspaki Exclusive Hotel by Art Maisons is located in Oia, Santorini, Greece, positioned right among the island's most iconic scenery. d8ae55bf-a437-49e3-913f-d25436c77fc8.q: How cosy is Aspaki Exclusive Hotel by Art Maisons?
d8ae55bf-a437-49e3-913f-d25436c77fc8.a: Aspaki scores 6.3 out of 10 on the cosy scale, reflecting a warm but more intimate, design-forward aesthetic rather than a traditionally snug atmosphere. d8ae55bf-a437-49e3-913f-d25436c77fc8.q: What is the guest rating for Aspaki Exclusive Hotel by Art Maisons?
d8ae55bf-a437-49e3-913f-d25436c77fc8.a: Aspaki Exclusive Hotel by Art Maisons has a guest rating of 4.7 out of 5 stars based on 185 reviews. Visitors consistently praise the outstanding service, stunning views, and overall experience as unforgettable.

d8ae55bf-a437-49e3-913f-d25436c77fc8.q: Is the service good at Aspaki Exclusive Hotel by Art Maisons?
d8ae55bf-a437-49e3-913f-d25436c77fc8.a: Yes—guests repeatedly highlight the exceptional service, describing staff as warm, welcoming, incredibly kind, and helpful from check-in onwards. Many compare it to five-star service and note that staff go above and beyond to make stays special.

d8ae55bf-a437-49e3-913f-d25436c77fc8.q: Does Aspaki Exclusive Hotel by Art Maisons have a spa?
d8ae55bf-a437-49e3-913f-d25436c77fc8.a: Yes, Aspaki Exclusive Hotel by Art Maisons has a spa on-site. Guests describe the hotel as the most relaxing and luxurious place to stay, with excellent facilities well-maintained throughout.

d8ae55bf-a437-49e3-913f-d25436c77fc8.q: What is the food like at Aspaki Exclusive Hotel by Art Maisons?
d8ae55bf-a437-49e3-913f-d25436c77fc8.a: The on-premise restaurant is highly praised by guests, who note the food tastes exceptionally fresh and is above average. Visitors have remarked that the quality rivals organic standards and contributes to an outstanding overall experience.

9b4b5ecf-10f9-4bbc-8fc1-2e802f62161b.q: Where is Absolutum Wellness Hotel located?
9b4b5ecf-10f9-4bbc-8fc1-2e802f62161b.a: Absolutum Wellness Hotel is in Praha 7-Holešovice, Czechia, just a two-minute walk from the train station with easy access to the metro (C line), trams, and buses. 9b4b5ecf-10f9-4bbc-8fc1-2e802f62161b.q: How cosy is Absolutum Wellness Hotel?
9b4b5ecf-10f9-4bbc-8fc1-2e802f62161b.a: Absolutum Wellness Hotel has a cosy score of 5.7/10. Whilst guests appreciate the clean rooms, comfortable mattresses, and quiet atmosphere, the hotel is fairly compact and straightforward rather than particularly intimate or characterful.

9b4b5ecf-10f9-4bbc-8fc1-2e802f62161b.q: Is the staff friendly at Absolutum Wellness Hotel?
9b4b5ecf-10f9-4bbc-8fc1-2e802f62161b.a: Yes, guests consistently highlight the warmth and helpfulness of the staff. They're described as very friendly, kind, and attentive—managing daily room cleaning discreetly and going the extra mile, such as accommodating reservation changes due to illness.

9b4b5ecf-10f9-4bbc-8fc1-2e802f62161b.q: Does Absolutum Wellness Hotel have a spa?
9b4b5ecf-10f9-4bbc-8fc1-2e802f62161b.a: Yes, Absolutum Wellness Hotel has a wellness area with a sauna. Guests praise it as excellent, though note it is fairly compact. Couples' massage and spa packages are available, though booking should be arranged well in advance to secure preferred times.

9b4b5ecf-10f9-4bbc-8fc1-2e802f62161b.q: What is the breakfast like at Absolutum Wellness Hotel?
9b4b5ecf-10f9-4bbc-8fc1-2e802f62161b.a: Breakfast is straightforward and reliable, with good options available. Guests find it satisfactory rather than exceptional—it's consistent day to day, which some appreciate for its dependability, though others note it can feel repetitive over longer stays.

9b4b5ecf-10f9-4bbc-8fc1-2e802f62161b.q: What is the guest rating for Absolutum Wellness Hotel?
9b4b5ecf-10f9-4bbc-8fc1-2e802f62161b.a: Absolutum Wellness Hotel has a guest rating of 4.4 out of 5 stars based on 765 reviews, indicating strong overall satisfaction. Guests particularly commend its cleanliness, staff kindness, and convenient location near public transport.

e869b2fc-73ab-47cc-8170-52b8b8eb1f14.a: Friar's Lodge is in Kinsale, Ireland, positioned on a quiet street yet within walking distance of the town centre and local attractions. Guests consistently praise its convenient location for exploring the heart of this lovely coastal town.

e869b2fc-73ab-47cc-8170-52b8b8eb1f14.q: Is the breakfast good at Friar's Lodge?
e869b2fc-73ab-47cc-8170-52b8b8eb1f14.a: Yes, breakfast at Friar's Lodge is consistently praised by guests as great and delicious, and it's included with your stay. It's one of the standout features guests mention when recommending the lodge.

e869b2fc-73ab-47cc-8170-52b8b8eb1f14.q: What's the service like at Friar's Lodge?
e869b2fc-73ab-47cc-8170-52b8b8eb1f14.a: The staff at Friar's Lodge are described as exceptionally kind, welcoming, and helpful—some guests have called them the kindest and most welcoming people they've met. They're known for going above and beyond, from accommodating late arrivals to thoughtful gestures like bringing guests water unprompted.

e869b2fc-73ab-47cc-8170-52b8b8eb1f14.q: Are the rooms spacious at Friar's Lodge?
e869b2fc-73ab-47cc-8170-52b8b8eb1f14.a: Yes, guests frequently comment that rooms at Friar's Lodge are very large and spacious. Whilst some note they're a bit dated, they're consistently described as clean, comfortable, and well-equipped with all necessary amenities.
Yes, Friar's Lodge offers on-site off-street parking, which guests highlight as a genuine bonus given how rare parking is in Kinsale town centre.

e580d433-5eb4-4649-8b64-375e2bbb918e.q: Where is Twin Gables Guest House located?

e580d433-5eb4-4649-8b64-375e2bbb918e.a: Twin Gables scores 7.7/10 for cosiness, with guests praising its charming, beautifully decorated rooms full of character and warm, welcoming atmosphere.

e580d433-5eb4-4649-8b64-375e2bbb918e.q: Is the service good at Twin Gables Guest House?
e580d433-5eb4-4649-8b64-375e2bbb918e.a: Yes — guests consistently highlight LeAnn, the host, as warm, welcoming, and remarkably attentive, treating guests like old friends whilst respecting their privacy and even offering thoughtful upgrades when needed.

e580d433-5eb4-4649-8b64-375e2bbb918e.a: Yes — anniversary visitors and couples have praised the beautifully decorated rooms, comfortable beds, and attentive host, making it an ideal romantic retreat in Woodstock.

5a95735d-6fa4-4ea8-802c-c4daef9d765e.q: Where is the Omni Bedford Springs Resort & Spa located?
5a95735d-6fa4-4ea8-802c-c4daef9d765e.a: The Omni Bedford Springs Resort & Spa is located in Bedford, USA, positioned conveniently near major thoroughfares whilst feeling worlds away once you arrive on the grounds.

5a95735d-6fa4-4ea8-802c-c4daef9d765e.q: How cosy is the Omni Bedford Springs Resort & Spa?
5a95735d-6fa4-4ea8-802c-c4daef9d765e.a: The Omni Bedford Springs Resort & Spa has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10, offering a blend of historic character and modern comfort rather than intimate warmth.

af3c574f-3ac0-489a-a5f7-2ed84c942c0c.q: How cosy is Airdenair Guest House?
af3c574f-3ac0-489a-a5f7-2ed84c942c0c.a: Airdenair Guest House has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10, reflecting a mixed picture—some guests find it clean and comfortable, whilst others note that maintenance and furnishings could be improved.

af3c574f-3ac0-489a-a5f7-2ed84c942c0c.a: Yes, breakfast is included and guests praise it as well-stocked, with a good selection of bread, cereals, yoghurt, eggs, bacon, fruit, tea, coffee and juice.

af3c574f-3ac0-489a-a5f7-2ed84c942c0c.a: Free parking is available, though it's limited to weekends and evenings; street parking during weekday daytime hours (9.30am–11am) is subject to statutory charges.

af3c574f-3ac0-489a-a5f7-2ed84c942c0c.q: What do guests say about the host at Airdenair Guest House?
af3c574f-3ac0-489a-a5f7-2ed84c942c0c.a: Host Duncan receives consistent praise for being friendly, helpful and laid-back, making guests feel at home despite the guest house not being five-star accommodation.

af3c574f-3ac0-489a-a5f7-2ed84c942c0c.a: Rooms are generally a good size—guests with triple rooms report plenty of space for luggage and belongings—though comfort varies; some find beds and bedding comfortable, whilst others have noted issues with mattress quality and linen standards.

95bce616-352a-4498-bd31-47c110e915e0.q: Where is ByWard Blue Inn located?
95bce616-352a-4498-bd31-47c110e915e0.a: ByWard Blue Inn is in the heart of Ottawa, Ontario, right in the Byward Market neighbourhood. Guests love its walkable location near restaurants, shops, and local attractions — everything is within a few minutes' stroll.

95bce616-352a-4498-bd31-47c110e915e0.a: ByWard Blue Inn has a cosy score of 7.0/10. Guests consistently praise the warm, welcoming atmosphere and fully renovated interior, with one noting the hotel feels 'very cozy' despite the building's age.

Yes — cleanliness is a standout. Multiple guests remarked the hotel and rooms are 'spotless', with one visitor specifically mentioning they could 'truly feel and smell' the exceptional cleanliness throughout.

95bce616-352a-4498-bd31-47c110e915e0.q: What is the breakfast like at ByWard Blue Inn?
95bce616-352a-4498-bd31-47c110e915e0.a: Guests rave about the hot breakfast spread, with particular praise for good coffee and a milk frother. It's described as solid and generous for the price point, and many consider it a highlight of their stay.

95bce616-352a-4498-bd31-47c110e915e0.q: Is the staff at ByWard Blue Inn friendly?
95bce616-352a-4498-bd31-47c110e915e0.a: Absolutely. Guests consistently highlight the friendly, helpful front desk and housekeeping staff, with specific mentions of staff members going out of their way to help — from accommodating early arrivals to answering questions with clarity and warmth.

95bce616-352a-4498-bd31-47c110e915e0.q: Does ByWard Blue Inn have good amenities?
95bce616-352a-4498-bd31-47c110e915e0.a: Yes. The hotel features a sauna and rooftop, and rooms are well-equipped with quality touches like fluffy towels and robes. Guests note the amenities feel more like what you'd expect in a higher-star property.

4f6c3650-e7e1-4147-a0c0-45c86d1f2cce.q: Where is Pension Wild located in Vienna?
4f6c3650-e7e1-4147-a0c0-45c86d1f2cce.a: Pension Wild is centrally situated in Vienna, just 5–10 minutes on foot to the city centre and main sights, with excellent public transport access including the U-bahn metro lines nearby. Guests consistently praise its convenient location for reaching attractions whilst remaining in a quiet, peaceful area.

Pension Wild scores 5.7 out of 10 for cosiness. It's a straightforward, comfortable pension rather than a luxury retreat—guests describe rooms as spacious, clean, and genuinely warm, with good showers and practical amenities for a budget-friendly stay.

4f6c3650-e7e1-4147-a0c0-45c86d1f2cce.q: Is the breakfast good at Pension Wild?
4f6c3650-e7e1-4147-a0c0-45c86d1f2cce.a: Yes, breakfast at Pension Wild is excellent and included in the room price. Guests praise it as tasty and plentiful, with lovely bread, protein options, and tea and coffee—a real highlight that adds genuine value to your stay.

4f6c3650-e7e1-4147-a0c0-45c86d1f2cce.q: What is the service like at Pension Wild?
4f6c3650-e7e1-4147-a0c0-45c86d1f2cce.a: The staff at Pension Wild are warm, friendly, and genuinely helpful. Guests mention kind, attentive service and personal touches like a warm welcome from staff members, making the experience feel welcoming rather than impersonal.

4f6c3650-e7e1-4147-a0c0-45c86d1f2cce.q: Are the rooms clean and comfortable at Pension Wild?
4f6c3650-e7e1-4147-a0c0-45c86d1f2cce.a: Yes, rooms are consistently described as very clean, spacious, and comfortable, with good water pressure in the showers. They're simple and unpretentious but look exactly as pictured, making them reliable for a no-fuss stay.

4f6c3650-e7e1-4147-a0c0-45c86d1f2cce.q: Is Pension Wild good value for money?
4f6c3650-e7e1-4147-a0c0-45c86d1f2cce.a: Pension Wild is an excellent budget-friendly choice in Vienna, offering great value with clean, comfortable rooms, included breakfast, and a helpful staff—all without the price tag of luxury hotels.

58a806fd-a452-4c2f-8f2d-8f85bef69908.q: Where is Hotel Central located in Innsbruck?
58a806fd-a452-4c2f-8f2d-8f85bef69908.a: Hotel Central is in the heart of Innsbruck's old town, just a 2–5 minute walk from Marientheresien Street and within easy reach of landmarks like the Golden Roof and Watch Tower. The train station and Nordkette Congress Station are also nearby, making it ideal for exploring downtown on foot.
Hotel Central scores 6.3 out of 10 for cosiness. Guests appreciate its nostalgic charm, cute lobby, and historical character, though it's a practical, no-frills base rather than a luxury retreat.

58a806fd-a452-4c2f-8f2d-8f85bef69908.q: What is the breakfast like at Hotel Central?
58a806fd-a452-4c2f-8f2d-8f85bef69908.a: Guests consistently praise the breakfast as excellent and healthy, with fresh fruit juice available from an on-site juicer. The attached café also serves delicious desserts, making mornings a genuine highlight of a stay.

58a806fd-a452-4c2f-8f2d-8f85bef69908.q: Is the staff friendly at Hotel Central?
58a806fd-a452-4c2f-8f2d-8f85bef69908.a: Yes—guests repeatedly highlight the reception team as incredibly friendly, patient, and genuinely helpful, even going above and beyond with requests like sourcing an iced coffee in winter.

58a806fd-a452-4c2f-8f2d-8f85bef69908.q: What facilities does Hotel Central offer?
58a806fd-a452-4c2f-8f2d-8f85bef69908.a: The hotel has a sauna (towels available on request at reception), and rooms feature good heating and comfortable beds. Some rooms have tea-making facilities, though a kettle can be requested if yours doesn't have one.

58a806fd-a452-4c2f-8f2d-8f85bef69908.q: Are the rooms at Hotel Central comfortable?
58a806fd-a452-4c2f-8f2d-8f85bef69908.a: Guests describe rooms as comfortable and very clean, with great water pressure in bathrooms and some featuring lovely Alpine views. Beds are consistently praised as comfortable, and some rooms are notably spacious.

7a3ac0a7-1b37-44ad-bfcf-f1d875f49eb3.q: Where is Ash Tree Cottage B&B located?
7a3ac0a7-1b37-44ad-bfcf-f1d875f49eb3.a: Ash Tree Cottage B&B is in Brighton, United Kingdom, making it a convenient base for exploring the seaside town and its attractions.

7a3ac0a7-1b37-44ad-bfcf-f1d875f49eb3.q: How cosy is Ash Tree Cottage B&B?
7a3ac0a7-1b37-44ad-bfcf-f1d875f49eb3.a: Ash Tree Cottage B&B has a cosy score of 6.5/10, offering a warm and intimate atmosphere that guests appreciate for its personal touches and attentive care.

7a3ac0a7-1b37-44ad-bfcf-f1d875f49eb3.q: Is the breakfast good at Ash Tree Cottage B&B?
7a3ac0a7-1b37-44ad-bfcf-f1d875f49eb3.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the excellent breakfasts with plenty of choices, which are a real highlight of staying here.

7a3ac0a7-1b37-44ad-bfcf-f1d875f49eb3.q: What is the service like at Ash Tree Cottage B&B?
7a3ac0a7-1b37-44ad-bfcf-f1d875f49eb3.a: The owners provide a warm welcome and attentive care without being intrusive, creating a hospitable and thoughtful experience that guests thoroughly enjoy.

7a3ac0a7-1b37-44ad-bfcf-f1d875f49eb3.q: What special touches does Ash Tree Cottage B&B offer?
7a3ac0a7-1b37-44ad-bfcf-f1d875f49eb3.a: The hosts add personal details like fresh flowers from the garden in your room, creating a welcoming and homely environment throughout your stay.

1486d316-853b-461f-ac16-5575d1c12c3c.q: Where is Rossio Garden Hotel located?
1486d316-853b-461f-ac16-5575d1c12c3c.a: Rossio Garden Hotel is in Lisbon's historic Baixa district, just 100 metres from Rossio metro station. You can walk to the waterfront and most of the city centre on foot, with restaurants, theatres, and shops surrounding the hotel on lively streets.

1486d316-853b-461f-ac16-5575d1c12c3c.q: How cosy is Rossio Garden Hotel?
1486d316-853b-461f-ac16-5575d1c12c3c.a: Rossio Garden Hotel has a cosy score of 6.3/10. Guests describe it as having a wonderfully tucked-away, cosy feel that makes it a perfect retreat after exploring the city, with nicely decorated spaces and a pleasant atmosphere.

1486d316-853b-461f-ac16-5575d1c12c3c.q: Is the breakfast good at Rossio Garden Hotel?
1486d316-853b-461f-ac16-5575d1c12c3c.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the breakfast as excellent and very good. It's a genuine highlight of the stay and worth looking forward to.

1486d316-853b-461f-ac16-5575d1c12c3c.q: What are the rooms like at Rossio Garden Hotel?
1486d316-853b-461f-ac16-5575d1c12c3c.a: Rooms are small but clean, tidy, and well-appointed for a city stay. 1486d316-853b-461f-ac16-5575d1c12c3c.q: Is the staff friendly at Rossio Garden Hotel?
1486d316-853b-461f-ac16-5575d1c12c3c.a: Yes, guests consistently highlight the staff as very friendly and helpful. The receptionists are described as sweet and professional, and you may even be greeted with a welcome chocolate treat.

1486d316-853b-461f-ac16-5575d1c12c3c.q: Is Rossio Garden Hotel good value for money?
1486d316-853b-461f-ac16-5575d1c12c3c.a: Guests feel it offers great value for the price, punching above its weight as a 3-star property. The excellent location, clean rooms, and friendly service make it a solid choice that guests say they'd return to.

b9c8f8c5-a039-4ca2-beaa-420f3d6bdca4.q: Where is Daisy Village Resort and Spa located?
b9c8f8c5-a039-4ca2-beaa-420f3d6bdca4.a: Daisy Village Resort and Spa is in Kiên Giang, Vietnam, positioned as a secluded retreat away from the main tourist rush. It's roughly 10 minutes' walk from the beach and nearby restaurants, with shuttle services available to town and the sunset beach.

b9c8f8c5-a039-4ca2-beaa-420f3d6bdca4.q: How cosy is Daisy Village Resort and Spa?
b9c8f8c5-a039-4ca2-beaa-420f3d6bdca4.a: The resort scores 6.3 out of 10 for cosiness. Whilst guests praise the lovely, comfortable bungalows with private balconies and beautiful gardens, some note that the outdoor showers and basic furnishings aren't to everyone's taste.

b9c8f8c5-a039-4ca2-beaa-420f3d6bdca4.q: What is the guest rating for Daisy Village Resort and Spa?
b9c8f8c5-a039-4ca2-beaa-420f3d6bdca4.a: Daisy Village Resort and Spa has a 4.2 out of 5 rating based on 387 guest reviews. Visitors consistently highlight friendly and helpful staff, well-kept grounds, and good value for money, though some mention concerns about Wi-Fi strength and restaurant quality.

b9c8f8c5-a039-4ca2-beaa-420f3d6bdca4.a: Yes, the resort has a spa on-site. The property also features a clean pool, free pool table, and offers motorbike and car rentals for exploring the area.

b9c8f8c5-a039-4ca2-beaa-420f3d6bdca4.q: Is the breakfast good at Daisy Village Resort and Spa?
b9c8f8c5-a039-4ca2-beaa-420f3d6bdca4.a: Guests describe the breakfast as good, with a morning buffet that includes fresh baguettes. However, some visitors noted the restaurant's other offerings were inconsistent, so breakfast appears to be the stronger meal option.

b9c8f8c5-a039-4ca2-beaa-420f3d6bdca4.q: Is Daisy Village Resort and Spa good for a relaxing getaway?
b9c8f8c5-a039-4ca2-beaa-420f3d6bdca4.a: Yes—the resort's secluded location in the mountains, friendly staff, beautiful gardens, and private outdoor showers make it well-suited for a peaceful retreat. Free shuttle services to the beach and local tour bookings add convenience without the hustle of central tourist areas.

23b994cd-1b27-4bd3-b4b6-a546e131e7f2.a: Congress Hall is situated in Cape May, USA, a charming coastal destination known for its historic architecture and seaside appeal.

Congress Hall has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10. Guests consistently praise the warm, inviting atmosphere throughout the property, with many noting the luxurious bedding and thoughtfully decorated spaces like the Brown Room.

23b994cd-1b27-4bd3-b4b6-a546e131e7f2.q: What do guests say about the service at Congress Hall?
23b994cd-1b27-4bd3-b4b6-a546e131e7f2.a: Guests rave about the exceptional hospitality and friendly staff at Congress Hall. The front desk team are described as welcoming and helpful, and reviewers consistently highlight the great service as a standout feature of their stays.

23b994cd-1b27-4bd3-b4b6-a546e131e7f2.q: Is Congress Hall good for a relaxing getaway?
23b994cd-1b27-4bd3-b4b6-a546e131e7f2.a: Yes—guests describe Congress Hall as a beautiful, relaxing retreat with plenty to do if you want it, or a quiet escape if you prefer. The elegant historic building, gorgeous grounds, and spa facilities create a special atmosphere for both families and couples.

23b994cd-1b27-4bd3-b4b6-a546e131e7f2.q: What amenities does Congress Hall offer?
23b994cd-1b27-4bd3-b4b6-a546e131e7f2.a: Congress Hall features a spa for relaxation, a heated pool overlooking area, and the Brown Room with cocktails and warm decor. The property also has public bathrooms, though guests note these can have queues during busy times.

Absolutely. Guests consistently praise Congress Hall as a beautifully maintained historic building with exceptional architectural charm. Many return visitors note that the property retains its special character and elegance year after year.

914fed95-11ec-4107-9999-6fd381116661.q: Where is Flores Boutique Hotel & SPA located in Porto?
914fed95-11ec-4107-9999-6fd381116661.a: Flores Boutique Hotel & SPA sits in the heart of Porto's historic centre, just 3–7 minutes' walk from the São Bento Railway station, the river, and countless restaurants and shops. The quiet street it occupies has limited traffic, making it peaceful despite being perfectly central.

914fed95-11ec-4107-9999-6fd381116661.q: How cosy is Flores Boutique Hotel & SPA?
914fed95-11ec-4107-9999-6fd381116661.a: Flores scores 6.3/10 for cosiness, with guests particularly praising the calm, garden-facing rooms and the peaceful atmosphere inside despite the bustling location. The quiet interior and relaxing garden create a genuine retreat from the city outside.

914fed95-11ec-4107-9999-6fd381116661.q: What do guests say about the rooms at Flores Boutique Hotel & SPA?
914fed95-11ec-4107-9999-6fd381116661.a: Guests consistently praise the rooms as spacious, neat, and newly renovated, with big, modern bathrooms and secure doors. The boutique-style design and ample size make them feel comfortable, though note that some connecting rooms have limited sound insulation between them.

914fed95-11ec-4107-9999-6fd381116661.q: Is the service good at Flores Boutique Hotel & SPA?
914fed95-11ec-4107-9999-6fd381116661.a: Yes—guests highlight the friendly, helpful staff across all shifts, who go out of their way to assist with luggage, local advice, and even special requests like receiving packages before check-in. 914fed95-11ec-4107-9999-6fd381116661.q: Does Flores Boutique Hotel & SPA have a spa, and is breakfast included?
914fed95-11ec-4107-9999-6fd381116661.a: Yes, the hotel has a spa offering massages that guests love, and a good buffet breakfast with quality ingredients. There's also a rooftop bar and a beautiful garden that guests find hard to leave.

914fed95-11ec-4107-9999-6fd381116661.q: What's the guest rating for Flores Boutique Hotel & SPA?
914fed95-11ec-4107-9999-6fd381116661.a: Flores Boutique Hotel & SPA has a 4.5/5 rating from 509 guest reviews, reflecting strong satisfaction with its location, rooms, service, and amenities.

1a9ab699-3cb9-4811-8f4f-c6b7205cf156.a: Glenalmond House is in Edinburgh, United Kingdom, in a residential neighbourhood with excellent local restaurants nearby. It's easily accessible from the ring road, within short walking distance of the city centre, and has frequent bus access.

Glenalmond House scores 7.7/10 for cosiness. It's a Victorian house with tastefully decorated rooms, comfortable beds, beautiful lounge areas, and an intimate atmosphere that guests find far more charming than a standard hotel room.

1a9ab699-3cb9-4811-8f4f-c6b7205cf156.q: Is the breakfast good at Glenalmond House?
1a9ab699-3cb9-4811-8f4f-c6b7205cf156.a: Yes—guests consistently praise the breakfast as excellent and among the best they've had in a B&B. There's a good variety of both cold and hot choices, including options like scrambled eggs with salmon, all prepared very well each morning.

1a9ab699-3cb9-4811-8f4f-c6b7205cf156.q: What are Jimmy and Fiona like at Glenalmond House?
1a9ab699-3cb9-4811-8f4f-c6b7205cf156.a: Jimmy and Fiona are warm, welcoming hosts who go above and beyond for guests. They offer local activity suggestions, lend personal items when needed, and create a genuinely caring atmosphere throughout your stay.

1a9ab699-3cb9-4811-8f4f-c6b7205cf156.q: Are the rooms at Glenalmond House clean and well-maintained?
1a9ab699-3cb9-4811-8f4f-c6b7205cf156.a: Yes. Rooms are immaculate and cleaned daily with towels replaced regularly. They're well equipped and tastefully furnished, though modestly sized—similar to other B&Bs—with windows that open for fresh air.
Yes, Glenalmond House offers free parking, which guests appreciate as it makes exploring Edinburgh and the surrounding neighbourhood convenient and accessible.

b8f4d2b9-76e9-4cd8-abdc-09146bef1279.a: La Perouse is in Nice, France, right next to the old town and the Mediterranean beach—you can walk across the street to the sea and explore the historic quarter on foot.
La Perouse scores 5.7 out of 10 for cosiness, reflecting a mix of charming character and some practical quirks that guests either embrace or find challenging.

b8f4d2b9-76e9-4cd8-abdc-09146bef1279.q: What is the rooftop bar and terrace like at La Perouse?
b8f4d2b9-76e9-4cd8-abdc-09146bef1279.a: The rooftop terrace is a genuine highlight with stunning views of the Mediterranean and sunset; guests consistently praise it, though note that the bar and restaurant may have seasonal hours.

b8f4d2b9-76e9-4cd8-abdc-09146bef1279.q: Are the rooms at La Perouse comfortable?
b8f4d2b9-76e9-4cd8-abdc-09146bef1279.a: Most guests find the rooms clean, spacious, and comfortable with beautiful balconies and sea views, though some mention they can be on the smaller side depending on your room type.

b8f4d2b9-76e9-4cd8-abdc-09146bef1279.q: Is La Perouse good for couples?
b8f4d2b9-76e9-4cd8-abdc-09146bef1279.a: Yes—couples consistently report wonderful stays, particularly praising the sunset views from balconies, attentive staff, and the romantic seaside location in the heart of old Nice.

b8f4d2b9-76e9-4cd8-abdc-09146bef1279.q: What is the service like at La Perouse?
b8f4d2b9-76e9-4cd8-abdc-09146bef1279.a: Staff are generally described as welcoming, helpful, and attentive; most guests praise their warmth and professionalism, though one visitor noted the check-in staff seemed a bit reserved.

cf456005-9a0c-463e-bc88-b36eb44616f0.q: Where is Montagnana Country House located?
cf456005-9a0c-463e-bc88-b36eb44616f0.a: Montagnana Country House is in San Gimignano, Italy, set in the Tuscan countryside with outstanding views across the hills. It's perfectly positioned for exploring Tuscany and is close to the charming medieval town of San Gimignano.

cf456005-9a0c-463e-bc88-b36eb44616f0.q: How cosy is Montagnana Country House?
cf456005-9a0c-463e-bc88-b36eb44616f0.a: Montagnana Country House has a cosy score of 7.0 out of 10. Guests consistently praise the warm, welcoming atmosphere, the thoughtfully equipped spaces, and the host's exceptional attention to detail that makes it feel like a fairytale retreat.

cf456005-9a0c-463e-bc88-b36eb44616f0.q: What amenities does Montagnana Country House offer?
cf456005-9a0c-463e-bc88-b36eb44616f0.a: The villa includes a swimming pool with Tuscan views, a fully equipped kitchen stocked with local olive oil, balsamic vinegar, coffee, and homemade biscuits, laundry facilities, and everything needed for a comfortable stay. Guests also appreciate the beautiful gardens and peaceful countryside setting ideal for cycling.

cf456005-9a0c-463e-bc88-b36eb44616f0.q: Is the host at Montagnana Country House helpful?
cf456005-9a0c-463e-bc88-b36eb44616f0.a: Yes—guests consistently highlight the host Elisa's warmth and responsiveness. She provides thoughtful local recommendations for food, wine, and day trips, communicates easily from abroad, and goes out of her way to ensure guests have a wonderful stay.

cf456005-9a0c-463e-bc88-b36eb44616f0.q: Is Montagnana Country House clean and well-maintained?
cf456005-9a0c-463e-bc88-b36eb44616f0.a: Absolutely. Guests describe the property as meticulously cleaned and very well equipped, with impressive attention to detail throughout—from the flowers and entrance to practical touches like laundry detergent and well-stocked kitchen essentials.

cf456005-9a0c-463e-bc88-b36eb44616f0.q: Is Montagnana Country House good for families?
cf456005-9a0c-463e-bc88-b36eb44616f0.a: Yes. Guests with children have praised the property for having everything families need, and the peaceful countryside location with a swimming pool and bike rides through the Tuscan landscape makes it ideal for a relaxing family holiday.

1a026b71-a1ab-4e75-8d88-98726068c73b.a: Iconic Santorini is in Imerovigli, positioned between the busier towns of Fira and Oia. Guests praise this sweet spot for offering stunning views and a more peaceful atmosphere whilst still being close to restaurants and attractions.
Iconic Santorini scores 6.3 out of 10 for cosiness. It's a visually striking, modern Cycladic-design hotel that prioritises dramatic aesthetics and postcard-perfect views over intimate, snug warmth.

1a026b71-a1ab-4e75-8d88-98726068c73b.q: Is Iconic Santorini good for couples and honeymoons?
1a026b71-a1ab-4e75-8d88-98726068c73b.a: Yes—guests consistently highlight it as exceptional for romance. Honeymooners and anniversary visitors rave about the beautiful rooms, attentive staff who help arrange dinners, and the breathtaking views that make every moment feel special.

1a026b71-a1ab-4e75-8d88-98726068c73b.q: What is the service like at Iconic Santorini?
1a026b71-a1ab-4e75-8d88-98726068c73b.a: Staff are genuinely warm and helpful. Guests report being greeted with friendly smiles, receiving assistance with dinner reservations, and feeling treated with care throughout their stay—though experiences with pre-arrival communication have occasionally been inconsistent.

1a026b71-a1ab-4e75-8d88-98726068c73b.q: Does Iconic Santorini have a spa?
1a026b71-a1ab-4e75-8d88-98726068c73b.a: Yes, Iconic Santorini has a spa on-site, adding to its wellness amenities.

1a026b71-a1ab-4e75-8d88-98726068c73b.q: What do guests say about the rooms and views at Iconic Santorini?
1a026b71-a1ab-4e75-8d88-98726068c73b.a: Rooms are spacious, beautifully designed, and feature private decks with exceptional views. Guests describe them as some of the prettiest hotel rooms they've ever stayed in, with vistas that feel fresh and special each morning.

1445f3d5-0816-4c9a-bfff-8c3c2d480d6c.a: Hotel Montecarlo is in central Venice, just steps away from St Mark's Square and the canals—within a 20-minute walk of major attractions. Its location is consistently praised by guests as one of its greatest strengths.

Hotel Montecarlo has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10. Whilst rooms are described as small but well-finished and comfortable, the overall cosiness rating reflects mixed experiences with facilities and amenities.

1445f3d5-0816-4c9a-bfff-8c3c2d480d6c.q: Is the staff friendly at Hotel Montecarlo?
1445f3d5-0816-4c9a-bfff-8c3c2d480d6c.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the staff as amazing, polite, and genuinely helpful. The front desk team are noted for their personal service, warm greetings, and willingness to assist with everything from room preferences to booking trips and tickets.

1445f3d5-0816-4c9a-bfff-8c3c2d480d6c.q: What is breakfast like at Hotel Montecarlo?

1445f3d5-0816-4c9a-bfff-8c3c2d480d6c.q: Is Hotel Montecarlo good for couples?

c56c4e3b-30af-4cea-95e5-48abc3b78b7a.q: Where is Hotel Palacio de los Navas located?
c56c4e3b-30af-4cea-95e5-48abc3b78b7a.a: Hotel Palacio de los Navas is in the heart of Granada, Spain, within walking distance of excellent restaurants, bars, and shops. It's a short walk from the Alhambra, making it an ideal base for exploring the city's main attractions.

c56c4e3b-30af-4cea-95e5-48abc3b78b7a.q: How cosy is Hotel Palacio de los Navas?

c56c4e3b-30af-4cea-95e5-48abc3b78b7a.q: Is the staff friendly at Hotel Palacio de los Navas?

c56c4e3b-30af-4cea-95e5-48abc3b78b7a.q: What is breakfast like at Hotel Palacio de los Navas?

c56c4e3b-30af-4cea-95e5-48abc3b78b7a.q: Is Hotel Palacio de los Navas good for a quiet night's sleep?

c56c4e3b-30af-4cea-95e5-48abc3b78b7a.q: Are the rooms clean and well-maintained at Hotel Palacio de los Navas?

91b58d4f-b841-45a1-8c47-afdd57adf62c.q: Where is Aux Tanneries de Wiltz - Hotel & Restaurant located?
91b58d4f-b841-45a1-8c47-afdd57adf62c.a: Aux Tanneries de Wiltz is situated in Wiltz, Luxembourg, positioned beside a river that creates a peaceful soundscape for guests.

91b58d4f-b841-45a1-8c47-afdd57adf62c.q: How cosy is Aux Tanneries de Wiltz?
91b58d4f-b841-45a1-8c47-afdd57adf62c.a: The hotel scores 5.7 out of 10 for cosiness, reflecting its blend of relaxing riverside setting and spa facilities alongside some dated décor in the rooms.

91b58d4f-b841-45a1-8c47-afdd57adf62c.q: What is the breakfast like at Aux Tanneries de Wiltz?
91b58d4f-b841-45a1-8c47-afdd57adf62c.a: Guests consistently praise the breakfast as superb and generous, with plenty of choice including continental options, bacon and eggs, and even made-to-order omelettes.

91b58d4f-b841-45a1-8c47-afdd57adf62c.a: The restaurant has earned praise for its excellence, though some guests found evening meals inconsistent; breakfast and the overall dining ambiance are the stronger points.

91b58d4f-b841-45a1-8c47-afdd57adf62c.q: What do guests say about the staff at Aux Tanneries de Wiltz?
91b58d4f-b841-45a1-8c47-afdd57adf62c.a: Most guests highlight the staff as friendly, welcoming, and multilingual, though reception service has occasionally been noted as less warm by some visitors.

1941a9ba-15cb-4681-8e69-49ae89e5fa30.q: Where is Parlamento Boutique Hotel located in Rome?
1941a9ba-15cb-4681-8e69-49ae89e5fa30.a: Parlamento Boutique Hotel sits in an excellent central location within easy walking distance of Rome's most iconic attractions, including the Spanish Steps, Trevi Fountain, the Pantheon, and Piazza Navona—making it an ideal base for exploring the city on foot.

1941a9ba-15cb-4681-8e69-49ae89e5fa30.q: How cosy is Parlamento Boutique Hotel?

1941a9ba-15cb-4681-8e69-49ae89e5fa30.q: What do guests say about the staff at Parlamento Boutique Hotel?
1941a9ba-15cb-4681-8e69-49ae89e5fa30.a: Guests consistently highlight the staff's exceptional warmth and helpfulness, noting they go above and beyond—arranging transport, offering local restaurant recommendations, and providing insider tips to enhance your Roman holiday.

1941a9ba-15cb-4681-8e69-49ae89e5fa30.q: Is breakfast included at Parlamento Boutique Hotel?

1941a9ba-15cb-4681-8e69-49ae89e5fa30.q: Does Parlamento Boutique Hotel have a rooftop?
1941a9ba-15cb-4681-8e69-49ae89e5fa30.a: Yes, Parlamento Boutique Hotel features a rooftop, offering a lovely spot to unwind after exploring the city's attractions.

1941a9ba-15cb-4681-8e69-49ae89e5fa30.q: What is the guest rating for Parlamento Boutique Hotel?
1941a9ba-15cb-4681-8e69-49ae89e5fa30.a: Parlamento Boutique Hotel holds a strong 4.7 out of 5 stars based on 445 guest reviews, reflecting consistent praise for its location, friendly staff, and value for money.

d939b680-7272-4838-b6a7-79011b8e42e1.a: Salamander Middleburg is situated in Middleburg, Virginia, nestled in the heart of wine country and horse country, roughly an hour's drive from Washington D.C.

Salamander Middleburg has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10, suggesting it's a refined, spacious resort rather than an intimate, snug retreat—guests praise its elegant design and sophisticated comfort over cosiness.

d939b680-7272-4838-b6a7-79011b8e42e1.q: Does Salamander Middleburg have a spa?
d939b680-7272-4838-b6a7-79011b8e42e1.a: Yes, Salamander Middleburg has an on-site spa that guests love; visitors have celebrated special occasions there and described spa visits as a highlight of their stay.

d939b680-7272-4838-b6a7-79011b8e42e1.q: What is the dining like at Salamander Middleburg?
d939b680-7272-4838-b6a7-79011b8e42e1.a: Guests consistently praise the food and restaurants at Salamander Middleburg, with excellent dining available both within the resort and in town via shuttle service; the breakfast dining area is particularly noted for its beautiful architecture and high ceilings.

d939b680-7272-4838-b6a7-79011b8e42e1.q: Is Salamander Middleburg good for special occasions?
d939b680-7272-4838-b6a7-79011b8e42e1.a: Yes, Salamander Middleburg is excellent for celebrations—guests have enjoyed birthdays, anniversary trips, and girls' getaways there, with staff going out of their way to create memorable experiences.

d939b680-7272-4838-b6a7-79011b8e42e1.q: What activities are available at Salamander Middleburg?
d939b680-7272-4838-b6a7-79011b8e42e1.a: The resort offers a variety of activities including trail rides, access to local wineries, an outdoor pool area, and plenty of on-site and nearby dining options, making it ideal for spring and summer getaways.

6c8e1d01-df0b-4cac-a31e-d3e053d6a0ec.q: Where is The Graham Georgetown located?
6c8e1d01-df0b-4cac-a31e-d3e053d6a0ec.a: The Graham Georgetown is situated in the heart of Georgetown, Washington, USA, within walking distance of restaurants and shops. Its central location makes it convenient for both business travellers and leisure visitors exploring the neighbourhood.

6c8e1d01-df0b-4cac-a31e-d3e053d6a0ec.q: How cosy is The Graham Georgetown?
6c8e1d01-df0b-4cac-a31e-d3e053d6a0ec.a: The Graham Georgetown has a cosy score of 5.0 out of 10, indicating a modern, design-focused space rather than a traditionally intimate setting. It prioritises stylish, unique areas over intimate warmth.

6c8e1d01-df0b-4cac-a31e-d3e053d6a0ec.q: What are the rooms like at The Graham Georgetown?

6c8e1d01-df0b-4cac-a31e-d3e053d6a0ec.q: Is the service good at The Graham Georgetown?

6c8e1d01-df0b-4cac-a31e-d3e053d6a0ec.q: Does The Graham Georgetown have a rooftop bar?

6c8e1d01-df0b-4cac-a31e-d3e053d6a0ec.q: Is The Graham Georgetown good for a romantic getaway?
6c8e1d01-df0b-4cac-a31e-d3e053d6a0ec.a: The Graham Georgetown's central Georgetown location and suite-style rooms make it suitable for couples, though recent guests have noted occasional cleanliness issues that may affect the experience. The rooftop bar offers a pleasant setting for an evening out.

adfdf6bb-58b4-437f-8b88-a063d0222d64.q: Where is Hotel de L'Alboro located?

adfdf6bb-58b4-437f-8b88-a063d0222d64.q: How cosy is Hotel de L'Alboro?
adfdf6bb-58b4-437f-8b88-a063d0222d64.a: Hotel de L'Alboro has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10. adfdf6bb-58b4-437f-8b88-a063d0222d64.q: What is the breakfast like at Hotel de L'Alboro?
adfdf6bb-58b4-437f-8b88-a063d0222d64.a: Breakfast at Hotel de L'Alboro is generous and well-regarded. Guests enjoy a spread including fresh bread, cheese, cereals, croissants, cold cuts, fruit, yoghurt, and hot beverages—plenty to start your day exploring Venice.

adfdf6bb-58b4-437f-8b88-a063d0222d64.q: Is the staff friendly at Hotel de L'Alboro?
adfdf6bb-58b4-437f-8b88-a063d0222d64.a: Yes, the staff are consistently praised as wonderfully friendly, helpful, and responsive. Guests highlight their warmth and willingness to answer questions, with one visitor noting the evening staff member was particularly lovely.

adfdf6bb-58b4-437f-8b88-a063d0222d64.q: What are the rooms like at Hotel de L'Alboro?

49c782ee-f0d1-4eeb-8c92-922f7da893cc.a: Milu Hotel sits in the heart of Florence's city centre, within walking distance of major attractions, restaurants, and shopping. Guests consistently praise its perfect location for exploring the city on foot.

49c782ee-f0d1-4eeb-8c92-922f7da893cc.q: What do guests say about the staff at Milu Hotel?
49c782ee-f0d1-4eeb-8c92-922f7da893cc.a: Staff at Milu Hotel receive exceptional praise for their warmth and attentiveness. Guests highlight their helpfulness in navigating the city and their thoughtful touches, such as personalised welcome notes and special gestures for celebrations.

49c782ee-f0d1-4eeb-8c92-922f7da893cc.q: Is breakfast good at Milu Hotel?
49c782ee-f0d1-4eeb-8c92-922f7da893cc.a: Yes—guests describe the breakfast as excellent, rich, and delicious, with one visitor noting it provided the perfect start before exploring the city.

49c782ee-f0d1-4eeb-8c92-922f7da893cc.q: Does Milu Hotel have a rooftop?
49c782ee-f0d1-4eeb-8c92-922f7da893cc.a: Yes, Milu Hotel has a cute rooftop lounge where guests can relax and enjoy the property's stylish design and atmosphere.

49c782ee-f0d1-4eeb-8c92-922f7da893cc.q: Is Milu Hotel good for special occasions?
49c782ee-f0d1-4eeb-8c92-922f7da893cc.a: Absolutely. The hotel is known for going above and beyond for guests celebrating milestones—staff have surprised guests with champagne and personalised touches, making it an excellent choice for honeymoons and birthdays.

fb349143-8999-4815-9578-d23ae8e1067d.q: Where is Londres Saint-Honoré located in Paris?
fb349143-8999-4815-9578-d23ae8e1067d.a: Londres Saint-Honoré sits in an excellent central location near the Louvre, with easy metro access and close to some of Paris's best restaurants and shops. Guests consistently praise it as the perfect base for exploring the city without spending much time in your room.

fb349143-8999-4815-9578-d23ae8e1067d.q: What is the cosy score for Londres Saint-Honoré?
fb349143-8999-4815-9578-d23ae8e1067d.a: Londres Saint-Honoré has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10, reflecting a comfortable but compact Parisian hotel experience.

fb349143-8999-4815-9578-d23ae8e1067d.q: Are the rooms at Londres Saint-Honoré comfortable?
fb349143-8999-4815-9578-d23ae8e1067d.a: Yes, guests regularly comment on the good size and quality of the rooms, which are clean and comfortable. Many visitors report sleeping well and feeling at home during their stay.

fb349143-8999-4815-9578-d23ae8e1067d.q: Is the service good at Londres Saint-Honoré?
fb349143-8999-4815-9578-d23ae8e1067d.a: The hotel is known for exceptionally warm and helpful staff. Guests frequently mention the friendly, professional receptionists and praise the team for going above and beyond to assist with requests and special situations.

fb349143-8999-4815-9578-d23ae8e1067d.q: Is Londres Saint-Honoré suitable for families?
fb349143-8999-4815-9578-d23ae8e1067d.a: Yes, families have reported lovely experiences at the hotel. The rooms are comfortable and cosy, and the hospitality makes guests feel welcome, though you should be aware the building has narrow corridors and a small lift typical of older Parisian properties.

b1bebd09-4e31-4280-9528-e8a830f363b9.q: Where is Pension Schönbrunn located in Vienna?
b1bebd09-4e31-4280-9528-e8a830f363b9.a: Pension Schönbrunn sits in a late Art Nouveau building just 400 metres from Schönbrunn Palace, at the western entrance to the city centre. The U-Bahn metro is a 5-minute walk away, making it an ideal base for exploring Vienna's sights.
Pension Schönbrunn has a cosy score of 6.3/10. It's a historic, well-maintained property with authentic period character, though the furnishings are older and could use updating.

b1bebd09-4e31-4280-9528-e8a830f363b9.q: Is the staff friendly at Pension Schönbrunn?
b1bebd09-4e31-4280-9528-e8a830f363b9.a: Yes—guests consistently praise the staff as warm, helpful and attentive. They hand out city maps with walking routes to attractions and offer genuine travel tips to make your stay better.
Yes, there's an underground garage just 10 metres from the hotel entrance, available for €9 per night. It's convenient for exploring Vienna by U-Bahn and bus from nearby stops.

b1bebd09-4e31-4280-9528-e8a830f363b9.q: What's the breakfast like at Pension Schönbrunn?
b1bebd09-4e31-4280-9528-e8a830f363b9.a: The breakfast buffet is modest but sufficient—not large, but guests find it adequate. Daily room cleaning and overall cleanliness are strengths guests repeatedly mention.

b1bebd09-4e31-4280-9528-e8a830f363b9.q: Did anyone famous stay at Pension Schönbrunn?
b1bebd09-4e31-4280-9528-e8a830f363b9.a: Yes—Josef Stalin stayed here for a month in 1913 with the Trojanovsky family, Russian aristocratic supporters. It was his longest spell outside Russia before the revolution.

8255a606-a7cb-4cd7-a41d-3f026fbc027a.q: Where is Hotel Ludwig van Beethoven located?
8255a606-a7cb-4cd7-a41d-3f026fbc027a.a: Hotel Ludwig van Beethoven is in Berlin, Deutschland, within walking distance of the metro and close to public transport and shopping. It's about 2 metro stops from the airport, making it convenient for travellers even though it's not in the city centre.

8255a606-a7cb-4cd7-a41d-3f026fbc027a.q: How cosy is Hotel Ludwig van Beethoven?
8255a606-a7cb-4cd7-a41d-3f026fbc027a.a: Hotel Ludwig van Beethoven has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10. Guests consistently praise the clean, spacious rooms and friendly staff, though the hotel is fairly basic in style and doesn't offer luxury amenities like a pool or fitness room.

8255a606-a7cb-4cd7-a41d-3f026fbc027a.q: Is the breakfast good at Hotel Ludwig van Beethoven?
8255a606-a7cb-4cd7-a41d-3f026fbc027a.a: Yes, guests rave about the breakfast at Hotel Ludwig van Beethoven. The buffet is described as plentiful, amazing, and with excellent coffee and something for everyone—it's genuinely one of the hotel's standout features.

8255a606-a7cb-4cd7-a41d-3f026fbc027a.q: What are the rooms like at Hotel Ludwig van Beethoven?
8255a606-a7cb-4cd7-a41d-3f026fbc027a.a: Rooms at Hotel Ludwig van Beethoven are spacious and nicely furnished, with good showers and strong water pressure. Many rooms feature a separate toilet room for added privacy, and guests praise the cleanliness and city views, plus controllable air conditioning.

8255a606-a7cb-4cd7-a41d-3f026fbc027a.q: Is the staff friendly at Hotel Ludwig van Beethoven?
8255a606-a7cb-4cd7-a41d-3f026fbc027a.a: Yes, guests consistently describe the staff as patient, helpful, and friendly. One regular visitor called the service 'five star' and another noted staff go out of their way to assist guests.

8255a606-a7cb-4cd7-a41d-3f026fbc027a.q: What makes Hotel Ludwig van Beethoven unique?
8255a606-a7cb-4cd7-a41d-3f026fbc027a.a: The hotel features art and paintings throughout, giving it a distinctive character. Guests also appreciate the free parking at the back and the affordable pricing for what you receive.

634ae01a-0daf-4866-8c54-dbaac42da281.q: Where is Hotel Villa Igea located in Venice?
634ae01a-0daf-4866-8c54-dbaac42da281.a: Hotel Villa Igea sits on Piazza San Zaccaria in a quiet side street just a minute's walk from the San Zaccaria vaporetto dock, two minutes from the Bridge of Sighs, and three minutes from Piazza di San Marco. The vaporetto stop is directly across the street, making it exceptionally convenient for exploring the city.

634ae01a-0daf-4866-8c54-dbaac42da281.q: How cosy is Hotel Villa Igea?
634ae01a-0daf-4866-8c54-dbaac42da281.a: Hotel Villa Igea has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10. Guests consistently praise the rooms as spacious, well-equipped, and authentically Venetian in style, though some note they're fairly basic in terms of amenities like in-room coffee facilities.

634ae01a-0daf-4866-8c54-dbaac42da281.q: What do guests say about the location of Hotel Villa Igea?
634ae01a-0daf-4866-8c54-dbaac42da281.a: Guests rave about the location as unbeatable for accessing Venice's main attractions. Despite being steps from San Marco Square and the Bridge of Sighs, the hotel sits in a remarkably quiet area, and the proximity to the vaporetto dock and public water fountains adds to its convenience.

634ae01a-0daf-4866-8c54-dbaac42da281.q: Is the staff friendly at Hotel Villa Igea?
634ae01a-0daf-4866-8c54-dbaac42da281.a: Most guests report the staff as super friendly and helpful, going out of their way to assist—one guest noted they even lent a travel adaptor. However, one guest did report a negative experience with rudeness, so experiences vary.

634ae01a-0daf-4866-8c54-dbaac42da281.q: What are the rooms like at Hotel Villa Igea?
634ae01a-0daf-4866-8c54-dbaac42da281.a: Rooms are spacious, clean, and decorated in authentic Venetian style with views of San Zaccaria church. They feature comfortable beds and good showers, though guests note the lack of in-room coffee-making facilities and that WiFi could be improved.

634ae01a-0daf-4866-8c54-dbaac42da281.q: Is breakfast included at Hotel Villa Igea?
634ae01a-0daf-4866-8c54-dbaac42da281.a: Breakfast is available at a partner hotel but is described by guests as basic rather than elaborate.

9e66da27-e072-4363-9d1b-028a3799ff49.a: Singel Hotel is in Amsterdam, right along the canal and just a few minutes' walk from the city centre. It's very close to Amsterdam's central train station, making it easy to travel to other towns or explore the city via the tram system.

Singel Hotel has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10. Guests particularly praise the small, intimate atmosphere — one visitor described their compact room under the roof as 'really cosy and comfortable', and others appreciate that the hotel's small size means you can quickly come and go.

9e66da27-e072-4363-9d1b-028a3799ff49.q: What is the service like at Singel Hotel?
9e66da27-e072-4363-9d1b-028a3799ff49.a: Staff at Singel Hotel are consistently praised as friendly, helpful, and present. Guests highlight their excellent recommendations for restaurants and local spots, and their willingness to accommodate requests — making them genuinely useful during your stay.

9e66da27-e072-4363-9d1b-028a3799ff49.q: Are the rooms at Singel Hotel clean and comfortable?
9e66da27-e072-4363-9d1b-028a3799ff49.a: Yes, guests consistently report that rooms are clean and well-maintained. Most rooms are on the smaller side, but visitors find them comfortable and functional; some note the lack of air-conditioning can be an issue during hot weather.

9e66da27-e072-4363-9d1b-028a3799ff49.q: Is Singel Hotel good for a short city break?
9e66da27-e072-4363-9d1b-028a3799ff49.a: Absolutely — guests returning multiple times confirm it's a great base for exploring Amsterdam. Its canal-side location, proximity to restaurants and attractions, and friendly staff make it ideal for short stays, whether you're visiting for leisure or business.

610af5a2-0d8f-43b6-b7fe-70ea304fa5e2.q: Where is Hotel Un patio en Santa Cruz located?
610af5a2-0d8f-43b6-b7fe-70ea304fa5e2.a: Hotel Un patio en Santa Cruz is in Barrio Santa Cruz, the historic heart of Seville, Spain. 610af5a2-0d8f-43b6-b7fe-70ea304fa5e2.q: How cosy is Hotel Un patio en Santa Cruz?
610af5a2-0d8f-43b6-b7fe-70ea304fa5e2.a: The hotel has a cosy score of 6.3/10.
