03d849b0-6193-4f13-a7c1-227c03c573b3.a: Service quality is inconsistent according to guests. Whilst some staff members are described as friendly and welcoming, others report the front desk as unhelpful, passive-aggressive, or dismissive when addressing guest requests and issues.

03d849b0-6193-4f13-a7c1-227c03c573b3.q: Is Big Meadows Lodge good for a relaxing getaway?
03d849b0-6193-4f13-a7c1-227c03c573b3.a: The lodge's Great Room with its fireplace and location in Shenandoah create a peaceful setting for unplugging and enjoying nature, though some guests find the accommodation itself falls short of expectations for the price.

6df2cccb-c9a8-442f-bdae-512c1ba65975.q: Where is Hotel Villa Honegg located?
6df2cccb-c9a8-442f-bdae-512c1ba65975.a: Hotel Villa Honegg is situated in Ennetbürgen, Switzerland, perched above the fog with stunning mountain views and easy access to hiking trails in the region.

6df2cccb-c9a8-442f-bdae-512c1ba65975.q: How cosy is Hotel Villa Honegg?
6df2cccb-c9a8-442f-bdae-512c1ba65975.a: Hotel Villa Honegg has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10, offering a peaceful and serene atmosphere that guests find relaxing, though it leans more towards upscale comfort than intimate warmth.

6df2cccb-c9a8-442f-bdae-512c1ba65975.q: Is the service good at Hotel Villa Honegg?
6df2cccb-c9a8-442f-bdae-512c1ba65975.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the service as excellent and first-class; staff members like manager Marcel and receptionist Lena are noted for going above and beyond with friendly, welcoming, and accommodating service.

6df2cccb-c9a8-442f-bdae-512c1ba65975.q: Does Hotel Villa Honegg have a spa?
6df2cccb-c9a8-442f-bdae-512c1ba65975.a: Yes, the hotel has a spa that guests describe as gorgeous, cosy, and recently renovated with spectacular views; massages are available and the facility is often quiet and peaceful.

6df2cccb-c9a8-442f-bdae-512c1ba65975.q: What is the food like at Hotel Villa Honegg?
6df2cccb-c9a8-442f-bdae-512c1ba65975.a: Guests rave about the food as excellent, from dinner through to breakfast, with delicious meals and good quality dining; note that after 20:00 the restaurant serves a maximum of three courses.

6df2cccb-c9a8-442f-bdae-512c1ba65975.q: Is Hotel Villa Honegg good for special occasions?
6df2cccb-c9a8-442f-bdae-512c1ba65975.a: Yes, guests have celebrated anniversaries and weddings here with wonderful experiences, praising the incredible views, amazing food, and attentive service that made their special moments memorable.

56d0dd44-3994-4132-b871-31f5b3aae222.q: Where is The Place Hotel located?
56d0dd44-3994-4132-b871-31f5b3aae222.a: The Place Hotel is in Edinburgh city centre (EH1 3HU), just a few steps from St. James Shopping Centre and within easy walking distance of Edinburgh's main attractions, shops, and transport links.

56d0dd44-3994-4132-b871-31f5b3aae222.q: How cosy is The Place Hotel?
56d0dd44-3994-4132-b871-31f5b3aae222.a: The Place Hotel has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10, suggesting a modern, clean space that's comfortable rather than intimate or particularly warm in atmosphere.

56d0dd44-3994-4132-b871-31f5b3aae222.q: Is the service good at The Place Hotel?
56d0dd44-3994-4132-b871-31f5b3aae222.a: Yes—guests consistently praise the staff as friendly, helpful, polite and welcoming, with particular mention of the Events Manager Emily Jackson and her team's professionalism.

56d0dd44-3994-4132-b871-31f5b3aae222.q: Are the beds comfortable at The Place Hotel?
56d0dd44-3994-4132-b871-31f5b3aae222.a: Very much so; guests describe them as among the comfiest they've experienced, with top-notch pillows, sheets and mattresses that help rooms feel relaxing and restful.

56d0dd44-3994-4132-b871-31f5b3aae222.q: What amenities does The Place Hotel have?
56d0dd44-3994-4132-b871-31f5b3aae222.a: The Place Hotel features a rooftop, a modern bar area that guests find beautiful, and a restaurant, plus a guest services desk to help with bookings and local information.

56d0dd44-3994-4132-b871-31f5b3aae222.q: Is The Place Hotel good for events?
56d0dd44-3994-4132-b871-31f5b3aae222.a: Yes—the hotel has event spaces like the Raeburn Suite with AV and lighting facilities, and guests have praised the professional support for hosting functions including speaking events.

42a5b51d-056b-4e44-8f28-6510c92f1fc4.a: Hotel Stein is in the heart of Salzburg, Austria, within walking distance of popular tourist attractions and city landmarks. Guests consistently praise its central position for exploring the city.
Hotel Stein has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10, indicating a moderately comfortable, well-appointed stay rather than an exceptionally intimate atmosphere.

42a5b51d-056b-4e44-8f28-6510c92f1fc4.q: Is the service good at Hotel Stein?
42a5b51d-056b-4e44-8f28-6510c92f1fc4.a: Yes—guests regularly highlight the exceptional and friendly staff, with particular praise for the front-desk team and concierge who go above and beyond to help with requests and special occasions.

42a5b51d-056b-4e44-8f28-6510c92f1fc4.q: What are the rooms like at Hotel Stein?
42a5b51d-056b-4e44-8f28-6510c92f1fc4.a: Rooms are described as clean, stylish, spotless and recently renovated, with modern amenities and thoughtful touches; many guests appreciate the option of city views, though standard rooms are noted as more spacious.

42a5b51d-056b-4e44-8f28-6510c92f1fc4.q: Does Hotel Stein have a restaurant and bar?
42a5b51d-056b-4e44-8f28-6510c92f1fc4.a: Yes, Hotel Stein has an on-site restaurant and bar, plus a rooftop with stunning city views—guests praise the rooftop restaurant for its amazing vistas and breakfast options including à la carte and buffet choices.

42a5b51d-056b-4e44-8f28-6510c92f1fc4.q: Is Hotel Stein good for special occasions?
42a5b51d-056b-4e44-8f28-6510c92f1fc4.a: Absolutely—guests celebrate anniversaries, weddings and Valentine's Day here, with staff making occasions memorable through thoughtful gestures and attentive service that keeps guests returning year after year.

06951453-c538-4448-946f-b1fabf3396b3.q: Where is Chalet d'Ávila Guest House located in Lisbon?
06951453-c538-4448-946f-b1fabf3396b3.a: Chalet d'Ávila is just a 15-second walk from Saldanha metro station, making it easy to reach the city centre in 5–15 minutes by metro. The neighbourhood has good access to supermarkets and shops, though it's not in the very heart of Lisbon.

06951453-c538-4448-946f-b1fabf3396b3.q: How cosy is Chalet d'Ávila Guest House?
06951453-c538-4448-946f-b1fabf3396b3.a: Chalet d'Ávila scores 5.7 out of 10 for cosiness. Guests praise the chic, well-decorated rooms and clean facilities, though some note the building has stairs and shared bathrooms rather than en-suite amenities.

06951453-c538-4448-946f-b1fabf3396b3.q: Is the staff friendly at Chalet d'Ávila Guest House?
06951453-c538-4448-946f-b1fabf3396b3.a: Yes, guests consistently highlight the warmth and helpfulness of the team. Staff members like João are described as genuinely welcoming, enthusiastic, and always ready to assist with a smile.

06951453-c538-4448-946f-b1fabf3396b3.q: What is breakfast like at Chalet d'Ávila Guest House?
06951453-c538-4448-946f-b1fabf3396b3.a: Breakfast is better than most places in this category, with generous fresh fruits and decent variety. It's included in many packages and is a genuine highlight for guests.

06951453-c538-4448-946f-b1fabf3396b3.q: Are the rooms clean and comfortable at Chalet d'Ávila Guest House?
06951453-c538-4448-946f-b1fabf3396b3.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the cleanliness and comfort. Rooms are spacious and well-maintained, with comfortable beds and impeccably clean shared bathrooms, though note that ground-floor rooms have low windows and stairs may be challenging for those with mobility concerns.

25178740-007c-453a-9327-18ed9ac956a5.a: Hotel Panorama is on Lido Island, Italy, just a 15-minute walk from the beach and conveniently positioned away from Venice's central hustle whilst remaining well-connected by transport. The location puts you near local shops, restaurants and bars, with direct airport access right in front of the hotel.

Hotel Panorama scores 5.7 out of 10 for cosiness—rooms are compact but thoughtfully designed, with guests praising their cleanliness and comfort despite the modest size. The intimate scale suits those seeking a peaceful retreat rather than sprawling luxury.

25178740-007c-453a-9327-18ed9ac956a5.q: What's the breakfast like at Hotel Panorama?
25178740-007c-453a-9327-18ed9ac956a5.a: Guests consistently praise the breakfast as exceptional, with one calling it among the best in all their European travels. It's particularly well-equipped for dietary requirements, including gluten-free products and alternatives like soya milk, and is served with beautiful views.

25178740-007c-453a-9327-18ed9ac956a5.q: Is the staff friendly at Hotel Panorama?
25178740-007c-453a-9327-18ed9ac956a5.a: Yes—guests repeatedly highlight the staff's warmth and professionalism, with special mentions of front-desk team members and the breakfast crew. Visitors describe them as generous, welcoming and genuinely kind, making stays memorable.

25178740-007c-453a-9327-18ed9ac956a5.q: What's the view like from Hotel Panorama?
25178740-007c-453a-9327-18ed9ac956a5.a: The hotel offers beautiful views, particularly from the rooftop terrace and breakfast area, which guests say enhance the dining experience. Rooms also feature nice vistas, adding to the overall appeal of the location.

25178740-007c-453a-9327-18ed9ac956a5.q: Is Hotel Panorama good for couples?
25178740-007c-453a-9327-18ed9ac956a5.a: Yes—guests have returned for anniversaries and honeymoons, with one couple calling it a regular favourite after their honeymoon stay. The combination of friendly staff, good location, excellent breakfast and scenic views makes it well-suited to romantic getaways.

0470c886-0b79-4a20-80a1-e9fb7dc62494.a: Villa Verde is in a quiet, nature-surrounded area of Salzburg, Austria, about a 10-minute walk from the city centre. Guests praise the peaceful setting, with nearby lake walks and easy access to Salzburg's attractions.

Villa Verde scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness. It's a small, lovingly run property with tastefully decorated rooms in calming colours, quality furnishings, and thoughtful touches like welcome gifts—creating a warm, intimate atmosphere.

0470c886-0b79-4a20-80a1-e9fb7dc62494.q: Is the breakfast good at Villa Verde?
0470c886-0b79-4a20-80a1-e9fb7dc62494.a: Yes, guests consistently call the breakfast exceptional. It's a generous buffet with a wide selection of fresh, tasty options, and the hosts even personalise the experience—one guest mentioned the owner shares recipes and makes excellent coffee.

0470c886-0b79-4a20-80a1-e9fb7dc62494.q: What's the service like at Villa Verde?
0470c886-0b79-4a20-80a1-e9fb7dc62494.a: The owners, Alexandra and Iris, are genuinely welcoming and attentive. Guests report being treated like old friends, receiving local tips and maps, and experiencing a level of care that makes the stay feel personal and special.
Yes, Villa Verde has private, on-site parking available for guests—convenient if you're arriving by car in Salzburg.

0470c886-0b79-4a20-80a1-e9fb7dc62494.q: What's the guest rating for Villa Verde?
0470c886-0b79-4a20-80a1-e9fb7dc62494.a: Villa Verde has an excellent 4.8 out of 5 stars from 372 reviews. Guests consistently praise its cleanliness, comfort, attentive hosts, and peaceful location.

5161f5bd-388c-488b-bce4-1afad1aa0117.a: Sapodilla Ubud is situated in Ubud, Bali, Indonesia. Although not in the city centre, the hotel offers a complimentary shuttle service (7 AM–10 PM) to help guests explore the area.
Sapodilla Ubud has a cosy score of 7.0/10, reflecting its warm, welcoming atmosphere and intimate boutique-hotel character that makes guests feel genuinely at home.

5161f5bd-388c-488b-bce4-1afad1aa0117.q: Is the service good at Sapodilla Ubud?
5161f5bd-388c-488b-bce4-1afad1aa0117.a: Yes—guests consistently praise the staff as exceptionally warm, friendly, and attentive. Many describe feeling genuinely looked after from arrival, with the team greeting guests as 'welcome home' and creating a family-oriented, hospitable environment.

5161f5bd-388c-488b-bce4-1afad1aa0117.q: What is breakfast like at Sapodilla Ubud?
5161f5bd-388c-488b-bce4-1afad1aa0117.a: Breakfast is excellent and made fresh to order. Guests can select from a varied menu and enjoy it either in their room or at the restaurant, with many highlighting the leisurely, private experience of dining in-room.

5161f5bd-388c-488b-bce4-1afad1aa0117.q: Are the rooms spacious at Sapodilla Ubud?
5161f5bd-388c-488b-bce4-1afad1aa0117.a: Yes, rooms are notably spacious and beautifully designed with comfortable beds. Bathrooms are equally generous, often featuring separate shower areas, bathtubs, and separate toilets, with daily housekeeping keeping everything immaculate.
Yes, the hotel is set amidst peaceful tropical gardens, creating a serene and relaxing retreat within Ubud.

f246df9d-07f5-433e-ab26-a90ec2906dda.a: Rakucho Ryokan is in Kyoto, Japan, in a quiet residential area outside the city centre. It's well connected by subway and local buses, making it easy to reach Kyoto's attractions despite being slightly removed from the downtown hustle.

Rakucho Ryokan scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness. Guests consistently praise its warm, homey atmosphere—many called it their favourite stay of their entire trip, with the traditional tatami rooms, futon beds, and peaceful garden creating an authentically comfortable retreat.

f246df9d-07f5-433e-ab26-a90ec2906dda.q: What is the service like at Rakucho Ryokan?
f246df9d-07f5-433e-ab26-a90ec2906dda.a: The host is exceptionally welcoming, helpful, and fluent in English. Guests highlight his genuine hospitality, local recommendations for eating and exploring, and willingness to help with last-minute changes—many visitors say they'd return specifically because of the owner's kindness.

f246df9d-07f5-433e-ab26-a90ec2906dda.q: What amenities does Rakucho Ryokan offer?
f246df9d-07f5-433e-ab26-a90ec2906dda.a: The ryokan provides modern, clean shared shower and toilet facilities, a kitchen corner, laundry facilities (washer and dryer), and rooms with traditional Japanese tatami mats and futon beds. It's been nicely renovated to blend authentic design with contemporary comfort where it matters most.

f246df9d-07f5-433e-ab26-a90ec2906dda.q: Is Rakucho Ryokan good for experiencing traditional Japanese accommodation?
f246df9d-07f5-433e-ab26-a90ec2906dda.a: Yes—guests praise the authentic traditional Japanese rooms with tatami mats, futon beds, and views into a small Japanese garden. The ryokan successfully combines genuine period character with modern conveniences, making it ideal for travellers seeking a real ryokan experience without sacrificing comfort.

9089ed42-94bf-4ac1-ad54-c7739dd20a33.q: Where is Komaneka at Bisma located?
9089ed42-94bf-4ac1-ad54-c7739dd20a33.a: Komaneka at Bisma is in the heart of Ubud, Bali, just a few hundred metres from the busy city centre but nestled in a peaceful spot surrounded by rice fields and lush greenery.

9089ed42-94bf-4ac1-ad54-c7739dd20a33.q: How cosy is Komaneka at Bisma?
9089ed42-94bf-4ac1-ad54-c7739dd20a33.a: With a cosy score of 7.0/10, Komaneka at Bisma offers a warm, intimate boutique atmosphere that guests describe as a magical oasis—peaceful, beautifully decorated, and genuinely welcoming.

9089ed42-94bf-4ac1-ad54-c7739dd20a33.q: Is the service good at Komaneka at Bisma?
9089ed42-94bf-4ac1-ad54-c7739dd20a33.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the staff as wonderful and attentive, with team members like Ms. Mei remembered for thoughtful gestures such as handwritten cards and personalised welcomes that make visitors feel genuinely valued.

9089ed42-94bf-4ac1-ad54-c7739dd20a33.q: What are the rooms like at Komaneka at Bisma?
9089ed42-94bf-4ac1-ad54-c7739dd20a33.a: Rooms are spacious and beautifully decorated with stunning valley and garden views; guests particularly love features like independent air-con controls in different zones and original bathrooms, with many describing their stay as heavenly and perfect.

9089ed42-94bf-4ac1-ad54-c7739dd20a33.q: Does Komaneka at Bisma have good food and breakfast?
9089ed42-94bf-4ac1-ad54-c7739dd20a33.a: Yes, guests rave about the delicious food and generous cooked breakfast selection with colourful fresh juices, with one visitor calling the dining experience magical and another noting the wide, tasty range.

9089ed42-94bf-4ac1-ad54-c7739dd20a33.q: Is Komaneka at Bisma good for couples and special occasions?
9089ed42-94bf-4ac1-ad54-c7739dd20a33.a: Absolutely—guests have celebrated honeymoons and anniversaries here, with the resort earning a 4.8/5 rating from over 1,175 reviews and visitors describing it as one of the most romantic and special places they've stayed in Bali.

c681c075-2690-4e71-9c1b-054c04d42355.q: Where is Ca' Pozzo Inn located in Venice?
c681c075-2690-4e71-9c1b-054c04d42355.a: Ca' Pozzo Inn sits in a quiet alley just off Fondamenta Cannaregio, about a 10-minute walk from Venice train station and steps from Guglie vaporetto station. Guests love that it's tucked away from the tourist crowds yet within easy walking distance of the main attractions.

c681c075-2690-4e71-9c1b-054c04d42355.q: How cosy is Ca' Pozzo Inn?
c681c075-2690-4e71-9c1b-054c04d42355.a: Ca' Pozzo Inn has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10. It's a modest, clean space with modern updates, though some guests note the atmosphere is fairly straightforward rather than particularly intimate.

c681c075-2690-4e71-9c1b-054c04d42355.q: Is the staff at Ca' Pozzo Inn helpful?
c681c075-2690-4e71-9c1b-054c04d42355.a: Yes—guests consistently praise the staff as friendly, impeccable, and genuinely helpful. One visitor noted they went above and beyond to accommodate special needs, and others highlighted how staff recommended excellent nearby restaurants within a short walk.

c681c075-2690-4e71-9c1b-054c04d42355.q: Is Ca' Pozzo Inn good for couples?
c681c075-2690-4e71-9c1b-054c04d42355.a: It can be, especially if you value location and attentive service. One couple loved the clean, spacious rooms and praised the staff warmth, though comfort depends on your tolerance for warm nights—the air conditioning has been unreliable for some guests.

c681c075-2690-4e71-9c1b-054c04d42355.q: What's the breakfast like at Ca' Pozzo Inn?
c681c075-2690-4e71-9c1b-054c04d42355.a: Breakfast offers a decent selection with fresh orange juice and other basics, though guests suggest it's modest rather than elaborate. It's a simple start to your day rather than a highlight of the stay.

e27445a3-3b28-459a-9a2c-ee38a6a696bf.q: Where is Rushton Hall Hotel and Spa located?
e27445a3-3b28-459a-9a2c-ee38a6a696bf.a: Rushton Hall Hotel and Spa is located in Kettering, Northamptonshire (NN14 1RR), in the East Midlands of the UK. The hotel sits within beautiful grounds with a historic building that guests consistently praise for its charm and peaceful setting.

e27445a3-3b28-459a-9a2c-ee38a6a696bf.q: How cosy is Rushton Hall Hotel and Spa?
e27445a3-3b28-459a-9a2c-ee38a6a696bf.a: Rushton Hall scores 6.3 out of 10 for cosiness, indicating a comfortable but not intensely intimate atmosphere. Guests do highlight the relaxing, calm environment and well-maintained rooms, though the scale of the historic property means it's more grand retreat than snug hideaway.

e27445a3-3b28-459a-9a2c-ee38a6a696bf.q: Is the spa at Rushton Hall Hotel and Spa good?
e27445a3-3b28-459a-9a2c-ee38a6a696bf.a: Yes—guests rave about the spa experience, with one visitor calling a solo spa trip 'honestly incredible' and praising the stunning setting and lovely staff. The spa café is particularly noted, with staff like Margaret earning special mention for exceptional warmth and attentiveness.

e27445a3-3b28-459a-9a2c-ee38a6a696bf.q: What is the service like at Rushton Hall Hotel and Spa?
e27445a3-3b28-459a-9a2c-ee38a6a696bf.a: Service is warm and attentive. Guests highlight staff members by name—Dave at reception for his helpfulness, Orapin for her genuine smile and care during afternoon tea—suggesting a team genuinely invested in making stays memorable and personal.

e27445a3-3b28-459a-9a2c-ee38a6a696bf.q: Is Rushton Hall Hotel and Spa good for special occasions?
e27445a3-3b28-459a-9a2c-ee38a6a696bf.a: Yes, it's excellent for celebrations. Guests report the hotel goes the extra mile for birthdays and anniversaries, with thoughtful touches like personalised cards at dinner and a setting so beautiful and well-spaced that groups feel private and special.

e27445a3-3b28-459a-9a2c-ee38a6a696bf.q: What do guests say about the rooms and grounds at Rushton Hall Hotel and Spa?
e27445a3-3b28-459a-9a2c-ee38a6a696bf.a: Guests consistently praise both. Rooms are described as comfortable with lovely views and impressive bathrooms, whilst the grounds and historic building are called 'stunning,' 'beautifully maintained,' and imbued with a 'rare, quiet and magical feel' that makes it feel like a proper getaway.

dec5a57a-a340-4427-8733-094e488529fe.a: Hoksbergen is centrally located in Amsterdam, just a 15-minute walk from the train station in a safe, walkable area near the Nine Streets shopping and bar district.
Hoksbergen has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10, reflecting its compact, budget-friendly nature with small rooms but a welcoming atmosphere.

dec5a57a-a340-4427-8733-094e488529fe.q: Are the rooms at Hoksbergen good value?
dec5a57a-a340-4427-8733-094e488529fe.a: Guests appreciate what they pay for at Hoksbergen—rooms are small and basic, but clean and well-positioned for exploring Amsterdam. Canal-view rooms are particularly worth booking for their sunrise views and opening windows.

dec5a57a-a340-4427-8733-094e488529fe.q: What is the breakfast like at Hoksbergen?
dec5a57a-a340-4427-8733-094e488529fe.a: Breakfast is delicious and served until 1 pm, with complimentary tea and coffee available at reception throughout the day.

dec5a57a-a340-4427-8733-094e488529fe.q: Is the staff helpful at Hoksbergen?
dec5a57a-a340-4427-8733-094e488529fe.a: Yes, the reception team are consistently praised as kind, friendly and helpful, though staff are primarily available during breakfast hours and guests receive a numerical code for after-hours entry.

dec5a57a-a340-4427-8733-094e488529fe.q: Does Hoksbergen have air conditioning or lifts?
dec5a57a-a340-4427-8733-094e488529fe.a: No—Hoksbergen has no air conditioning or lift, so be prepared for steep stairs, particularly if you're staying on upper floors (which do offer better canal views and opening windows).

6e1b87f6-fd64-4344-a433-a564d69ecce2.a: Eccles Townhouse is in Dublin, Ireland, in an excellent location close to different bus stops and within easy walking distance of the city centre.
Eccles Townhouse has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10. Guests particularly love the cosy café at the front, where you can enjoy toasties, crisps and hot chocolate.

6e1b87f6-fd64-4344-a433-a564d69ecce2.q: Is the breakfast good at Eccles Townhouse?
6e1b87f6-fd64-4344-a433-a564d69ecce2.a: Yes, breakfast is a real highlight. Guests praise the tasty, plentiful, freshly made breakfast served to your table, with high-quality ingredients and good options including veggie and pancake choices.

6e1b87f6-fd64-4344-a433-a564d69ecce2.q: What is the service like at Eccles Townhouse?
6e1b87f6-fd64-4344-a433-a564d69ecce2.a: Staff are consistently praised as friendly, helpful and welcoming. The owner, Tom, goes above and beyond to make guests' stays smooth and pleasant.

6e1b87f6-fd64-4344-a433-a564d69ecce2.q: Are the rooms clean and comfortable at Eccles Townhouse?
6e1b87f6-fd64-4344-a433-a564d69ecce2.a: Yes, guests describe rooms as lovely, tidy, clean and comfortable, with clean and comfortable beds, though note that stairs are steep and showers are small.

514bc3f4-1cde-4083-b3ac-e2f4245da39e.a: City Pension is in Vienna's heart, just a two-minute walk from the city centre and St Stephen's Cathedral, with the metro station a short five-minute walk away. The location is central yet calm, surrounded by shops, cafés and restaurants without traffic noise.
City Pension has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10. Guests consistently praise the warm, comfortable atmosphere and describe rooms as clean, quiet and genuinely welcoming.

514bc3f4-1cde-4083-b3ac-e2f4245da39e.q: Is the self-check-in at City Pension easy?
514bc3f4-1cde-4083-b3ac-e2f4245da39e.a: Yes, the self-check-in is straightforward and convenient. Guests receive a code in advance and report the process is well-explained; it's particularly helpful if you arrive outside standard hours or your flight is delayed.

514bc3f4-1cde-4083-b3ac-e2f4245da39e.q: What do guests say about the service at City Pension?
514bc3f4-1cde-4083-b3ac-e2f4245da39e.a: Staff are attentive and helpful, answering questions readily. The cleaning team is friendly and the overall hospitality makes guests feel genuinely looked after, even with the self-check-in model.

514bc3f4-1cde-4083-b3ac-e2f4245da39e.q: Are the rooms clean at City Pension?
514bc3f4-1cde-4083-b3ac-e2f4245da39e.a: Yes, guests consistently describe the rooms as squeaky clean and well-maintained, with a quiet, comfortable atmosphere that makes for a restful stay.

28f645ac-d82e-4c86-91a3-136fc230ece5.q: Where is Hotel Regina located in Vienna?
28f645ac-d82e-4c86-91a3-136fc230ece5.a: Hotel Regina sits in a prestigious spot right next to the Votivkirche on Vienna's Ringstrasse, steps from the University of Vienna, the Rathaus, and Schottentor metro and tram stops. It's about a 15-minute walk to the city centre and surrounded by cafés, restaurants, and easy access to most of Vienna's landmarks.

28f645ac-d82e-4c86-91a3-136fc230ece5.q: What is the cosy score for Hotel Regina?
28f645ac-d82e-4c86-91a3-136fc230ece5.a: Hotel Regina has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10, reflecting a traditional Viennese hotel with genuine character rather than modern luxury.

28f645ac-d82e-4c86-91a3-136fc230ece5.q: Is Hotel Regina good for breakfast?
28f645ac-d82e-4c86-91a3-136fc230ece5.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the breakfast as excellent, with a large choice of items including fresh coffee and made-to-order espresso and cappuccino.

28f645ac-d82e-4c86-91a3-136fc230ece5.q: What is the service like at Hotel Regina?
28f645ac-d82e-4c86-91a3-136fc230ece5.a: Staff receive warm praise for being friendly, helpful, and sympathetic to guest requests, with particular mention of attentive check-in service.

28f645ac-d82e-4c86-91a3-136fc230ece5.q: Is Hotel Regina a good choice for traditional Viennese charm?
28f645ac-d82e-4c86-91a3-136fc230ece5.a: Absolutely—guests describe it as a wonderfully charming traditional Viennese hotel with character and impeccable service, ideal if you value authentic style over modern amenities.

28f645ac-d82e-4c86-91a3-136fc230ece5.q: Are the rooms at Hotel Regina spacious?
28f645ac-d82e-4c86-91a3-136fc230ece5.a: Rooms are on the smaller side, which is typical for European hotels, but guests note they're clean and well-decorated, with some offering fantastic views of the neighbouring Votivkirche.

0f515e2a-820f-432c-a6ee-f9ed740770b4.a: Egan's Guesthouse is situated in a quiet neighbourhood in Dublin, with convenient public transport connections to the city centre and airport. Guests appreciate its peaceful setting whilst remaining accessible by bus.
Egan's Guesthouse has a cosy score of 5.0 out of 10. Whilst the furnishings are dated, guests find the overall atmosphere comfortable and fitting with a relaxed, homely vibe.

0f515e2a-820f-432c-a6ee-f9ed740770b4.q: Is the service good at Egan's Guesthouse?
0f515e2a-820f-432c-a6ee-f9ed740770b4.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the friendly and helpful staff. The team go out of their way with directions and recommendations, and staff like Harry at reception are noted as particularly excellent.

0f515e2a-820f-432c-a6ee-f9ed740770b4.q: Are the rooms clean at Egan's Guesthouse?
0f515e2a-820f-432c-a6ee-f9ed740770b4.a: Spotlessly clean rooms are a highlight guests mention repeatedly. Rooms are compact but well-maintained, with comfortable beds, though pillows are noted as quite firm by some visitors.

0f515e2a-820f-432c-a6ee-f9ed740770b4.q: Is Egan's Guesthouse good value for money?
0f515e2a-820f-432c-a6ee-f9ed740770b4.a: Guests find it offers fair pricing compared to other Dublin options, especially for families or those seeking a quiet, budget-friendly base. Parking is available for €12 extra per night and must be reserved in advance.

0f515e2a-820f-432c-a6ee-f9ed740770b4.q: Is Egan's Guesthouse suitable for families?
0f515e2a-820f-432c-a6ee-f9ed740770b4.a: Yes, it's particularly recommended for families and groups. Guests have noted generous room upgrades, helpful staff willing to store luggage before arrival and after checkout, and a peaceful environment ideal for a restful stay.

e87aa3ec-eba8-4530-b796-fd05194d0942.a: Villa Casanova is on the Lido, a quiet island near Venice. It's about 5 minutes' walk from the vaporetta (water bus) station, roughly 30 minutes by boat from Venice's central train station, and within easy walking distance of restaurants, bars and shops.

e87aa3ec-eba8-4530-b796-fd05194d0942.q: What is the cosy score for Villa Casanova?
e87aa3ec-eba8-4530-b796-fd05194d0942.a: Villa Casanova has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10, reflecting a peaceful, well-maintained property with comfortable basics rather than luxury touches.

e87aa3ec-eba8-4530-b796-fd05194d0942.q: Is the breakfast good at Villa Casanova?
e87aa3ec-eba8-4530-b796-fd05194d0942.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the breakfast. It's simple but delicious, with a variety of cold cuts, breads and biscuits, plus excellent coffee prepared by a friendly barista on-site.

e87aa3ec-eba8-4530-b796-fd05194d0942.q: Is Villa Casanova good for a peaceful stay?
e87aa3ec-eba8-4530-b796-fd05194d0942.a: Absolutely. Guests describe it as ideal, quiet and calm—a peaceful spot to rest after exploring Venice, with helpful staff who keep the place very clean and well maintained.

e87aa3ec-eba8-4530-b796-fd05194d0942.q: What are the rooms like at Villa Casanova?
e87aa3ec-eba8-4530-b796-fd05194d0942.a: Rooms are neat and clean with comfortable beds and modern amenities, though they're modest rather than posh. Some attic rooms are small with low ceilings and no windows, so it's worth checking your room type when booking.

e87aa3ec-eba8-4530-b796-fd05194d0942.q: Is the staff helpful at Villa Casanova?
e87aa3ec-eba8-4530-b796-fd05194d0942.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the friendly and supportive team. Alessandro and his staff offer local tips, prepare excellent breakfasts, and go out of their way to help guests feel welcome.

71d54ec7-9306-4d6b-9a49-74c498f2fb8f.q: Where is Boutique Hotel Klarov located?
71d54ec7-9306-4d6b-9a49-74c498f2fb8f.a: Boutique Hotel Klarov is situated in Prague between the castle and city centre, with excellent transport links—the metro and tram stops are just across the park, and the Old Town bridge is a short walk away. Most major attractions are within walking distance.

71d54ec7-9306-4d6b-9a49-74c498f2fb8f.q: How cosy is Boutique Hotel Klarov?
71d54ec7-9306-4d6b-9a49-74c498f2fb8f.a: The hotel scores 6.3 out of 10 for cosiness. Guests appreciated the warm interior design, particularly its Christmas atmosphere, though experiences varied on overall comfort and upkeep.

71d54ec7-9306-4d6b-9a49-74c498f2fb8f.q: What are the rooms like at Boutique Hotel Klarov?
71d54ec7-9306-4d6b-9a49-74c498f2fb8f.a: Rooms are spacious and nicely furnished with good views—many guests noted they were larger than typical European hotel rooms, with some offering stunning city vistas. They come with thoughtful extras like in-room coffee machines.

71d54ec7-9306-4d6b-9a49-74c498f2fb8f.q: Is the breakfast good at Boutique Hotel Klarov?
71d54ec7-9306-4d6b-9a49-74c498f2fb8f.a: Breakfast is generally well-regarded and hearty enough to sustain guests through most of the day, though the selection remains the same daily. Some found it excellent, whilst others felt it was acceptable but unremarkable.

71d54ec7-9306-4d6b-9a49-74c498f2fb8f.q: What is the service like at Boutique Hotel Klarov?
71d54ec7-9306-4d6b-9a49-74c498f2fb8f.a: Staff are consistently praised as extremely kind, friendly, and willing to help. Guests particularly highlighted the warmth and professionalism of the reception team in making their stay memorable.

f261b06b-50c0-4895-a06b-a08888b28644.a: Ryokan Nakajimaya is in central Kyoto, just off the main strip and very close to Nishiki Market and a subway station, making it convenient for exploring the city's attractions.

f261b06b-50c0-4895-a06b-a08888b28644.q: What is the cosy score for Ryokan Nakajimaya?
f261b06b-50c0-4895-a06b-a08888b28644.a: Ryokan Nakajimaya has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10, reflecting its character as a simple, traditional ryokan with authentic Japanese hospitality.

f261b06b-50c0-4895-a06b-a08888b28644.q: Is Ryokan Nakajimaya good for couples?
f261b06b-50c0-4895-a06b-a08888b28644.a: Yes—guests, including tall Western couples, have praised the spacious traditional rooms and the welcoming owners who make visitors feel like family during their stay.

f261b06b-50c0-4895-a06b-a08888b28644.q: What are the facilities like at Ryokan Nakajimaya?
f261b06b-50c0-4895-a06b-a08888b28644.a: The ryokan offers traditional Japanese-style rooms with shared bathrooms, including both Japanese and Western-style toilets and showers, plus air conditioning in every room.

f261b06b-50c0-4895-a06b-a08888b28644.q: What is the service like at Ryokan Nakajimaya?
f261b06b-50c0-4895-a06b-a08888b28644.a: The two owners—described as incredibly kind and hospitable older women—run the ryokan with genuine warmth, though English is limited; guests consistently report feeling welcomed and well cared for.

f261b06b-50c0-4895-a06b-a08888b28644.q: What should I know about staying at Ryokan Nakajimaya?
f261b06b-50c0-4895-a06b-a08888b28644.a: The ryokan has a 23:00 curfew and closes from midnight until 07:00, so you'll need to arrive by then; it's a basic, reasonably priced traditional experience rather than a modern hotel.

a7a02bf1-cb91-458c-a8b8-f92d6a288f8e.q: Where is De la Paix located?
a7a02bf1-cb91-458c-a8b8-f92d6a288f8e.a: De la Paix is in Interlaken, Switzerland, in a quiet street close to the town centre. It's conveniently positioned near shops, a shopping mall with a grocery store, and within easy reach of Interlaken West station.

a7a02bf1-cb91-458c-a8b8-f92d6a288f8e.q: How cosy is De la Paix?
a7a02bf1-cb91-458c-a8b8-f92d6a288f8e.a: De la Paix has a cosy score of 7.0/10. Guests love the antique, vintage feel with its charming old clocks, posters, and historic lift, though some note the hotel's age means rooms can feel a touch dusty.

a7a02bf1-cb91-458c-a8b8-f92d6a288f8e.q: Is the staff friendly at De la Paix?
a7a02bf1-cb91-458c-a8b8-f92d6a288f8e.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the staff as exceptionally warm, helpful, and accommodating from arrival to departure. The reception team are particularly noted for going above and beyond—offering umbrellas, travel adapters, and local advice without fuss.

a7a02bf1-cb91-458c-a8b8-f92d6a288f8e.q: What is breakfast like at De la Paix?
a7a02bf1-cb91-458c-a8b8-f92d6a288f8e.a: Breakfast is simple but varied, with hot drinks served directly to your table. Guests highlight the quality of croissants, eggs, and the generous, good-value offering that sets a pleasant start to the day.

a7a02bf1-cb91-458c-a8b8-f92d6a288f8e.q: Are the rooms comfortable at De la Paix?
a7a02bf1-cb91-458c-a8b8-f92d6a288f8e.a: Rooms are comfortable with features like balconies, gorgeous views, and adjustable bed heads. There's no air conditioning (standard in Swiss hotels), but fans and opening windows are provided; secure bicycle storage is also available in a garage.

b490a710-de2d-4d68-a12a-348b7b7a5be4.q: Where is The Old Rectory Bed & Breakfast located?
b490a710-de2d-4d68-a12a-348b7b7a5be4.a: The Old Rectory is in Bath, United Kingdom, in a beautiful countryside setting near the A303. It's conveniently positioned for visiting nearby attractions like Stonehenge and Stourhead Garden, and guests praise its peaceful location despite proximity to the main road.

b490a710-de2d-4d68-a12a-348b7b7a5be4.q: How cosy is The Old Rectory Bed & Breakfast?
b490a710-de2d-4d68-a12a-348b7b7a5be4.a: The Old Rectory scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness. Guests consistently describe it as a warm, comfortable home with exceptionally comfortable beds, beautiful antique furnishings, and a peaceful garden setting that feels more like a charming country hotel than a standard B&B.

b490a710-de2d-4d68-a12a-348b7b7a5be4.q: Is the breakfast good at The Old Rectory Bed & Breakfast?
b490a710-de2d-4d68-a12a-348b7b7a5be4.a: Yes, breakfast is a genuine highlight. Guests rave about the delicious full English breakfast cooked to order, with excellent coffee and thoughtful touches like complimentary tea, coffee and biscuits in the rooms.

b490a710-de2d-4d68-a12a-348b7b7a5be4.q: What are the hosts like at The Old Rectory Bed & Breakfast?
b490a710-de2d-4d68-a12a-348b7b7a5be4.a: Owners Tim and Helen are consistently praised as kind, friendly, and exceptionally helpful. Guests highlight their genuine hospitality—one guest even noted they were supportive when her car broke down—and their willingness to offer local advice and accommodation for families.

b490a710-de2d-4d68-a12a-348b7b7a5be4.q: Is The Old Rectory Bed & Breakfast good for families?
b490a710-de2d-4d68-a12a-348b7b7a5be4.a: Yes, it works well for families. Guests with children have stayed in interconnecting rooms where children had their own space whilst parents remained nearby, and the peaceful garden setting and spacious accommodation suit family visits.

ac753dcd-38fc-40af-9aa6-8f9bdd0957e1.q: Where is Logis Hotel Gourmet & Relax de la Sure Rest. Comte Godefroy located?
ac753dcd-38fc-40af-9aa6-8f9bdd0957e1.a: The hotel is situated in Esch-sur-Sûre, a charming village in Luxembourg, offering a peaceful and picturesque setting for your stay.

ac753dcd-38fc-40af-9aa6-8f9bdd0957e1.q: How cosy is Logis Hotel Gourmet & Relax de la Sure Rest. Comte Godefroy?
ac753dcd-38fc-40af-9aa6-8f9bdd0957e1.a: The hotel has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10, suggesting a comfortable but fairly straightforward atmosphere rather than an exceptionally intimate or warm environment.

ac753dcd-38fc-40af-9aa6-8f9bdd0957e1.q: Is the restaurant good at Logis Hotel Gourmet & Relax de la Sure Rest. Comte Godefroy?
ac753dcd-38fc-40af-9aa6-8f9bdd0957e1.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the restaurant for its authentic rustic food, excellent presentation, and friendly service—with several noting the quality is outstanding and prices are very decent.

ac753dcd-38fc-40af-9aa6-8f9bdd0957e1.q: Does Logis Hotel Gourmet & Relax de la Sure Rest. Comte Godefroy have a spa?
ac753dcd-38fc-40af-9aa6-8f9bdd0957e1.a: Yes, the hotel features a beautiful THALGO spa partly carved into the rock, with saunas, hammam, jacuzzi, and peaceful relaxation areas that guests describe as calm and intimate.

ac753dcd-38fc-40af-9aa6-8f9bdd0957e1.q: What is the service like at Logis Hotel Gourmet & Relax de la Sure Rest. Comte Godefroy?
ac753dcd-38fc-40af-9aa6-8f9bdd0957e1.a: Staff are consistently described as extremely friendly, welcoming, and helpful—from assisting with parking to providing attentive restaurant service and warm check-in experiences.

ac753dcd-38fc-40af-9aa6-8f9bdd0957e1.q: Is Logis Hotel Gourmet & Relax de la Sure Rest. Comte Godefroy good for a relaxing getaway?
ac753dcd-38fc-40af-9aa6-8f9bdd0957e1.a: Yes, with its spa facilities, peaceful village location, and excellent food, guests find it an ideal spot for disconnecting and enjoying a calm, intimate retreat.

339e47f1-163b-44c8-808a-9fb7430238b3.a: U Medvídků is in Prague, Česko, housed in a historic brewery building dating back to 1466. It's a traditional Czech establishment that blends authentic local atmosphere with modern hospitality.

U Medvídků has a cosy score of 5.7/10. Guests describe it as 'old vibey' with a historic interior that creates a unique atmosphere, though the experience can feel more authentically local than traditionally intimate.

339e47f1-163b-44c8-808a-9fb7430238b3.q: Is the beer good at U Medvídků?
339e47f1-163b-44c8-808a-9fb7430238b3.a: Yes—guests consistently praise the beer as excellent and tasty, with many returning specifically for it. As a traditional Czech brewery, it's known for serving great local beer that justifies the visit alone.

339e47f1-163b-44c8-808a-9fb7430238b3.q: What food does U Medvídků serve?
339e47f1-163b-44c8-808a-9fb7430238b3.a: U Medvídků serves traditional Czech dishes, with pork knuckle and chips being particularly praised by guests. The food is described as delicious and reasonably priced, offering an authentic local dining experience rather than a touristy one.

339e47f1-163b-44c8-808a-9fb7430238b3.q: Is the service good at U Medvídků?
339e47f1-163b-44c8-808a-9fb7430238b3.a: Service is mixed but often improves with repeat visits. Guests report it can be hectic and occasionally curt, but many find it fast and friendly once you're a regular—one visitor noted staff warmth noticeably increased by the second day, describing it as an 'authentic Czech tradition.'

339e47f1-163b-44c8-808a-9fb7430238b3.q: Is U Medvídků good for a casual dinner?
339e47f1-163b-44c8-808a-9fb7430238b3.a: Yes, it's ideal for a straightforward, unpretentious dinner with great beer and traditional food. Guests appreciate it as a genuine local spot with reasonable prices and fast service, perfect if you want an authentic Prague experience rather than a polished tourist venue.

a3634801-9d8f-48a9-8254-ffdb3ff171ac.a: Ryokan Kyoraku is in Kyoto, Japan, just 8–10 minutes' walk from Kyoto Station, making it very convenient for transport and exploring the city.
Ryokan Kyoraku has a cosy score of 7.7/10, reflecting its warm, intimate atmosphere as a traditional Japanese ryokan with thoughtful hospitality.
Yes, guests consistently praise the cleanliness throughout—rooms, shared bathrooms, and all spaces are kept exceptionally clean and well-maintained.

a3634801-9d8f-48a9-8254-ffdb3ff171ac.q: What is the service like at Ryokan Kyoraku?
a3634801-9d8f-48a9-8254-ffdb3ff171ac.a: The staff are known for outstanding, heartwarming hospitality; guests report they go the extra mile, from explaining everything in advance to helping with luggage delivery to your next hotel.

a3634801-9d8f-48a9-8254-ffdb3ff171ac.q: Is Ryokan Kyoraku a good authentic Japanese experience?
a3634801-9d8f-48a9-8254-ffdb3ff171ac.a: Yes, it's designed as a true traditional Japanese house with tatami rooms, futons, and modern bathrooms, offering an immersive ryokan stay without on-site dining.

a3634801-9d8f-48a9-8254-ffdb3ff171ac.q: Are the rooms spacious at Ryokan Kyoraku?
a3634801-9d8f-48a9-8254-ffdb3ff171ac.a: Rooms are intentionally compact in the traditional ryokan style—you sleep on a futon on the floor—but guests find them well-equipped and clean, with modern toilet facilities.

ae0c78a1-7a97-480d-a6a5-3507eb1679e9.q: Where is Hotel am Museum located?
ae0c78a1-7a97-480d-a6a5-3507eb1679e9.a: Hotel am Museum is in Hamburg, Germany, in a safe neighbourhood within walking distance of the city centre and its museums. Guests consistently praise the convenient location for exploring the city.

ae0c78a1-7a97-480d-a6a5-3507eb1679e9.q: How cosy is Hotel am Museum?
ae0c78a1-7a97-480d-a6a5-3507eb1679e9.a: Hotel am Museum has a cosy score of 7.0/10. The elegant Altbau building with original fireplaces and period details creates a charming, home-like atmosphere that guests find inviting.

ae0c78a1-7a97-480d-a6a5-3507eb1679e9.q: What is the service like at Hotel am Museum?
ae0c78a1-7a97-480d-a6a5-3507eb1679e9.a: Staff at Hotel am Museum go above and beyond—guests report exceptional hospitality, including flexible late checkout and complimentary tea, coffee and water. The team is described as quick and unbureaucratic in their approach.

ae0c78a1-7a97-480d-a6a5-3507eb1679e9.q: Does Hotel am Museum have outdoor space?
ae0c78a1-7a97-480d-a6a5-3507eb1679e9.a: Yes, Hotel am Museum has a lovely garden at the back where guests can relax. It's one of the features visitors particularly enjoy about the property.

ae0c78a1-7a97-480d-a6a5-3507eb1679e9.q: What are the rooms like at Hotel am Museum?
ae0c78a1-7a97-480d-a6a5-3507eb1679e9.a: Rooms are spacious and thoughtfully decorated in the historic building, with original wooden floors and period features. Note that some rooms have shared rather than en-suite toilets, so it's worth checking your specific room type when booking.

ae0c78a1-7a97-480d-a6a5-3507eb1679e9.q: What do guests think of Hotel am Museum?
ae0c78a1-7a97-480d-a6a5-3507eb1679e9.a: Hotel am Museum has a 4.9/5 rating from 85 reviews. Guests love the beautiful building, fair pricing, and welcoming atmosphere, though opinions vary on room facilities and comfort details.

230003db-a789-4869-b693-6b7d0b248be4.q: Where is Market Pavilion Hotel located?
230003db-a789-4869-b693-6b7d0b248be4.a: Market Pavilion Hotel sits in downtown Charleston, directly opposite the historic Custom House and City Market, putting you within walking distance of all the main attractions and restaurants.

230003db-a789-4869-b693-6b7d0b248be4.q: How cosy is Market Pavilion Hotel?
230003db-a789-4869-b693-6b7d0b248be4.a: Market Pavilion Hotel scores 5.7 out of 10 for cosiness—it's a classic, upmarket property with a luxe lobby feel rather than an intimate retreat, but guests consistently praise its comfortable rooms and thoughtful touches.

230003db-a789-4869-b693-6b7d0b248be4.q: Is the service good at Market Pavilion Hotel?
230003db-a789-4869-b693-6b7d0b248be4.a: Yes, guests regularly highlight the exceptional service; staff remember names, go above and beyond for special occasions, and the bartender Clark is known for making excellent cocktails.

230003db-a789-4869-b693-6b7d0b248be4.q: What's the dining like at Market Pavilion Hotel?
230003db-a789-4869-b693-6b7d0b248be4.a: The hotel's 225 restaurant and bar in the main lobby earn strong praise for memorable meals and service, and there's a complimentary continental breakfast bar with pastries, fresh fruit, and an all-day coffee setup on every floor.

230003db-a789-4869-b693-6b7d0b248be4.q: Is Market Pavilion Hotel good for couples?
230003db-a789-4869-b693-6b7d0b248be4.a: It's a popular choice for anniversaries and romantic getaways; staff create special moments like delivering chocolate-covered strawberries, and the central location makes it easy to explore Charleston together.

230003db-a789-4869-b693-6b7d0b248be4.q: What amenities does Market Pavilion Hotel have?
230003db-a789-4869-b693-6b7d0b248be4.a: The hotel features a rooftop, a bar, bathtubs in rooms, and a continental breakfast bar; note that some guests have reported issues with pool accessibility, so check specific facilities when booking.

b5d5cbe2-f805-4dbc-a27b-1388b5f1afe4.q: Where is Hotel Lunetta located in Rome?
b5d5cbe2-f805-4dbc-a27b-1388b5f1afe4.a: Hotel Lunetta is in the centre of Rome, within walking distance of major piazzas, restaurants, and key sights. Guests consistently praise the location for easy access to everything without needing transport.

Hotel Lunetta has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10, suggesting it's moderately comfortable rather than exceptionally intimate or snug, though many guests do find the rooms clean and the beds comfortable.

b5d5cbe2-f805-4dbc-a27b-1388b5f1afe4.q: Is the service good at Hotel Lunetta?
b5d5cbe2-f805-4dbc-a27b-1388b5f1afe4.a: Yes—staff receive consistent praise for being friendly, attentive, helpful, and responsive to guest needs. Many describe the service as impeccable and going above and beyond to ensure comfort.

b5d5cbe2-f805-4dbc-a27b-1388b5f1afe4.q: Does Hotel Lunetta have a spa?
b5d5cbe2-f805-4dbc-a27b-1388b5f1afe4.a: Yes, Hotel Lunetta has a spa with a sauna, steam room, and small pool. Guests find these facilities a wonderful way to relax and recover after a full day of sightseeing.

b5d5cbe2-f805-4dbc-a27b-1388b5f1afe4.q: What is breakfast like at Hotel Lunetta?
b5d5cbe2-f805-4dbc-a27b-1388b5f1afe4.a: Breakfast is generally well-received, with guests noting it's pretty good and includes pastries, though some feel the pastries could occasionally be fresher.

b5d5cbe2-f805-4dbc-a27b-1388b5f1afe4.q: Are the rooms at Hotel Lunetta comfortable?
b5d5cbe2-f805-4dbc-a27b-1388b5f1afe4.a: Most guests find the rooms clean and comfortable with good beds and soundproofing, though some note the layout can be unusual, storage space is limited, and lighting is occasionally dim.

ba35429b-119b-4369-adaf-54ba39a786a7.q: Where is Broad Street Townhouse located?
ba35429b-119b-4369-adaf-54ba39a786a7.a: Broad Street Townhouse is in the heart of Bath, right in the centre of the city. Guests consistently praise its excellent location for walking to shops, sights and restaurants—everything is within easy reach.

ba35429b-119b-4369-adaf-54ba39a786a7.q: How cosy is Broad Street Townhouse?
ba35429b-119b-4369-adaf-54ba39a786a7.a: Broad Street Townhouse has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10. Whilst the rooms are clean and tastefully decorated with thoughtful touches like fresh tea selections and biscuits, some guests note the steep, winding staircases and occasional maintenance issues.

ba35429b-119b-4369-adaf-54ba39a786a7.q: Is the breakfast good at Broad Street Townhouse?
ba35429b-119b-4369-adaf-54ba39a786a7.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the breakfast. It's complimentary, served in the café downstairs, and offers a wide choice with generous portions—many describe it as delicious and excellent value.

ba35429b-119b-4369-adaf-54ba39a786a7.q: Is Broad Street Townhouse good for special occasions?
ba35429b-119b-4369-adaf-54ba39a786a7.a: Absolutely. The staff go out of their way for celebrations: guests have received personalised birthday cards, complimentary prosecco, and chocolate muffins arranged by the reception team to mark anniversaries and birthdays.

ba35429b-119b-4369-adaf-54ba39a786a7.q: What is the service like at Broad Street Townhouse?
ba35429b-119b-4369-adaf-54ba39a786a7.a: Staff are consistently described as friendly, helpful and accommodating. They're happy to arrange extras like fresh milk for rooms and will even help with meals at the attached pub next door if plans change.

ba35429b-119b-4369-adaf-54ba39a786a7.q: Does Broad Street Townhouse have a lift?
ba35429b-119b-4369-adaf-54ba39a786a7.a: No, there is no lift. Rooms are spread across three floors accessed by steep and winding staircases, so it may not suit guests with mobility concerns or heavy luggage.

6aa4ce03-1079-4664-af23-0a785f78e568.q: Where is Dionard Guest House located?
6aa4ce03-1079-4664-af23-0a785f78e568.a: Dionard Guest House is in Inverness, United Kingdom, within a convenient 10-minute walk to the town centre, making it easy to explore the city on foot.

6aa4ce03-1079-4664-af23-0a785f78e568.q: How cosy is Dionard Guest House?
6aa4ce03-1079-4664-af23-0a785f78e568.a: Dionard Guest House scores 7.7 out of 10 for cosiness, offering a warm, comfortable bed & breakfast experience with well-furnished rooms and thoughtful touches that make guests feel at home.

6aa4ce03-1079-4664-af23-0a785f78e568.q: Is the service good at Dionard Guest House?
6aa4ce03-1079-4664-af23-0a785f78e568.a: Yes, guests consistently praise the exceptional hospitality. Gail and her staff are described as extremely kind, welcoming, and accommodating—going above and beyond, from drying wet gear overnight to arranging transport and adjusting breakfast times to suit guests' needs.

6aa4ce03-1079-4664-af23-0a785f78e568.q: What is breakfast like at Dionard Guest House?
6aa4ce03-1079-4664-af23-0a785f78e568.a: Breakfast is a highlight, featuring local producers and home-made specialities like excellent sausages. Guests have called it the best breakfast of their entire trips, and the team happily accommodates earlier seatings when needed.

6aa4ce03-1079-4664-af23-0a785f78e568.q: Is Dionard Guest House good for couples?
6aa4ce03-1079-4664-af23-0a785f78e568.a: Yes, it's an ideal choice for couples. One guest described their honeymoon stay as delightful, and the welcoming atmosphere, comfortable rooms, and convenient location make it perfect for a romantic getaway.

6aa4ce03-1079-4664-af23-0a785f78e568.q: Are the rooms clean and well-equipped at Dionard Guest House?
6aa4ce03-1079-4664-af23-0a785f78e568.a: Absolutely. Guests consistently highlight spotless, well-furnished rooms with excellent power showers and thoughtful extras like snacks and a detailed local information binder to help you make the most of your stay.

90c9cd52-bd68-410c-bdeb-6bfb2145fed8.q: Where is Acorn Guest House located?
90c9cd52-bd68-410c-bdeb-6bfb2145fed8.a: Acorn Guest House is in Oxford, just outside the city centre but within easy walking distance to town. 90c9cd52-bd68-410c-bdeb-6bfb2145fed8.q: How cosy is Acorn Guest House?
90c9cd52-bd68-410c-bdeb-6bfb2145fed8.a: Acorn Guest House scores 6.3 out of 10 for cosiness. Guests describe it as comfortable and well-appointed with nice beds and thoughtful touches like tea, coffee and a small fridge in rooms, though it's fairly simple accommodation rather than luxurious.

90c9cd52-bd68-410c-bdeb-6bfb2145fed8.q: Is the staff friendly at Acorn Guest House?
90c9cd52-bd68-410c-bdeb-6bfb2145fed8.a: Yes, the staff are consistently praised as exceptionally helpful and warm. Guests highlight their friendliness, local knowledge, and willingness to offer advice about exploring Oxford and the surrounding area.

90c9cd52-bd68-410c-bdeb-6bfb2145fed8.q: What is breakfast like at Acorn Guest House?
90c9cd52-bd68-410c-bdeb-6bfb2145fed8.a: Breakfast at Acorn Guest House is excellent and generous. One guest described it as 'splendid' with a good selection, and it's included as part of your stay.
Yes, guests regularly comment on how clean and spotless the rooms are, with one visitor calling it 'immaculate' and another noting it was 'very clean' throughout their stay.

90c9cd52-bd68-410c-bdeb-6bfb2145fed8.q: Is Acorn Guest House good for couples?
90c9cd52-bd68-410c-bdeb-6bfb2145fed8.a: Yes, it's well-suited for couples visiting Oxford. Guests have stayed for concerts and romantic breaks, appreciating the comfortable beds, friendly atmosphere, and convenient location for exploring the city together.

3e307b16-a896-42fb-8cc5-1d91c1ab01e9.q: Where is The Junei Hotel Kyoto located?
3e307b16-a896-42fb-8cc5-1d91c1ab01e9.a: The Junei Hotel is situated in a quiet neighbourhood in old Kyoto, Japan, yet remains within easy walking distance of many attractions and a nearby train station, making it convenient for exploring the city.

3e307b16-a896-42fb-8cc5-1d91c1ab01e9.q: How cosy is The Junei Hotel Kyoto?
3e307b16-a896-42fb-8cc5-1d91c1ab01e9.a: The Junei Hotel scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness, offering a peaceful, serene environment with thoughtfully designed rooms that guests consistently describe as relaxing and comfortable.

3e307b16-a896-42fb-8cc5-1d91c1ab01e9.q: What is the service like at The Junei Hotel Kyoto?
3e307b16-a896-42fb-8cc5-1d91c1ab01e9.a: The staff at The Junei Hotel are exceptionally attentive and go above and beyond to help guests, from offering warm welcomes with tea and warm towels to providing knowledgeable local recommendations and assistance throughout your stay. Guests regularly compare the hospitality to five-star standards.

3e307b16-a896-42fb-8cc5-1d91c1ab01e9.q: Are the rooms spacious at The Junei Hotel Kyoto?
3e307b16-a896-42fb-8cc5-1d91c1ab01e9.a: Yes—rooms at The Junei Hotel are notably large for Kyoto standards, with especially nice bathrooms featuring peaceful bathtubs and beautiful showers that guests find genuinely relaxing.

3e307b16-a896-42fb-8cc5-1d91c1ab01e9.q: Does The Junei Hotel Kyoto have a sauna?
3e307b16-a896-42fb-8cc5-1d91c1ab01e9.a: The Junei Hotel features a private rooftop sauna dome with heated rocks, a cold bath, and city views; guests find it a worthwhile experience for switching between hot and cold for a rejuvenating retreat.

3e307b16-a896-42fb-8cc5-1d91c1ab01e9.q: What do guests think of The Junei Hotel Kyoto overall?
3e307b16-a896-42fb-8cc5-1d91c1ab01e9.a: The Junei Hotel is rated 4.7 out of 5 from 108 guest reviews, with visitors consistently praising the combination of spacious, comfortable rooms, exceptional staff service, and the peaceful yet accessible location in Kyoto.

edbfa293-11fa-43b7-ad59-453ec24781e7.q: Where is Hotel Praktik Vinoteca located?
edbfa293-11fa-43b7-ad59-453ec24781e7.a: Hotel Praktik Vinoteca is in the heart of Barcelona, Spain, with a bus station right in front for easy public transport access. edbfa293-11fa-43b7-ad59-453ec24781e7.a: Hotel Praktik Vinoteca has a cosy score of 5.7 out of 10. Whilst rooms are small, guests find them comfortable and well-appointed, with good airflow, hot water pressure, and clean décor—perfect for a functional stay rather than a luxurious retreat.

edbfa293-11fa-43b7-ad59-453ec24781e7.q: Is the service good at Hotel Praktik Vinoteca?

edbfa293-11fa-43b7-ad59-453ec24781e7.q: What makes Hotel Praktik Vinoteca special?
edbfa293-11fa-43b7-ad59-453ec24781e7.a: The hotel's wine theme is beautifully executed, and every guest receives a complimentary glass of wine to enjoy in the lovely inner patio or backyard—a charming touch that sets it apart. The hotel also offers flexible room configurations, making it excellent for families or groups needing privacy.

edbfa293-11fa-43b7-ad59-453ec24781e7.q: Are the rooms clean at Hotel Praktik Vinoteca?
edbfa293-11fa-43b7-ad59-453ec24781e7.a: Absolutely. Guests consistently describe the rooms as extremely clean, spick and span, and nicely decorated, with everything needed for a comfortable stay. Rooms at the back of the hotel tend to be particularly quiet.

edbfa293-11fa-43b7-ad59-453ec24781e7.q: Is Hotel Praktik Vinoteca good value?
edbfa293-11fa-43b7-ad59-453ec24781e7.a: Yes, guests find the prices reasonable for the location and quality offered. The inclusion of a complimentary welcome glass of wine and 24-hour concierge access add genuine value to your stay.

a47e1d71-48d2-4682-9ba2-f32f5389e480.q: Where is Lisbon Art Stay located?
a47e1d71-48d2-4682-9ba2-f32f5389e480.a: Lisbon Art Stay is in the heart of Lisbon's city centre, right in Rossio near the metro station and within walking distance of major attractions like Praça do Comércio, the Santa Justa Lift, and Chiado. It's just 30 minutes from the airport by metro and sits conveniently on Rua Augusta, making it ideal if you're exploring the city without a car.

a47e1d71-48d2-4682-9ba2-f32f5389e480.q: How cosy is Lisbon Art Stay?
a47e1d71-48d2-4682-9ba2-f32f5389e480.a: Lisbon Art Stay scores 5.7 out of 10 for cosiness. Whilst the building is old and full of character with artistically decorated rooms, it's a more vibrant, creative space than a traditionally intimate retreat.

a47e1d71-48d2-4682-9ba2-f32f5389e480.q: Is the staff friendly at Lisbon Art Stay?
a47e1d71-48d2-4682-9ba2-f32f5389e480.a: Yes—guests consistently praise the staff as genuinely warm, attentive, and helpful. They're noted for going the extra mile, from offering birthday surprises and welcome wine to arranging early check-ins and assisting guests at the 24-hour front desk.

a47e1d71-48d2-4682-9ba2-f32f5389e480.q: What's the breakfast like at Lisbon Art Stay?
a47e1d71-48d2-4682-9ba2-f32f5389e480.a: Guests rave about the breakfast, with several calling it the best they've had. It's included and sets a strong start to exploring the city.

a47e1d71-48d2-4682-9ba2-f32f5389e480.q: Does Lisbon Art Stay have bars and entertainment?
a47e1d71-48d2-4682-9ba2-f32f5389e480.a: Yes, there are two bars: a rooftop bar and a main-floor bar with food and live music nightly, making it easy to unwind without leaving the hotel.

a47e1d71-48d2-4682-9ba2-f32f5389e480.q: Are the rooms at Lisbon Art Stay well-designed?
a47e1d71-48d2-4682-9ba2-f32f5389e480.a: Guests love the artistic, quirky décor throughout—rooms feature unique touches like distinctive red lighting and creative details that reflect the hotel's artsy character, all kept clean and comfortable.

7894035a-9ffd-4bc6-943c-cff8d79a531d.q: Where is Kyoto Ryokan Gion Sano located?
7894035a-9ffd-4bc6-943c-cff8d79a531d.a: Kyoto Ryokan Gion Sano is in the heart of Higashiyama, Kyoto's main tourist district, within walking distance of major attractions like Kiyomizu-dera, Kodaiji, and Yasaka Jinja. You'll find it surrounded by traditional shopping streets and temples, so you can explore on foot without needing buses.

7894035a-9ffd-4bc6-943c-cff8d79a531d.q: How cosy is Kyoto Ryokan Gion Sano?
7894035a-9ffd-4bc6-943c-cff8d79a531d.a: The ryokan scores 7.7 out of 10 for cosiness, offering a warm, intimate family-run atmosphere with traditional tatami rooms that guests find clean, comfortable, and genuinely welcoming.

7894035a-9ffd-4bc6-943c-cff8d79a531d.q: Is the service good at Kyoto Ryokan Gion Sano?
7894035a-9ffd-4bc6-943c-cff8d79a531d.a: Yes—guests consistently praise the owners and staff as extremely friendly, hospitable, and attentive. They offer thoughtful touches like fresh seasonal fruit left in your room daily, free laundry service, and helpful local recommendations to make your stay feel personal and cared for.

7894035a-9ffd-4bc6-943c-cff8d79a531d.q: What are the rooms like at Kyoto Ryokan Gion Sano?
7894035a-9ffd-4bc6-943c-cff8d79a531d.a: Rooms feature traditional tatami mats and are spacious, spotlessly clean, and quiet. Guests highlight comfortable futons, good views (including one of a nearby pagoda), reliable hot water, and working air-conditioning—all the essentials for a peaceful stay.

7894035a-9ffd-4bc6-943c-cff8d79a531d.q: Does Kyoto Ryokan Gion Sano serve breakfast?
7894035a-9ffd-4bc6-943c-cff8d79a531d.a: Yes, the ryokan offers a delicious daily breakfast featuring small fruit and cake plates, bagged pastries, and other thoughtful touches that guests describe as both delicious and convenient for taking with you during the day.

7894035a-9ffd-4bc6-943c-cff8d79a531d.q: Is Kyoto Ryokan Gion Sano good for families?
7894035a-9ffd-4bc6-943c-cff8d79a531d.a: Absolutely—families appreciate the spacious rooms, welcoming atmosphere, and the friendly golden retrievers in the lobby. The owners go out of their way to make guests feel at home, and the location puts you within easy walking distance of Kyoto's main sights.

649a6a11-02a9-4cf6-ac78-588c901e6ffd.q: Where is Il Ghiro Guesthouse located in Florence?
649a6a11-02a9-4cf6-ac78-588c901e6ffd.a: Il Ghiro Guesthouse sits on via Faenza, just 3–5 minutes' walk from Firenze S.M.N. train station and equally close to the Duomo and Florence's main tourist attractions and markets. It's in the heart of the city centre, so most sights are within easy walking distance.

649a6a11-02a9-4cf6-ac78-588c901e6ffd.q: How cosy is Il Ghiro Guesthouse?
649a6a11-02a9-4cf6-ac78-588c901e6ffd.a: Il Ghiro Guesthouse scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness. Guests praise the clean, comfortable rooms with adjustable heating, hot showers, and quality beds, plus a warm, welcoming atmosphere that feels like staying in a real Italian apartment.

649a6a11-02a9-4cf6-ac78-588c901e6ffd.q: What facilities does Il Ghiro Guesthouse have?
649a6a11-02a9-4cf6-ac78-588c901e6ffd.a: The guesthouse offers a shared kitchen with oven, microwave, fridge, washing machine, and complimentary coffee and tea. Rooms include air conditioning, hairdryer, iron, and access to strong wifi throughout the property.

649a6a11-02a9-4cf6-ac78-588c901e6ffd.q: Is the staff at Il Ghiro Guesthouse helpful?
649a6a11-02a9-4cf6-ac78-588c901e6ffd.a: Guests consistently praise the hosts—particularly Paula and her son Roble—for being incredibly friendly, accommodating, and generous with local tips and recommendations. They even leave fresh coffee capsules in rooms each morning.

649a6a11-02a9-4cf6-ac78-588c901e6ffd.q: Is Il Ghiro Guesthouse good value for money?
649a6a11-02a9-4cf6-ac78-588c901e6ffd.a: Yes; guests describe it as great value at a reasonable price, with a comfortable bed, clean rooms, and excellent location within walking distance of Florence's main attractions, all without breaking the bank.

649a6a11-02a9-4cf6-ac78-588c901e6ffd.q: Should I know anything before booking Il Ghiro Guesthouse?
649a6a11-02a9-4cf6-ac78-588c901e6ffd.a: The guesthouse is located on the third floor with no lift, so you'll need to climb three flights of stairs. If mobility is a concern, it's worth checking with the hosts beforehand.

e0e84a63-a748-4c40-a07f-c5f0b5e90348.a: Residenza Marotta is in Florence, Italy, very close to Careggi Hospital and Meyer Children's Hospital, making it ideal if you're visiting the area for medical appointments or treatment.
Residenza Marotta has a cosy score of 6.3 out of 10, offering a warm, welcoming atmosphere run directly by the owners.

e0e84a63-a748-4c40-a07f-c5f0b5e90348.q: What is the service like at Residenza Marotta?
e0e84a63-a748-4c40-a07f-c5f0b5e90348.a: Guests consistently praise the exceptional kindness and helpfulness of the two brothers who run the place—they go above and beyond to make visitors feel at home and are attentive to guests' needs.

e0e84a63-a748-4c40-a07f-c5f0b5e90348.q: Are the rooms clean at Residenza Marotta?
e0e84a63-a748-4c40-a07f-c5f0b5e90348.a: Yes, guests repeatedly highlight that rooms are immaculate and well-equipped with everything you need, maintained to a very high standard throughout your stay.
Yes, there is secure covered parking available, plus external parking, and the property is fully enclosed and safe.

e0e84a63-a748-4c40-a07f-c5f0b5e90348.q: What facilities does Residenza Marotta offer?
e0e84a63-a748-4c40-a07f-c5f0b5e90348.a: The residenza offers 24-hour access to a drinks and snacks dispenser, and guests appreciate the secure, well-maintained grounds with both covered and outdoor parking options.

9dbadb2d-82c2-40ae-84fe-5363cecead0e.a: Roxford Lodge is situated in Dublin, Ireland, a few blocks beyond Merrion Square in the diplomatic area. It's a decent walk from Dublin city centre but close to Aviva Stadium, with a bus stop right outside and onsite parking available.

Roxford Lodge scores 7.0 out of 10 for cosiness. Guests consistently praise the comfortable, well-appointed rooms with quality beds and showers, describing them as cosy spaces with everything needed for a pleasant stay.

9dbadb2d-82c2-40ae-84fe-5363cecead0e.q: What is the service like at Roxford Lodge?
9dbadb2d-82c2-40ae-84fe-5363cecead0e.a: The staff at Roxford Lodge are genuinely warm and professional. Guests highlight the friendly check-in team who assist with luggage and parking, and praise the overall helpfulness and pleasant manner of the team throughout their stay.

9dbadb2d-82c2-40ae-84fe-5363cecead0e.q: Is Roxford Lodge good value for money?
9dbadb2d-82c2-40ae-84fe-5363cecead0e.a: Yes—guests repeatedly note that Roxford Lodge offers excellent value, with one reviewer calling it 'almost the cheapest yet went way above expectations.' The privately owned hotel delivers comfort and service that consistently exceeds what guests anticipated at the price.

9dbadb2d-82c2-40ae-84fe-5363cecead0e.q: What is breakfast like at Roxford Lodge?
9dbadb2d-82c2-40ae-84fe-5363cecead0e.a: Breakfast at Roxford Lodge is described as lovely with a great variety, though one guest noted the coffee could be improved. Overall, guests appreciate the breakfast offering as part of their stay.

9dbadb2d-82c2-40ae-84fe-5363cecead0e.q: Are the rooms spacious at Roxford Lodge?
9dbadb2d-82c2-40ae-84fe-5363cecead0e.a: Yes, rooms at Roxford Lodge are generously sized for European standards. Guests praise the space and layout, with one noting their triple room was 'big for European standards' and perfectly set up for a comfortable stay.

5ec86a50-f252-4ce2-9ed8-2e8e1594005a.q: Where is Saren Indah Hotel & Restaurant located?
5ec86a50-f252-4ce2-9ed8-2e8e1594005a.a: Saren Indah is in Nyuh Kuning village, Bali, close enough to central Ubud for convenience but far enough away to feel peaceful and removed from the hustle. The street itself has restaurants, shops, and a laundromat nearby, so you'll find everything you need without venturing far.
